name: Dave McCormick
subject: Here’s what I shared w/ Dana Perino & Bill Hemmer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
In case you missed it

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgsb2a9vdmgl80hku7phv9033k8u10mrqbqtlgfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpgmep34cth2bs)

Friend,

In case you missed it, here's the bottom line up front.

I joined Dana Perino and Bill Hemmer on _America 's Newsroom_ to discuss my big win in the Pennsylvania senate race.

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z55dc38gm18s3kairgcbqtvvc7ddn78g6u0l4hlo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpgmep34cth2bs)

**[WATCH DAVE ON _AMERICA 'S NEWSROOM_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfpa358h506ifrfnbjijv2qemgrhns1aj4aoi81g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpgmep34cth2bs)**

Here's what I shared with Dana and Bill.

✔ **Pennsylvanians voted for CHANGE.** They don't want incremental change. They want significant change, and that's what I intend to do when I get to Washington.

✔ **Authenticity.** People want leaders who do what they say they will do. And if they make a mistake, they own it. I've said it many times over the course of the campaign; I live by the West Point cadet motto: _Duty, Honor, Country. _

✔ **The election is over, and I 'm leading by over 32,000 votes.** But that hasn't stopped my opponent Bob Casey and the national Democrat machine from organizing and fundraising to try and force a recount. Pennsylvania law dictates an automatic recount if the margin is less than .5%. I'm currently leading by EXACTLY .5%, and we expect my opponent to try and force a recount.

But we're following the lead of President Trump. We are going to **FIGHT! FIGHT! FIGHT! **

**[While votes continue to be counted, I'm asking for you to chip in today to help us keep up our fight.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3e8086dipn93nndf6jlu5verdg54tepmr3vslg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpgmep34cth2bs)**

_If you are not in a position to give right now, please don 't. I mean it. _

But if you are able to give, [I'm humbly asking you to chip in any amount to help us fund whatever the Democrats will throw at us in the coming days.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlpn7rse75vgdkavq4q4g9u1qdqjojvc02cq4c40_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpgmep34cth2bs)

Thank you for all of your support. We couldn't have done this without you! I know how to restore strong leadership in our country because I've done it before. And I'll do it as your next Senator.

Thanks again,
_Dave McCormick_
[DONATE](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvb9rvb9cs22epcrff17eu6lfth2qncn5usavp1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpgmep34cth2bs)
---

Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick.
---

PO BOX 23537
PITTSBURGH, PA 15222

name: Jim Jordan
subject: What happens next:
body:
It’s time for Republicans to come together and let’s get to work to make America great again.

It’s time for Republicans to come together and let’s get to work to make America great again.
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo93dfi2tqovsc56e733p5mem11t3g8hqlji7rb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpgm1o34s1h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
During the 1984 election, Ronald Reagan proclaimed, “It’s morning in America.”
---
That’s how I feel today.
---
President Donald J. Trump once again defied the media and the Washington ruling class by ushering in a historic victory.
---
This election was a clear mandate from the American people to charter a new path forward for our nation.
---
_The people spoke – and now it’s time for your elected officials to deliver!_
---
That’s why I’m handing the reins of our Party over to voters like _YOU_ to help craft our new Republican agenda to truly make America great again.
---
[**Please take the People’s Agenda Survey as your Republican elected officials come together to put America on track for a bright new future.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo9nd4qo0n6k77v63v74q3mq5irraovdv5ttg498_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpgm1o34s1h2bs)
---

[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztesgh31j80kroa9dvukbqjdajp4t1d142r8g1io_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpgm1o34s1h2bs)
---

If there’s one takeaway from the election, it’s that the American people are tired of being lectured to by an out-of-touch political elite that don’t have our interests in mind.
---
But the Silent Majority is silent _no more!_
---
With President Trump returning to the White House, a new Republican Senate majority, and Republicans on track to keep the House, your voice, your concerns, and your priorities will be heard loud and clear in our nation’s capital.
---
And that starts right here, right now.
---
That’s why I’m asking you to take my FIRST survey so that your new united Republican government can be certain that we’re fighting for the issues that voters like you care about the most.
---
[**Please take the People’s Agenda Survey as your Republican elected officials come together to put America on track for a bright new future.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp8jvha8jqceke4jp4rkpbsfegommg95q6enotc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpgm1o34s1h2bs)
---
Thank you – and let’s get to work and save our country.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znpgs9eh6oge47b2gtg929vur45br253jbr6h9rg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpgm1o34s1h2bs)
---
Jim Jordan
---

| | Patriot, Have you heard the news? We're suing the Olympic Peninsula YMCA and City of Port Townsend, Washington, on behalf of grandmother Julie Jaman. **[**Will you donate $35 or more right now to help fund this critical new lawsuit?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8uu2jAQhp_G2SWyx5ecs8gCCKBe1dKKilU08QXcxklwDJS3r0IRXljy50_zz49h7Ly7V6RcEoCTNxMBIHxBAM6HW4iX3-HTNt8fgs3P6muQ8y-snuoVXnKv8S9bps78-fBtOpzZqtx9_3VlLz3dR_uSn6GFDei7mZZ1ZiruDBWZrVjJGedMsffsVFFEw0QrhHIKdavBoNLvhkvBUJRvNPMVUBBsPhyUpIVxRqOSigknDdWOCPrIKTDY6DWyKd0wxmEIhR5C1lWnlMbpsdiGwAZ7a4ZUdL61Md217ZONxRCPBDYKlHJvKHPOlMiFpCxvWytzLhxyaQVq5uYhfHNJoZmGS9SW8HpZb_Pdek9AzThY4y-B8Hr95UmSjfP7FtkTaAwj-mNPeP2_G1XNst42q83ic_MRA_ZUsbLZrffNj5-LXT5fWazMePNd5ydVEkGPj8pzwWsF_wIAAP__64mR-w)****** If grandmothers and little girls are no longer safe by themselves in a women's locker room at the YMCA – where are they safe? After all, the YMCA was founded to put Christian values into practice by developing a healthy body, mind, and spirit. But the "woke" culture has infected even trusted ministries like this one. When is enough _enough_ , Patriot? The answer is **now.** Julie Jaman is an 82-year-old grandmother who regularly used her local swimming pool – until the day **she found a grown man – wearing a women's bathing suit – watching two little girls undress in the women's locker room.** The children appeared to be around four and six years old, and Julie believed she may be witnessing a predator in action. So, she did what any reasonable grandmother would do. **Julie confronted the man and asked him to leave.** Instead of asking the man to leave the women's locker room, the YMCA staff targeted Julie for her "discriminatory" behavior and banned her from that location for life. They also launched a smear campaign to paint Julie as a bigot and transphone in her community. **[**Now you can see why I'm asking you to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to help fund Julie's case.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8uu2jAQhp_G2SWyx5ecs8gCCKBe1dKKilU08QXcxklwDJS3r0IRXljy50_zz49h7Ly7V6RcEoCTNxMBIHxBAM6HW4iX3-HTNt8fgs3P6muQ8y-snuoVXnKv8S9bps78-fBtOpzZqtx9_3VlLz3dR_uSn6GFDei7mZZ1ZiruDBWZrVjJGedMsffsVFFEw0QrhHIKdavBoNLvhkvBUJRvNPMVUBBsPhyUpIVxRqOSigknDdWOCPrIKTDY6DWyKd0wxmEIhR5C1lWnlMbpsdiGwAZ7a4ZUdL61Md217ZONxRCPBDYKlHJvKHPOlMiFpCxvWytzLhxyaQVq5uYhfHNJoZmGS9SW8HpZb_Pdek9AzThY4y-B8Hr95UmSjfP7FtkTaAwj-mNPeP2_G1XNst42q83ic_MRA_ZUsbLZrffNj5-LXT5fWazMePNd5ydVEkGPj8pzwWsF_wIAAP__64mR-w)** My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I am the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the _Center for American Liberty_ – the conservative non-profit organization underwriting Julie’s case. The way the YMCA and the City of Port Townsend treated a concerned grandmother isn't just outrageous – it's unconstitutional. The City of Port Townsend owns the pool and contracts with the YMCA to operate it. Like you, Julie has a First Amendment right to speak her mind on publicly owned property no matter who disagrees with it. And like you, she has a Fourteenth Amendment right to due process – something the YMCA working with the City of Port Townsend – neglected when they banned Julie for life without even hearing her side of the story. Here at the _Center for American Liberty_ , our unique strategy is taking down the Left in the courts. In fact, we have already won THREE Supreme Court cases. We are honored to fight in the courts to protect your freedom to say what you want, to live according to your conscience, and to pass on your conservative values to the next generation. That's why our attorneys filed a lawsuit to protect Julie's constitutional rights – and yours, Patriot. Winning this case means preserving your rights to free speech and due process. Losing it means... well, that's just not an option. Because we're also talking about the safety and privacy of women and girls across America! **[**So can I count on you to donate $35 or more today to fund Julie's case and protect your own constitutional rights?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8uu2jAQhp_G2SWyx5ecs8gCCKBe1dKKilU08QXcxklwDJS3r0IRXljy50_zz49h7Ly7V6RcEoCTNxMBIHxBAM6HW4iX3-HTNt8fgs3P6muQ8y-snuoVXnKv8S9bps78-fBtOpzZqtx9_3VlLz3dR_uSn6GFDei7mZZ1ZiruDBWZrVjJGedMsffsVFFEw0QrhHIKdavBoNLvhkvBUJRvNPMVUBBsPhyUpIVxRqOSigknDdWOCPrIKTDY6DWyKd0wxmEIhR5C1lWnlMbpsdiGwAZ7a4ZUdL61Md217ZONxRCPBDYKlHJvKHPOlMiFpCxvWytzLhxyaQVq5uYhfHNJoZmGS9SW8HpZb_Pdek9AzThY4y-B8Hr95UmSjfP7FtkTaAwj-mNPeP2_G1XNst42q83ic_MRA_ZUsbLZrffNj5-LXT5fWazMePNd5ydVEkGPj8pzwWsF_wIAAP__64mR-w)** My team and I will never stay silent as the left attacks our most basic freedoms. We also never shy away from a fight. Going head-to-head with giant liberal groups like the ACLU doesn't scare me. clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Patriot, Have you heard the news? We're suing the Olympic Peninsula YMCA and City of Port Townsend, Washington, on behalf of grandmother Julie Jaman. ** If grandmothers and little girls are no longer safe by themselves in a women's locker room at the YMCA – where are they safe? After all, the YMCA was founded to put Christian values into practice by developing a healthy body, mind, and spirit. But the "woke" culture has infected even trusted ministries like this one. When is enough enough , Patriot? The answer is now. Julie Jaman is an 82-year-old grandmother who regularly used her local swimming pool – until the day she found a grown man – wearing a women's bathing suit – watching two little girls undress in the women's locker room. The children appeared to be around four and six years old, and Julie believed she may be witnessing a predator in action. So, she did what any reasonable grandmother would do. Julie confronted the man and asked him to leave. Instead of asking the man to leave the women's locker room, the YMCA staff targeted Julie for her "discriminatory" behavior and banned her from that location for life. They also launched a smear campaign to paint Julie as a bigot and transphone in her community. My name is Harmeet Dhillon and I am the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty – the conservative non-profit organization underwriting Julie’s case. The way the YMCA and the City of Port Townsend treated a concerned grandmother isn't just outrageous – it's unconstitutional. The City of Port Townsend owns the pool and contracts with the YMCA to operate it. Like you, Julie has a First Amendment right to speak her mind on publicly owned property no matter who disagrees with it. And like you, she has a Fourteenth Amendment right to due process – something the YMCA working with the City of Port Townsend – neglected when they banned Julie for life without even hearing her side of the story. Here at the Center for American Liberty , our unique strategy is taking down the Left in the courts. In fact, we have already won THREE Supreme Court cases. We are honored to fight in the courts to protect your freedom to say what you want, to live according to your conscience, and to pass on your conservative values to the next generation. That's why our attorneys filed a lawsuit to protect Julie's constitutional rights – and yours, Patriot. Winning this case means preserving your rights to free speech and due process. Losing it means... well, that's just not an option. Because we're also talking about the safety and privacy of women and girls across America! My team and I will never stay silent as the left attacks our most basic freedoms. We also never shy away from a fight. Going head-to-head with giant liberal groups like the ACLU doesn't scare me. But it does mean we need to have the resources on hand for a dogfight. Thank you for helping us fight back against the radical left and its disgusting attacks on our children, our freedoms, and our constitutional rights. | | God Bless, | | Harmeet K. Dhillon, CEO Center for American Liberty | | | P.S. Patriot, what would you do if you saw a fully-grown man – wearing a female bathing suit – watching two little girls undress in the women's locker room? I'm willing to bet you'd do the exact same thing our client, Julie Jaman, did. Confront him to protect the little girls. Because we aren't just protecting Julie's constitutional rights – we're protecting yours, too – and the privacy and safety of women and girls across America. Thank you in advance for your support! | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 |

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Fight for an America-First Senate Majority Leader
body:
Stand with Trump’s agenda—demand Sen. Rick Scott be elected Senate Majority Leader.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** First, on behalf of the entire support team, I want to wish all of our veterans and their families a happy Veteran's Day. We are so incredibly thankful for all of our veterans, for the service you provided to our country, and for being willing to risk your own life to protect ours. _Thank you.__
_**CALL TO ACTION** On the heels of a massive, historic red-wave election, the Senate GOP is about to elect the new Senate Majority Leader, as Mitch McConnell is stepping down... and right now, the two GOP senators "next in line" for this position are Sen. Thune (SD) and Sen. Cornyn (TX). Both of these men have spent years demonizing and opposing Donald Trump, and are not close friends of the conservative movement.
Sen. Cornyn worked with Democrats, if you'll remember, to pass gun control legislation in 2022, that Joe Biden signed into law.
It's time for "seniority" and "next in line" to stop being how leaders in Congress are chosen. The person who is best for the country is the person who should be elected.
**That means that Sen. Rick Scott (FL), the only conservative running, must be elected Senate Majority Leader. Of course, the swamp DOES NOT want Sen. Scott to elected. That's where you come in.****
****ACTION:** [**Use our action page**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a64152e6/1edb9794a6404314) to automatically send an email to your Republican senators and be connected by phone. We need to urge them to announce who they are voting for ahead of time, to vote for Sen. Rick Scott, and afterward, to tell us how they _actually_ voted. **__** **** ************
---
| **** ******ACTION:** **[Re-post my call to action](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a64152e6/1edb9794a6404316 "https://x.com/jennybethm/status/1855967755872125328?s=46&t=JxLy3HQEEfJahkjkl_tbKA")** , if you are on X.
The choice for Senate Majority Leader is clearly Sen. Rick Scott, who will work with the incoming Trump Administration instead of against it.
**It 's time to drain the swamp!** Our government will no longer be business as usual; it's time to get our country on the right track and stop playing political games that do not benefit the American people.
Let's keep the momentum going from last week, refusing to give an inch to anyone who seeks to subvert the will of the American people.In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

clean_body: Stand with Trump’s agenda—demand Sen. Rick Scott be elected Senate Majority Leader. | | | | | | Patriot- | ** First, on behalf of the entire support team, I want to wish all of our veterans and their families a happy Veteran's Day. We are so incredibly thankful for all of our veterans, for the service you provided to our country, and for being willing to risk your own life to protect ours. Thank you. CALL TO ACTION On the heels of a massive, historic red-wave election, the Senate GOP is about to elect the new Senate Majority Leader, as Mitch McConnell is stepping down... and right now, the two GOP senators "next in line" for this position are Sen. Thune (SD) and Sen. Cornyn (TX). Both of these men have spent years demonizing and opposing Donald Trump, and are not close friends of the conservative movement. Sen. Cornyn worked with Democrats, if you'll remember, to pass gun control legislation in 2022, that Joe Biden signed into law. It's time for "seniority" and "next in line" to stop being how leaders in Congress are chosen. The person who is best for the country is the person who should be elected. That means that Sen. Rick Scott (FL), the only conservative running, must be elected Senate Majority Leader. Of course, the swamp DOES NOT want Sen. Scott to elected. That's where you come in.** ACTION: to automatically send an email to your Republican senators and be connected by phone. We need to urge them to announce who they are voting for ahead of time, to vote for Sen. Rick Scott, and afterward, to tell us how they actually voted. ** ******** | **ACTION: "" , if you are on X. The choice for Senate Majority Leader is clearly Sen. Rick Scott, who will work with the incoming Trump Administration instead of against it. It 's time to drain the swamp! Our government will no longer be business as usual; it's time to get our country on the right track and stop playing political games that do not benefit the American people. Let's keep the momentum going from last week, refusing to give an inch to anyone who seeks to subvert the will of the American people.In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | | | | | | | This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. name: From the Desk of the COO
subject: Double your support for service members this Veterans Day
body:
Don't miss this Veterans Day match offer!
[](https://www.uso.org)
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[ ALL GIFTS MATCHED ](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[ THIS VETERANS DAY!* ](https://links.e.uso.)
[](https://links.e.uso.)
[MATCH YOUR GIFT NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
USO Supporter,
Every year, we come together on Nov. 11 to honor the brave men and women who have served and continue to serve our great nation. It's a day to reflect on the sacrifices they have made and the freedoms they have protected. As someone who has worn the uniform, I can tell you firsthand just how meaningful that support is.
**This Veterans Day, your support can go even further. Thanks to our generous partners at the NFL, all gifts made to the USO will be matched, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000, to help us reach our $100,000 email and text message fundraising goal -- but only for a limited time. **
**[Will you join me in making a gift of $29 or more now that will be MATCHED to support service members around the world making unimaginable sacrifices for us every day?](https://links.e.uso.)**
As an Air Force veteran, I know what it's like when the USO is your only way to connect to a loved one back home, get essential supplies or enjoy a holiday meal. And I can tell you that it's no secret to service members where all that generous support comes from.
_Everything the USO does for our heroes in uniform is made possible by generous supporters like you._
**There 's no better time to show your gratitude. Rush your gift before midnight and double your support for the heroes who stand on the front lines for us every day. **
**[Will you make a donation to the USO right now that will be DOUBLED in value to support our service members as they selflessly serve our country?](https://links.e.uso.)**
[RUSH $29 (BECOMES $58)](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[RUSH $58 (BECOMES $116)](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~)
---
[RUSH $116 (BECOMES $232)](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/0d-)
---
[RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT TO HAVE IT DOUBLED!](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/e-LPBj~99phd/bjd3SCsrTDFrdWVBTjFMM3Uzc1Q3d2pZUXdGK005bTc5RDE5VWhqMDZpUXNaWnRJREUrMXczOWN1THdDRlRtbnhQcGRnL1BqUjhzKzF4ZE1TdXZrRnNydTlmNk5rRG41bkFySWR2cHdsclU9S0/YWxwZmtjdVlXSXdoanF1dVZJekZCTHFJSVVGSVpxc2tsQ01panExWm5yc1VScGFEMVB0WWtOMVNxZy9YUTFQV2lQSGp5OS9EcW51Z0JXY0ZuOGkrdTVOa2R1R0xBWVNSS0)
---
Every moment we enjoy our freedoms is because of the dedication of our veterans and current service members. Your gift today will ensure that we can continue supporting those who defend our nation.
Christopher Plamp
Colonel, U.S. Air Force (Retired)
Chief Operating Officer, USO
*The NFL is matching all gifts to the USO through a USO Direct Mail, email and text message campaign, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000, through November 29, 2024.

**On this week 's episode of The Qasim Rashid Show we discuss:**
* This week's episode will upset some people as I do a deep dive into why Kamala Harris lost the election. My responsibility as a human rights lawyer is not to speak soothing falsehoods, but hard truths. The Democratic Party has lost two winnable Presidential elections in the last three contests, resulting in devastating consequences for the American people. This moment calls for self-reflection and self-analysis. The fate of our republic is literally at stake, and we cannot afford continued failure. **In short --what went wrong, and how do we fix it?**

* * *
Something went wrong.

Be sure to hit that subscribe button to join the movement! | | ---|---|--- As for me, I will be doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I cannot do it alone. I invite you to support my work and advocacy by subscribing below. Thank you for your trust and partnership.** | | ---|---|--- You 're currently a free subscriber to Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid. When possible, I hope you'll upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** Thank you, Team Casey ** Paid for by Defeat Boebert PAC

name: VoteVets
subject: What it means to be a Veteran today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Peter, Happy Veterans Day.
Being a Veteran means that you made a decision to put your country before yourself.
It means that you have sworn an oath of loyalty — not to a religion, or to a party, or to a person. You swear to support and defend the Constitution of the United States of America.
But it’s more than that.
Being a Veteran has often meant that the promises your country made to you were not always upheld. It meant being lied into wars. It meant that you had to watch as politicians refused to care for your friends as they got sick when they came home from those wars. It meant that the ideals and values you swore to uphold were often cast aside by the people in charge.
VoteVets has worked for the past twenty years to rectify that. To hold leadership accountable. To take the fight to Republicans on the ground they thought was safest. To show them, and the country, that Republicans may be the party of war, but they are not the party of the Military, or of Veterans.
We have had setbacks and shortcomings along the way. We have seen hardship. But we have also made progress. We have won. We have defeated them — and we will again.
And as we grieve our losses after the results of last week's election, we also celebrate our wins. Principled leaders will be in positions of power when it matters most, and that is thanks to you.
So today, care for one another. Care for yourselves.
But tomorrow, steel yourselves for the fights ahead.
VoteVets will, as ever, be the tip of the spear. And we need you with us.
Thank you.
The Team at VoteVets
| [JOIN THE FIGHT](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov24.0GjwC1&refcode=em241111-1-30&t=1&akid=33496%2E3013755%2EAsNMiu)
---

name: Mark Trammell
subject: The left’s sinister plan…
body:
| |
---
| | The link to the CITIZEN PROTEST below is now fixed.
---
| |
---
| |
---
Peter, it's not every day I get to share that WE'RE SUING THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT! Let me be more specific -- we're suing the Biden Administration's Department of Education Secretary Miguel Cardona for censoring parents who dare to speak out against the left's sinister plan to hijack your child's mind. **[**And I'm asking you to sign this CITIZEN PROTEST in support of our newest lawsuit.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0c811f1d0dea43f1a56fb062e91d64fe&_e=o-bYmvx9zw3gDx12RuwRKx-RnaQnXhPD7jcp0WRXLhNiRlF5zRl5VQpJgXvcsnXGSVevGNw6s2ooKk6NtGDXjOR_evXjqVSsvacbAbaCfBEVqjzGPGcxoMP64muA3_wX5aW7KOfLg83UD_PWb2B3lXOx06qL19V9TBOX44zkCeEMOrXjSUdoLKwG7Oe_yum2gc1aZ77Bk5fNU7lBbAc2RoWKOcI1Ir4EoDgJieBngCMk06odn80VFFJXC9WIrxt5-EUScoN8GfrZJmpmWfk1WbYOCmiHdmf2UFdnnbx1xBtknC3jxMAASlVOkBVFV5GLhDhvU7fZ3zcvT--m0hdBCjSZlKZD735SgtU3UHlDbaEmwsGHCS8hulZtjO0kqgOFbkpPGhrP7rJ19mq_FfxdA5iyvDiosZMAtLUDsjpXSUHtnNl0QN_ppbILUpSWbfeS)** Please let me explain... Our client, Nicole Solas, is a courageous mother of two from Rhode Island. She refused to blindly trust that the leftists running her children's school had their best interests at heart -- so she requested to view the curriculum being taught in her child's _**kindergarten**_ class. Nicole quickly learned the only way to find out what's really going on in schools is to file public records requests -- and it cost her $74,000 in fees just to obtain public records that should be readily available to parents! Worse, the teachers' union SUED Nicole to try to stop the school district from providing her with the curriculum and public records she requested. Peter, you're probably wondering _what is the school district hiding?_ Well, Nicole did not back down. She did not waver. **And now, she's exposing the pornographic materials educators use _in the classroom_ to sexualize young children.** No child should be exposed to pornography -- but we're specifically talking about a kindergarten curriculum. Little 5- and 6-year-old children! _Is this what you want for your kids or grandkids?_ I have an 8-year-old daughter and a 4-year-old son, and just thinking about this makes me sick -- so __**[**I hope you can see why I'm asking you to sign this CITIZEN PROTEST right now.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0c811f1d0dea43f1a56fb062e91d64fe&_e=o-bYmvx9zw3gDx12RuwRKx-RnaQnXhPD7jcp0WRXLhNiRlF5zRl5VQpJgXvcsnXGSVevGNw6s2ooKk6NtGDXjOR_evXjqVSsvacbAbaCfBEVqjzGPGcxoMP64muA3_wX5aW7KOfLg83UD_PWb2B3lXOx06qL19V9TBOX44zkCeEMOrXjSUdoLKwG7Oe_yum2gc1aZ77Bk5fNU7lBbAc2RoWKOcI1Ir4EoDgJieBngCMk06odn80VFFJXC9WIrxt5-EUScoN8GfrZJmpmWfk1WbYOCmiHdmf2UFdnnbx1xBsSo6jiY4rNIZF_wg4BMu8QuikZd3ksq6Hna78Zbk1Eri2NkJMjcxfGUHIZifW8WEnTXyjsxUfNiqdv17fiHxz2B8Hx1sYMyWYRa3ws3_m3N6ijJgQEUTE9nQfDkEdwazFkknF-vYTTeWQv8rhRWCpx)** Because believe it or not, this story gets worse... Biden's Secretary of Education Miguel Cardona used his official government account on X to condemn efforts to "censor" books -- so Nicole exercised her First Amendment rights in response. She replied to Secretary Cardona's post by posting cartoon images from the controversial "banned" book _Fun Home: A Family Tragicomic._ The images are cartoon drawings of teenage children performing sexual acts on each other. Secretary Cardona apparently agreed that such images were not appropriate for public view because within minutes of Nicole's reply post, he used X's "hide" function to censor the post from public view. **_Too inappropriate for X but not for young children in public schools seems to be the Department of Education 's position on pornography._** That's why I'm thrilled that we are suing Secretary Cardona for violating Nicole's First Amendment rights. You know what they say, daylight is the best disinfectant and Nicole is shining a whole lot of light on what is really going on in the classroom. **[**I hope you'll join us by adding your name to this CITIZEN PROTEST.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0c811f1d0dea43f1a56fb062e91d64fe&_e=o-bYmvx9zw3gDx12RuwRKx-RnaQnXhPD7jcp0WRXLhNiRlF5zRl5VQpJgXvcsnXGSVevGNw6s2ooKk6NtGDXjOR_evXjqVSsvacbAbaCfBEVqjzGPGcxoMP64muA3_wX5aW7KOfLg83UD_PWb2B3lXOx06qL19V9TBOX44zkCeEMOrXjSUdoLKwG7Oe_yum2gc1aZ77Bk5fNU7lBbAc2RoWKOcI1Ir4EoDgJieBngCMk06odn80VFFJXC9WIrxt5-EUScoN8GfrZJmpmWfk1WbYOCmiHdmf2UFdnnbx1xBsYD2Urw-1meatn1Ii7ZpQKqk5bZJ8OhiZZYn9I5lZM83TVlf6aiV76jXylHSXHS5pW9D7M4GO38KVLzI7RsqQx4CsLKIPntSlW-_ikKpS_8ql95WZ3d36-FCBA39MXqqwaiyxv2Yt24NE5lebPXxNH)** You and I cannot allow government officials to get away with leveraging their power to discriminate against viewpoints that make them look bad or that they disagree with. The left wants to abolish your First Amendment rights and if we give them an inch, they'll take a mile. Thank you in advance for standing with us -- and for standing with Nicole -- in this critical new lawsuit.
---
| | Sincerely, Mark Trammell Executive Director & General Counsel

clean_body: | | | | The link to the CITIZEN PROTEST below is now fixed. | | | | Peter, it's not every day I get to share that WE'RE SUING THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT! Let me be more specific -- we're suing the Biden Administration's Department of Education Secretary Miguel Cardona for censoring parents who dare to speak out against the left's sinister plan to hijack your child's mind. Please let me explain... Our client, Nicole Solas, is a courageous mother of two from Rhode Island. She refused to blindly trust that the leftists running her children's school had their best interests at heart -- so she requested to view the curriculum being taught in her child's kindergarten class. Nicole quickly learned the only way to find out what's really going on in schools is to file public records requests -- and it cost her $74,000 in fees just to obtain public records that should be readily available to parents! Worse, the teachers' union SUED Nicole to try to stop the school district from providing her with the curriculum and public records she requested. Peter, you're probably wondering what is the school district hiding? Well, Nicole did not back down. She did not waver. And now, she's exposing the pornographic materials educators use in the classroom to sexualize young children. No child should be exposed to pornography -- but we're specifically talking about a kindergarten curriculum. Little 5- and 6-year-old children! Is this what you want for your kids or grandkids? I have an 8-year-old daughter and a 4-year-old son, and just thinking about this makes me sick -- so Because believe it or not, this story gets worse... Biden's Secretary of Education Miguel Cardona used his official government account on X to condemn efforts to "censor" books -- so Nicole exercised her First Amendment rights in response. She replied to Secretary Cardona's post by posting cartoon images from the controversial "banned" book Fun Home: A Family Tragicomic. The images are cartoon drawings of teenage children performing sexual acts on each other. Secretary Cardona apparently agreed that such images were not appropriate for public view because within minutes of Nicole's reply post, he used X's "hide" function to censor the post from public view. Too inappropriate for X but not for young children in public schools seems to be the Department of Education 's position on pornography. That's why I'm thrilled that we are suing Secretary Cardona for violating Nicole's First Amendment rights. You know what they say, daylight is the best disinfectant and Nicole is shining a whole lot of light on what is really going on in the classroom. You and I cannot allow government officials to get away with leveraging their power to discriminate against viewpoints that make them look bad or that they disagree with. The left wants to abolish your First Amendment rights and if we give them an inch, they'll take a mile. Thank you in advance for standing with us -- and for standing with Nicole -- in this critical new lawsuit. | | Sincerely, Mark Trammell Executive Director & General Counsel | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: Hassan Martini, Executive Director of No Dem Left Behind
subject: Where Do We Go From Here?
body:
| | | | | |
---
# **Where Do We Go From Here?**
---
| | | | Hello folks, The hits keep on coming, and the news pundits continue to discuss what we did wrong. The vast majority of the people you see on TV talking about election strategy have not knocked on a single door this cycle, perhaps not ever. What did we do wrong? That’s an easy question to answer: we did not listen to the people. In business, there's a saying: the customer is always right. In politics, it can be said that the voter is always right. The absolute worst thing we can do right now is to turn on our fellow citizens, label them all as racists, and use that as an excuse. Sometimes, friends and family ask me how I am still a Democrat, with _still_ being the key word. My response is that I have never changed. I believe in equality for all. I believe we should do right by our senior citizens and that healthcare should be a right for everyone, not a privilege for the lucky few. I believe the government has a mandate to protect its citizens and pave the way for them to live successful lives. As Democrats, it is shameful that when we mention things like Medicare for All, we are ostracized by the corporate elite, who are unfortunately very influential in our party apparatus. No Dem Left Behind is a grassroots organization, which means it's much harder to keep the lights on, but it also means we are free to speak our minds when needed. About one week before President Biden stepped down from the race, we were among the very first organizations to call on him to step aside and have VP Kamala Harris take over the top of the ticket. When we did this, we were targeted by a powerful group on social media, many of whom have millions of followers, who wanted to see us canceled. Their message was clear: _F**k you, traitors._ At that moment, I couldn’t help but wonder—if Democrats treat other Democrats this way, how do they respond to Republicans or independents? I was sick to my stomach, angry, and saddened, especially since some of these people were colleagues I had worked with and personally knew. We withstood that assault, and privately, we were flooded with messages of support. My regret? I wish we had spoken out sooner. We were hearing from voters every day about their concerns, from the genocide America was funding to the lack of accountability for the rising costs of living. At the Democratic National Convention, what was portrayed on TV was very different from what was happening on the ground. The week was filled with VIP-exclusive events and lots of glitz and glamour. The convention was also attended by organizers and leaders who were deeply uncomfortable with the party’s leadership. The disgraceful decision not to acknowledge Palestinian concerns at the DNC will require significant effort to mend. When we saw the protesters, we told them we stood with them and that we were trying to get the decision-makers to hear us out, but they never did. We did not lose this election because we listened to our base; we lost because we betrayed our base and courted the Cheneys, praising war criminals as American patriots. You will never beat a Republican by ignoring your base. Moving forward, we are going to be vocal about our concerns and will demand changes at the very top. We are going to remind America that Democrats are the party of the working class—because we are. Before defeating Trump, we have to get our act together. If we don’t, I don’t need to paint a picture for you; you can decipher that for yourself. As always, in solidarity, Hassan
---

subject: Honoring all veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
But our work to honor our veterans is not done. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click **[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96923724/511656984/889329980?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.11.11_VeteransDay_B1_F1_S1_C1_Actives_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODc1NjRjMC0zZGEwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SUdaqEloZMmUA9I2rSR7d68d6-febfTMFl3MhI0E9KI=&emci=d0248b25-349d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=087564c0-3da0-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=2727974)** If you want to unsubscribe, click **[here.](https://action.durbinforsenate.com/p/vDVgS6znzEiztuxYJdeQwA2?unsubscribedata=6j2yNWQNWjfMZ%2BucHJRQ7Lc8PTDqjewQ4a5NoPYsUDhePcfX84O7bI%2FcS8%2BDLzSLskuG35WPfcrFVUpOR%2BOsWRJtpreMd8Um3g%2Fv%2BvBZ8CYWDcVs22RBW03Rvm5lAiSS8fGaHGimq0%2BQLL3D9V%2FY9dh8R640A6gDyV24taBxHSdOi7cNCYgyMOtlpEywAgvcPBOx8UoyPQhs3paTX3FcE6IqWZovSn53vBfOruVxZsVTzfbrt0fNGiQBMnMttZri7pJ4Jj59Fi8%2F97ubVwmOwvLBFZL%2FRTCFhp2I3kZeYjJ0mxxbkrdMbPlQG2X9sVQo5pdJiB%2BkicghDdZwDCwDLQ%2BhkHz%2FicOkLRAy%2BTVS89Fb8v8XWscHDnjIs08d3XupfmcP0qmjq0kEdGjUaKNqAmn4lnCOrDYqE5H%2FcUcCj60%3D)**
---
#
Peter,
Today is a very important day for our country. Today, we celebrate and honor all veterans of this great nation and all the sacrifices they’ve made to keep us safe.
**To all of our veterans here in Illinois and throughout America: thank you for your service.**
You have made a sacrifice that is full of honor and distinction. With each deployment and tour, you risk your lives and leave loved ones at home to be a patriot.
But our work to honor our veterans is not done. It’s more than celebrating one day out of the year.
In Congress, I will continue to work to ensure that our nation upholds its promise to support you, to honor you, and to repay the debt we owe to your fellow warriors. I will do everything I can to make sure your service does not go unnoticed.
Thank you, again, to all of our veterans and their families. I wish you all a safe and happy Veterans Day.
Sincerely,
Dick Durbin

clean_body: But our work to honor our veterans is not done. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click Peter, Today is a very important day for our country. Today, we celebrate and honor all veterans of this great nation and all the sacrifices they’ve made to keep us safe. To all of our veterans here in Illinois and throughout America: thank you for your service. You have made a sacrifice that is full of honor and distinction. With each deployment and tour, you risk your lives and leave loved ones at home to be a patriot. But our work to honor our veterans is not done. It’s more than celebrating one day out of the year. In Congress, I will continue to work to ensure that our nation upholds its promise to support you, to honor you, and to repay the debt we owe to your fellow warriors. I will do everything I can to make sure your service does not go unnoticed. Thank you, again, to all of our veterans and their families. I wish you all a safe and happy Veterans Day. Sincerely, Dick Durbin = Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. name: Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: Happy Veterans Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

Happy Veterans Day!

Today, let's all take a moment to honor those who have served in our Armed Forces, sacrificing so much to defend our most fundamental freedoms and protect the health of our democracy. They, along with all those currently serving, are true examples of the best among us, and we owe them a deep debt of gratitude.

Best wishes for a Happy Veterans Day.

Raja

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: honoring Rhode Island veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=jRMpcVDPp7qapZifO5PQzww4tok4orkRgy0mB9qCtt6QcBehKgJbVGrcVFUKU%2Bk5j2dFIxGnbjBe3X%2BnMwNJPhXN98lA6naRkdY0MyIx1pRGcnG9wpoFa3co6VVyqWLQx5ThMdCXEDYBmg44jb9MyyJ%2Fns6of2EduCezsasQHzYDOqo1QKpyO4dXGEst3hDG8E5TMWBk48JeFztErKr857tndtj8jufyQ9yYgo6QzCszeqEOwY6sitjAfXEN8rqr6MVPRmGfFsOI0syKr9ucQTgcBa8BsYWixrFS0GqxsBmVbYHMH5vWPZnubLQJ0jeviAgOtTQe09SbfPZcuMejS%2FH%2BfVNC36VWmr2SgArpbfZB2Rau8BGKQ4ydyPavGiBX7Ky28%2Fy0i8b%2FRSv5lqsh2QlbLN2twwQMoyQ8hSwvzWsVLHBLytcurIAaayjrCq6k]

# [#]
Peter,

Thanks to generous supporters like you, we were successful in keeping this seat blue.

I’m so grateful to have had you on my team. Thank you again for your support — we truly couldn’t do this without you. With your help we grew our margin significantly since 2022 by relentlessly focusing on the needs of working people, and that is where I will keep my focus. I am proud of the work that we all have put in over the last two years and am honored to be re-elected to represent RI-02.

And while I am disappointed by the results of the Presidential election, I respect the electoral process and the choice of the American people.

I will work with any administration of either party when it is in the best interest of Rhode Islanders. But I also know that Rhode Islanders expect their representatives in Congress to always stand up to the executive branch when necessary to defend our democracy, rights, and freedoms. No matter what lies ahead, I am committed to fighting for Rhode Island values in Washington.

There is still a lot left to do, so let’s get to work.

Seth
PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits...

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs9bg0levjtc60vtfl2aop949up0b5jqvj7p04e8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimaoj2cph2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z50lfobtmmhfe9lsvj9u8ilt23aep5pts5dep1bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimaoj2cph2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1baqhroutnenqinogto9vc8ugv5vca61q20i7s8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimaoj2cph2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgrir6og7jju3jacj0qrsemdbopgc2mjr86akk1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimaoj2cph2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. More Raving Customer Reviews! Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: There has never been a better day to thank the veterans among us who make America possible.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
There has never been a better day to thank the veterans among us who make
America possible.

As our country's institutions, including the Constitution, face their
greatest challenges, it is worth remembering that those who enlist to
serve this county in uniform swear an oath not to a man or a political
party but to the idea that we are a nation governed by laws, composed of,
by and for the people.

To every generation of veterans, we thank you for your service to our
country, and for the sacrifices that have made us the world's greatest
democracy.

Your example of selfless patriotism is needed now more than ever.

Sincerely,
Beto O'Rourke

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1001&akid=239894%2E444211%2EUhizyy

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Big Tech vs. the Babylon Bee, Round 1,267,310
body:
When Elon Musk bought Twitter

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkos6vpvkvm5k2b9pvsh1bhu998jt4jfd685jrqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimeo34chh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend, When Elon Musk bought Twitter, he sent me a DM that said, "Do you want the Babylon Bee restored? There will be no censorship of humor."
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkqroflagoocuj4rhfc31k79htbl7a9kh7053pv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimeo34chh2bs)
---
We've been trying to write a joke worth $44 billion ever since. But, in all seriousness - free speech is no joke (not even a multibillion dollar one). The Bee would know - not only did Twitter deplatform us, but other woke Big Tech firms have tried to silence our voice as well.
---
* **Facebook** has deleted our posts and deactivated our account on several occasions.
* **Front** , our internal email service at the time, terminated our account and left us unable to communicate with each other and wider world.
* And, in a particularly ironic move, **Vimeo** permanently suspended the David Horowitz Freedom Center's account because they posted a talk **I gave on censorship. **

---
**It 's clear woke, left-wing tech elitists can't abide by satire that dares mock their progressive orthodoxy**. We're not the only attempted victims of their censorship regime, either. They've gone after our First Amendment ally Musk, too - Disney, Apple, IBM, and Sony are just some of the companies who have pulled their advertising from X to protest the fact that it platforms the Bee and others accused of "wrongthink." All this amounts to a sustained, coordinated attack on free thought and expression. These pillars are central to our mission of speaking truth through humor. **No matter how much pressure they exert, the Bee will never back down. Free speech is worth more than whatever they can take from us**. To people with integrity, like Musk, principles are worth more than money. **But we won 't give them what they want. **We won't stop telling jokes. More importantly, we won't stop telling the _truth_.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z432hvbb0686jnocbbs3uk7csbts5j88c9rpu34g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimeo34chh2bs)
---
Sure, you may be thinking, a billionaire like Musk can afford to take the hit when radical Leftists try to force X into conformity and submission. That's what we thought, too, but we noticed something in the midst of the censorship campaigns waged against us - we had a superpower progressives couldn't see. And that's our subscribers. **The Bee could not have taken the stand it did against Twitter if we did not have the support of each and every subscriber**. These are people who appreciate humor, yes, but also believe in free speech. Who appreciate debate, dialogue, and discovering new ideas. **[If that sounds like you, I hope you'll consider subscribing to the Babylon Bee. We'd love to have you in the fight for freedom of expression.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5u2v4kejepdpl4oihtp0aqf4brolidh32rib8d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimeo34chh2bs)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbfi4jpb187hrbding2mbh27ftoh1vb4jieeunh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimeo34chh2bs)
---
They can hurt us, smear us, reduce our reach; but they can never silence us with free speech supporters like you in our corner. **[Join the fray with us by becoming a Babylon Bee premium subscriber today.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0cq53gk229pce14h0jbe6kairrq79r4hm466jt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimeo34chh2bs)** Thanks for considering standing with us. We'll stand with you, too.
---
Seth Dillon
CEO | The Babylon Bee
Pronouns: Bee and Beeself
---
|
---
_Copyright(C) 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved._
****
The Babylon Bee, LLC
PO Box 546
Jupiter, FL 33468
---

First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Your America News
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits...

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z34d7uiak4js5k457qb9pedf2ucs4gdfhqd6iiu0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimeo34chh2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbu9dhdnsu0kptsm12gtek7ue2r6pgh0pidld4e8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimeo34chh2bs) [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1lhmvp76erfiunj5d8b9bpm5ou4gmfgeev28il8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimeo34chh2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z35pshg0oidu44nucbkm9lvttofetoh2keefp0p8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimeo34chh2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj2lb11964t583cu62toakq3agj0r4int8v2vb6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimeo34chh2bs)
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4ic53thcos17aqga8ahdpibu3l7coejtl7eemko_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimeo34chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj5cdh64pr24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcj34tlvondl0oelvtr83k8sshvl7snh639drui0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimeo34chh2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze823tkuehl1brp28lblph74b1h1erg7ftu63cb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpimeo34chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Team Johnson

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: Action needed in PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
The race is not over in Pennsylvania
Peter, **the race is not over in Pennsylvania.**
This Senate race is still too close to call, and we need to act fast to make sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard. Our team needs your help to keep this work going.

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Happy Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://chrisforpa.com/ [https://chrisforpa.com/] To all my fellow veterans, I wish you a happy Veterans Day. Thanks for all that you’ve done for this country. You represent the very best of America.

Derek, Veterans Day is a time for our country to celebrate, honor, and pay our respects to those who answered the call to serve.

I was proud to serve overseas, and I’m proud to continue to serve our country representing Western PA.

In Congress, I’ll always stand up for this country and for my fellow veterans – from protecting our hard-earned benefits to supporting a fully-funded VA. This shouldn’t be up for debate.

Today, and every day, I want to express my enormous thanks to my fellow veterans.

Thank you,

Chris Deluzio
Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@chrisforpa.com to your address book. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/z5DxLUzOH0Cbr-Ed1epOKA2?unsubscribedata=FfS32oNaue1Ta7wdHYp%2BLU4nCpg%2FOYhiDpW52aGGYpy589sB44sJg4HWuj7tXgVaDvxOoCwwPs0P%2FJC2WRVujDeIf7Z%2BhLhGi4j8xQfdof%2FSxDQU%2F2S7rSbkCGVx6HcbcV4P8NQvdsII8pi1Av0CDoaWLmZ%2Bd68%2FUJaavCX2CjIn0RwYZpWMiqwoD6f34s%2Fwy0MItZVSK97Az6DTba0jJUH4wz3iBgU8ERe8ulqWLtweV29iz5XxQJ58aWMnROdCNBFm%2FmOA8YrxA0drZBcJw8%2BvfVV0wRrbxkli2sBHoEZz0EzFfj6550cVzXfL6VuPX8ja9UhYgAfXM4T8T%2BYz8SznUUPJu5%2Bbxrf%2FEQhC18CPMpBw44gzjuqnCviflUkqDybtJfaSm0QA8QepaIX%2FDcML2HtdbXiDSsHPF6e31EVY9rPRZF9knSoGZoKjzGzF .

name: Forward Party Veterans and Veteran's Families Committee
subject: This Veterans Day...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
...we honor those who have served and seek to emulate their values.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=veterans_day_email&n=1)
---
Monday, November 11, 2024 | Peter -- On this Veterans Day, we pause to honor the courageous individuals who have served our country with dedication and sacrifice. Today, we remember not only those who wore the uniform but also the values they upheld—values that form the foundation of our democracy. Their service has protected our freedoms, including our rights to free speech, peaceful assembly, and equal justice under the law. In the years ahead, let us emulate the veterans we commemorate today, not by adhering to any particular political ideology, but by striving for progress and unity, by moving our country Forward. Today, we extend our deepest gratitude to all veterans and their families. We are inspired by their resilience, and we pledge to support them and to hold close the freedoms they defended. Thank you to all who served and continue to serve our country. With gratitude, Forward Party Veterans and Veteran's Families Committee

name: Save the Children
subject: Sorry to email again, but we need your help
body:
Support children like Salim* before midnight.
|
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | [](https://click.alerts.savethechildren.org/?qs=10c4ff0994f112a55a6c6e99792469a5334e93296573d676d66894e3ec411e989bbcdba128dfa2541b792d18cd2aaafea2066ab59e92679e335533e1a88bbb04)
---

---
With our rapid-response emergency fundraising campaign ending tomorrow at midnight, we're still short of our $100,000 goal - and we're counting on _you_ to help close this gap for children in need.

**[You still have a chance: Rush a $30 gift now, and your generosity will help provide critical support for children facing unimaginable hardships.](https://click.alerts.savethechildren.org/?qs=10c4ff0994f112a51d9a2e03fdeed0875632de5798dbba258eebc796ee3d82b3d1ec39f1fe6ba25537ad2225a3af72a1da56dbfb2f7dbf7d3633f306121f6a71)**
---
[](https://click.alerts.savethechildren.org/?qs=10c4ff0994f112a56274615b692bd4fa2344b5c464649b6471c0286d1f8a03e499c79ed1270f85a734faf6a9820e04b7ed8855d48af3e988b99995ef9e5ffc09)
---
| | | From child refugees fleeing conflict in Ukraine to displaced children in Turkiye and Syria, every dollar is critical to our work to help millions of children surviving so much - like 2-year-old Salim,* who was forced to flee his home due to civil conflict and violence in Syria.

We can't afford to fall short of our goal for children like Salim - but the clock is counting down. Before our rapid-response campaign closes at midnight tomorrow, we're relying on you. **If you 're waiting for the right moment to give, this is it:**

**[Rush a donation of $30 now to help more children around the world grow up healthy, educated and safe.](https://click.alerts.savethechildren.org/?qs=10c4ff0994f112a51d9a2e03fdeed0875632de5798dbba258eebc796ee3d82b3d1ec39f1fe6ba25537ad2225a3af72a1da56dbfb2f7dbf7d3633f306121f6a71)** Your support helps create positive, irreversible change in the lives of children.

Thank you.

Save the Children

name: Update for America
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits...

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z70k3i3oo4edp4cjsqrk4cvgapgchmd88ush6700_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpim1o74cth2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zggq2deg9osl1h31prsu24lpibi44810d7d7mnho_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpim1o74cth2bs) [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ze5d16s3m663in54i9rougn9gndipee5cjf37bgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpim1o74cth2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zrr12ved78upbc8pph01l9ih1b386ffn8uqqj3ro_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpim1o74cth2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z3l2ueikbepk0ec9sfgunir86896rpc5ddhvv988_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cpim1o74cth2bs)
---

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Tired of Being Right
body:
Zach Graumann and I unpack what happened on Election Day. It got a little emotional. Zach said, “Man, I’m tired of being right.” | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=728c174ce4&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
|
---
| Hello, I hope that your weekend was good. This week on the podcast, Zach Graumann and I unpack what happened on Election Day. It got a little emotional. Zach said, “Man, I’m tired of being right.” Coming from most people, that would seem a little bit self-aggrandizing. But Zach hadn’t just opined; Zach moved to New Hampshire in January to help run Dean Phillips’ insurgent campaign against Joe Biden. He put a ton into trying to get the Dems to do the right thing and hold a competitive primary. I was there too. Dean’s campaign was real. He put $5.8 million of his own in, raised another $1.8 million and got 19% of the vote in New Hampshire. For those of you who supported our efforts for Dean, thank you – I hope you also feel good about that support now. Dean was running on the conviction that the Democratic Party was careening toward disaster in November with Joe Biden as the nominee. The Dems fell all over themselves maligning Dean and protecting Biden, who would wind up dropping out less than 6 months later.
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=677889bf37&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| Dean was proven right. “We got 19% in New Hampshire and it could easily have been higher, but the press didn’t want to give Dean any credit,” Zach says. “The Dems were much more concerned with keeping their place in line than listening to what we were saying.” Zach and I had tried. Then, months later after his disastrous June debate performance, Joe Biden pivoted to elevating Kamala Harris instead of allowing a hurried primary. As we all now know, Kamala got swept in the swing states and lost the popular vote, failing to build on Biden’s vote total in any county in the United States. The blame game is on. “From a comms perspective, it was malpractice. What was the Dem message?” Zach comments. “And the messenger couldn’t answer layup questions like ‘What would you do differently than Joe Biden?’” We also discuss Kamala’s failure to go on Joe Rogan, which I described as madness given the size and nature of the audience. Zach has now run two presidential campaigns and written a [book](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=8a64f384ee&e=0f227c2ae3) on one of them – that’s changed his perspective. He’s left it out on the field. Even for me, it’s a lot easier for me to say, “She should have gone on Joe Rogan” because I’ve actually done it myself and believe Joe would have been open-minded and fair. Zach joked that he thought he’d feel better after unpacking the campaign, but it actually fired him up more to talk about it. One frustration that people have is that the Dems will learn very little from this loss. If history is any indication, they’re in for a long road. Meanwhile, Forward is growing quickly as people discover the need for a new approach. Let’s speed up. For my interview with Zach, click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=ff350823d2&e=0f227c2ae3). For my thoughts on what the Democrats should do, which they will ignore, click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=a84e4f4692&e=0f227c2ae3). To join Forward and build the new movement click [here](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=1484a55a77&e=0f227c2ae3) – there are a ton of new people joining right now.
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=e9e4bb7826&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=2b1de99649&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| | | Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&e=0f227c2ae3&c=e774b326f6) or [unsubscribe](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=de65787ec1&t=b&e=0f227c2ae3&c=e774b326f6).
---

Even for me, it’s a lot easier for me to say, “She should have gone on Joe Rogan” because I’ve actually done it myself and believe Joe would have been open-minded and fair. Zach joked that he thought he’d feel better after unpacking the campaign, but it actually fired him up more to talk about it. One frustration that people have is that the Dems will learn very little from this loss. If history is any indication, they’re in for a long road. Meanwhile, Forward is growing quickly as people discover the need for a new approach. Let’s speed up. For my interview with Zach, click . For my thoughts on what the Democrats should do, which they will ignore, click . To join Forward and build the new movement click – there are a ton of new people joining right now. | Andrew Yang Co-Chair, Forward Party | | | Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: MAHA Alliance
subject: MAHA’s Victory—and the Work Ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MAHA Alliance
body:
On election night, President Trump affirmed that RFK Jr. will Make America Healthy Again.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick2.com/l/01JCDZK6148NHH2KFWGREFG9F9_0)
---
| | | | |
---
| Dear Friend, The MAHA Alliance is thrilled to celebrate a pivotal victory: President Donald J. Trump’s election.Together, we have driven a movement that challenges the status quo and prioritizes the health and well-being of our nation. With the support of undecided voters and advocates of Robert F. Kennedy Jr., we rallied behind a shared vision to Make America Healthy Again. Thanks to dedicated efforts in key battleground states, we helped to advance this vision for a healthier, more resilient America. This is more than a victory; it’s a call to action. The MAHA movement has only just begun, and our commitment to meaningful change remains stronger than ever. While President Trump’s victory marks a milestone, it’s the beginning of our continued work to transform America’s health landscape. We’ll stay focused on reducing corporate influence over regulatory agencies, holding pharmaceutical companies accountable, eliminating harmful chemicals from school meals, and tackling the rise in chronic disease. In his election night speech, President Trump affirmed his confidence in Robert F. Kennedy Jr. 's leadership, stating, “Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is going to help Make America Healthy Again.” Together, they’re ushering in a new era of health, integrity, and accountability. Thank you for your faith and support in this journey. **Together, we will Make America Healthy Again. **
---

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Thank you, Veterans!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | | |
---

---

Dear Friends,
On Veterans’ Day, as we honor the millions of Americans who have served our nation in uniform, we are filled with immense gratitude for their bravery and sacrifice. Their selflessness and dedication have safeguarded our Democracy and our freedoms for nearly 250 years. For this, we owe them our deepest thanks.
I just spoke with veterans who are determined to protect veterans’ health care from budget cuts, privatization, and any reduction in the benefits they have earned. Democrats promise to stand alongside our veterans and their caregivers to protect the hard fought lifesaving benefits of the PACT Act. We must commit ourselves to honoring our solemn promise to leave no veteran behind.
We thank our veterans for the countless sacrifices you and your families have made. Your service has not only ensured our safety but has also set a profound example of patriotism and honor. We are eternally grateful for your contributions and the significant impact you have made on our nation.
Thank you, veterans and military families. You are the best of us.
NANCY

Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond.
