Their selflessness and dedication have safeguarded our Democracy and our freedoms for nearly 250 years. For this, we owe them our deepest thanks. I just spoke with veterans who are determined to protect veterans’ health care from budget cuts, privatization, and any reduction in the benefits they have earned. Democrats promise to stand alongside our veterans and their caregivers to protect the hard fought lifesaving benefits of the PACT Act. We must commit ourselves to honoring our solemn promise to leave no veteran behind. We thank our veterans for the countless sacrifices you and your families have made. Your service has not only ensured our safety but has also set a profound example of patriotism and honor. We are eternally grateful for your contributions and the significant impact you have made on our nation. Thank you, veterans and military families. You are the best of us. NANCY Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support? = Nancy Pelosi is counting on you. If you want to stay updated but , let us know If you would like to completely from future emails, you can do so | Nancy Pelosi for Congress 700 13TH STREET NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States | | Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Thank you for supporting this historic campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=3219%2E52803%2EFXq8uq)

| | Peter - I want to thank you so sincerely for backing this historic people-powered campaign. Because winning this election truly could not have been possible without your support.

To all of the volunteers who knocked doors, called, texted voters, opened their homes, donated to our campaign, and hosted events all over the state to get out the vote and hold this seat blue- I promise to make the most of your efforts in the Senate.

And to all the Marylanders I’ve met who are dreaming of a better day, I want you to know this:

**As your Senator, I will make your care my concern, your hope my focus, and your dreams my work in the days and years to come.**

While many of us didn’t get the results we hoped for with the Presidential election- I wanted to take a moment to thank Vice President Kamala Harris and Coach Tim Walz for the campaign they ran.

I’ve known Kamala Harris for nearly 14 years, and I’m so grateful for her incredible leadership and service to this nation. She never gave up on the promise of this great country we are all proud to call home. And neither will we.

So together, we will push forward, Peter, because like Kamala said, we all have the power to make this country a better place where all its citizens can get the fair shake they deserve.

And that’s exactly what I plan to stand up for as Maryland’s next Senator.

The fight for our freedoms, for economic opportunity, for safe communities — that is what we centered our campaign on here in Maryland. For a future in which our children don’t just live on the margins, but live beyond their wildest dreams.

That is the work that lays before us. And we have no time to waste.

I promise to go farther and do better so together, we can move Maryland forward.

This journey has only just begun, Peter.

So let’s get to work!

– Angela Alsobrooks

P.S.
I hope you’ll take a moment to appreciate all the hard-work you put into this campaign. From the beginning, we’ve been working around the clock to win, and I couldn’t have done it without your support. [**_I hope you’ll watch this video and remember that now more than ever, this fight is worth it._**](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/Campaign-Story-AA?source=EM_BS_AAL_241111_EN_Last-Words-TY_A0_na_U3_X1_M1&t=7&akid=3219%2E52803%2EFXq8uq)

# [Biden is still president until January 20th. Tell him to take whatever steps are necessary to stop Trump's attack on the Constitution](https://default.salsalabs.org/T32361210-fd12-450f-880c-bc9805c2cf65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Trump won the election, but Joe Biden is still president until January 20th. And the Supreme Court has (wrongly or rightly) given presidents complete immunity for actions taken as part of their official job. Joe Biden took an oath to "preserve, protect, and defend" the Constitution. Tell him to take whatever steps are necessary to do it. We should not stand by helplessly while Trump marches into fascism. We need to act. [**Biden is still president until January 20th. name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Complete our CRT survey today
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/WnCfv9ZqsOurHSD9qUvpgQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFMqoP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTExMVcDc3BjQgpnLP4xMmdOLSmHUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/WnCfv9ZqsOurHSD9qUvpgQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFMqoP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTExMVcDc3BjQgpnLP4xMmdOLSmHUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/WnCfv9ZqsOurHSD9qUvpgQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFMqoP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTExMVcDc3BjQgpnLP4xMmdOLSmHUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/WnCfv9ZqsOurHSD9qUvpgQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFMqoP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTExMVcDc3BjQgpnLP4xMmdOLSmHUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education. But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT. Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action. Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:~~ When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles. When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift. Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes Imprimis , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles. We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you. Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link: ~~ | | Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

body:
But we need your help.

| | Peter –

We’re in a fight for the future of our country, and every vote matters. **Right now, four of the most critical House races are still too close to call and headed for recounts.** Adam Gray, Derek Tran, Rudy Salas, and Will Rollins are in razor-thin races. [**Chip in to split a donation between their recount and legal funds now →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96931818/511682807/-1385113467?refcode=em_2024.11.10_fr_11A_efc_b1_all_eileen-filler-corn-for-DemRecounts&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NTIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdmZDdmZC00YWEwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uxfG5ausQDxzPIZyLX2DQqSa_WrKw0LYR--YutqAsVw=)

Republicans are pulling out all the stops, fighting to prevent Democrats from winning these seats. Holding as many House seats as possible is our best chance to hold Trump accountable. That’s why we urgently need to fund recount and legal efforts to ensure every vote is counted.

This is about more than just four seats. It’s about securing as much Democratic progress as possible to protect our fundamental rights, stop Trump’s extremist agenda, and protect democracy. But we can’t do it without your support.

[**Every dollar you give will ensure their teams have the resources for legal fees, staff, and recount expenses to defend every vote. Will you chip in $20, $40, $100 or more right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96931819/511682808/-1385113467?refcode=em_2024.11.10_fr_11A_efc_b1_all_eileen-filler-corn-for-DemRecounts&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NTIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdmZDdmZC00YWEwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uxfG5ausQDxzPIZyLX2DQqSa_WrKw0LYR--YutqAsVw=) | **[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96931820/511682809/-1385113467?refcode=em_2024.11.10_fr_11A_efc_b1_all_eileen-filler-corn-for-DemRecounts&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NTIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTdmZDdmZC00YWEwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uxfG5ausQDxzPIZyLX2DQqSa_WrKw0LYR--YutqAsVw=)**

Eileen

name: American Action News
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat To Our Power Grid

# **FOX & Friends Features
Breakthrough Solar
Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans
Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs9tvavplvd9mneprafq64e4o7cn3g56637f8n6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm0or6c3h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztlpj4m23hhdeo77b214beepiqfkdtbe4ck85ajg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm0or6c3h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts
Fear Imminent Threat To
Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** A former CIA Director warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government Is
Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9f2t9s186njl99m80p91qo16ihp1m99ch60chvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm0or6c3h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000
Americans already have it
in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generator In Action!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvm5mpea853nomm8lkdig2ict8rotc7joefifu2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm0or6c3h2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Are
Raving About Their
Solar Generator** **Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" **Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" **Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" **Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" **Angel H.**
"Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." **Sharon P.**
"Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic." [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generator In Action!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8h9440e6er4srqgj3kuh3bjstffkatq3avb9700_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm0or6c3h2bs)

I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" Angel H. "Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." Sharon P. "Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic." American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Letter to Trump
subject: Thank you, President Trump. From: Peter

body:
They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.
Will you sign our thank you note to President Trump?

|
---
| | |
Friend,

They tried to bankrupt him. They tried to imprison him. They even tried to kill him.

But he never stopped fighting for us.

And now, President Donald J. Trump will once again be President of the United States.

We are so grateful for all he has done for us, so House Republicans are sending him a letter to show our thanks.

**[Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=496b10f74be047ecbc640167d34f74fa&_e=tBVLkGTUkR-ka7KyEUW7QmRjQKSZtb8dG2YwYTGmvgNupuFoBf6_YIduyI50_TzGmbMe-J-GNb1sFymn6b67J2W0KCxYSVaDrwzFdMhqQ5ExWjd4V7-og_224uLzKZohfx-9e6ZMU6UR8tbekhS7FG8iUeZraG0w1mM-0mkaELnC_IbsOorCCS8KXqA8VgdaH-GAbHZ5XoK_OeEEHHLTnb_-Ev7PzhqReUTp318ZKMnbzrcxafjWzrrWn9t2XNy3u26xw7yU6ZyhrKlRVwUVhUh2er4dJG5sP3V0te1eynDVmy6K4buLKaPf7lryP1hbJehxSOBoEGDwtXwBwGcCALqhqSkUbC0y2XYHr0SJptc0sD6LeGm0_Hq1bufy2WGUYdgWxVeLDE8bad8-Mi-rs1SSOv-xW7-uIZEhcozq-8U%3D "Will you join us and say THANK YOU PRESIDENT TRUMP, by signing this heartfelt note?")**

name: Lila Rose
subject: Defund Planned Parenthood Petition
body:
Every 80 seconds, a preborn child loses its life at the hands of Planned Parenthood

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=3cf043f2a0e3400abecb8f17db61e326&_t=rWzV2Fu0CgnyFZR0ic9efWyqlYEriKawnjuc76hix_XPzkM1KXltbB8MhHcAmsVUdfjg7mZIb56mLibov6otlVK3Mfoh2EuoPcNHXI6kDYU8Y40v1li7GseebIhvEHQR)_
---
[ ](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=3cf043f2a0e3400abecb8f17db61e326&_e=E1mrB7wjbVOldqJXtwkK406JtZSp118jyHS26L7L5j7H_a0Jua_4LC7HwqRBKyJlLqOi4hy2Hkkwl8lLhZH8uHz-7RFkAAJjReVgF-IU8QN2twqnByaBHE0X4ZitbWZHS_o5vwcvt4fCgLN7gfaNwGtNti94HQ-KvFM_6aloZVVmdicfvmSGqvr679tflkebIiosRREl5XdgYNiTlHj02f2o6gHsRqMdq7JzSTgFxatIHe11aKODtZZul0LCz8LdL0Y_xIwDTcMvyquV_OiaUfJ7mngiNuqTkpxpvvQw2NCRXnw4Nhe_8aiE_kofTJFTdMEe5oxSTt91kHonOJihvpK56bz0ZNTrqpWQPlE-fGFcUXXvu2cwgdK7CJpDG5tAjiwp7tdejVxXgcKTxNyW7g%3D%3D)
#
Dear Friend,

Every 80 seconds, a preborn child loses its life at the hands of Planned Parenthood. This means that by the time you finish reading this email, another innocent life will be gone.

Despite the Supreme Court ruling in the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , Planned Parenthood continues to receive taxpayer funding, effectively subsidizing the intentional killing of preborn children. Since 2000, nearly $10.7 billion of taxpayers' money has funded their life-ending work.

Contrast this with the nearly 3,000 Pro-life pregnancy centers nationwide dedicated to supporting expectant mothers. Planned Parenthood only operates about 600 facilities and primarily offers one service: abortion. Alarmingly, they perform 62 abortions for every prenatal care service they provide, and prenatal care services are down 80% since 2010.

As a pro-life individual, I know you don't want your hard-earned tax dollars to support an organization that prioritizes abortion.

That's why I'm urging you to join us to demand an end to this taxpayer-funded ongoing tragedy. A new Congress and president will be chosen this November, and they need to hear from us _now_ that America does NOT support funding Planned Parenthood.

Make your voice heard. Sign our petition before midnight to demand an end to this grave misuse of your taxes. **[https://www.liveaction.org/defund-planned-parenthood-petition/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=3cf043f2a0e3400abecb8f17db61e326&_e=E1mrB7wjbVOldqJXtwkK406JtZSp118jyHS26L7L5j7H_a0Jua_4LC7HwqRBKyJlLqOi4hy2Hkkwl8lLhZH8uHz-7RFkAAJjReVgF-IU8QN2twqnByaBHE0X4ZitbWZHS_o5vwcvt4fCgLN7gfaNwGtNti94HQ-KvFM_6aloZVVmdicfvmSGqvr679tflkebIiosRREl5XdgYNiTlHj02f2o6gHsRqMdq7JzSTgFxasZSSbfk1lyWsYQKjA7T2T6zLtzrHnPQZOgvu2qm-1l5_Rbdc1pcJ0Zm43eY-9M9t7HbEAZn_ZyefrG-MMnvUfeEU02Lf4c8LqqOxUxYKrkthyXFMta7ObpXuB-cXYWolhY9X_4pTQuEp_ohoLnF4vrsoQaRJ8Whp6MrFUnbRbt0Q%3D%3D)**

Thank you for standing with us for the protection of future generations!

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=3cf043f2a0e3400abecb8f17db61e326&_e=E1mrB7wjbVOldqJXtwkK406JtZSp118jyHS26L7L5j7H_a0Jua_4LC7HwqRBKyJlLqOi4hy2Hkkwl8lLhZH8uHz-7RFkAAJjReVgF-IU8QN2twqnByaBHE0X4ZitbWZHS_o5vwcvt4fCgLN7gfaNwGtNti94HQ-KvFM_6aloZVVmdicfvmSGqvr679tflkebIiosRREl5XdgYNiTlHj02f2o6gHsRqMdq7JzSTgFxatoN1cqFlYBXQCgyUrTaVuj0T1nGFSWNyJWJD1ZG18q_cfzLAJ_PYvR-dPsIvrMvS6lJE7vU71VXT1g3h-cPE6R-OADdCnN8hrdhkxuwM4jBirMWZwpblkJ0-B8jICG76s7LJRM5gAOyMoWDVsqiD51ZL7NenZ6uqVr-HejASla_A%3D%3D)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Join thousands in the fight to protect life
body:
As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=d743b259b7a24111b2d83639bcd80aff&_t=_FWF94jgcYqlG_L7EA2BXpIa1ZsQwcOt3tTN2DNK8S-o6ztOacGXxHh9X4RXbVrMtnMN0v3AOnsUnYVIzn1K0fjtMZLgiq7ERXsSXFfP2dmcNjxmo95BYGJQSgvzeGza)_

---
| | | [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=d743b259b7a24111b2d83639bcd80aff&_e=J4Pw-ggvMlkiajfcCPrIv2Z3e6fQ23CFz1eh_rKoGRnmFlV6LXyH_g3LRjqq8QOoejCSQFACWlQmONwNLvMFfbBJjgs2_pCeLZ201SGRJtu7ONQvD_jUj1mFhtPbV05jvWb1UYHtfxdZGhUCkox1dRadu3_augFKcc1f8iHc_8xk90XhSp7G6r0h4tT49WloMD3THp2l9SMw8RkebBgqeX5Nfh7IjdlUeqH7MYLHpe5qoIOvDm_jTfbFWT9_m7mk4zm-TUkljF6iM6CI86AMqyrHr4Jzd7BRmNIAEsBjQG0wua2V2Nq9bYsNKI7_PDihdkT3Q1lsGcRRUBVPleNTUUky58JiNw_w1PsGF3SkDgyXH9v98jHJt1BxvQdRvqm8a0BzwLToZKCZqLrQYuzbTojMJWY34w1QD-CpulFpESA%3D)
---
| Hi Friend,

This is Dr. Ben Carson--I'm writing to you personally because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish life and want to protect the unborn. **And today I need your help.**

Right now, the Left is working around the clock to undermine the Supreme Court's decision while mobilizing millions of pro-choice democrats and major media outlets to codify on-demand abortion at taxpayers' expense. [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=d743b259b7a24111b2d83639bcd80aff&_e=J4Pw-ggvMlkiajfcCPrIv2Z3e6fQ23CFz1eh_rKoGRnmFlV6LXyH_g3LRjqq8QOoejCSQFACWlQmONwNLvMFfbBJjgs2_pCeLZ201SGRJtu7ONQvD_jUj1mFhtPbV05jvWb1UYHtfxdZGhUCkox1dRadu3_augFKcc1f8iHc_8xk90XhSp7G6r0h4tT49WloMD3THp2l9SMw8RkebBgqeX5Nfh7IjdlUeqH7MYLHpe5qoIOvDm_jTfbFWT9_m7mk4zm-TUkljF6iM6CI86AMq8fyE3fskVKHqg7Hvz6ML4AfayQmonyFd7rZrp_Yr_9rO5lNE8C2Dwnx31RBLxo-Zsusp5sL2drdUAe5WXb_s3-13xctvJ_u5SBqmlsNBzXTD3gxitvkBDIaGGTmWEMd9r0OLPyxiNixzgOXN2-Szcs%3D) **We cannot allow the anti-life movement to obscure the fact that a majority of Americans (regardless of how they vote) do NOT agree that abortion should be unrestricted.**

I will do everything in my power to defend every American life and stop the spread of the Left's anti-life ideology. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: What to expect during the second Trump presidency
body:
This election is going to come down to a handful of votes in a handful of states. Every vote matters.

And I am not just talking about the presidential race. I am talking about control of the House and Senate. But that is not anything you don't already know.

Some of you have already voted, and that is terrific.

For those of you who haven't, just give yourself the peace of mind today to see that you are registered, how and where to vote early if that's available to you, or where you're supposed to vote or ballot drop-off locations.

Do me a favor and just visit IWillVote.com today. Take 30 seconds, review your information and let's win this election.

The outcome of this election is going to come down to turning out the Democratic voters or the ones who dislike Trump but don't cast their ballot in every election. You know who they are in your life. Share the link with them as well.

Thanks,

Gavin Newsom

---------------

i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸

Before you go, we are humbly asking you to support Gavin Newsom's Campaign for Democracy with a contribution. If you believe Democrats need to go on offense, even in Red States, we're asking you to donate $20 to help Gavin Newsom get it done.

If you care about abortion access, voting rights, and the future of our democracy, please take a minute to donate today. We’ll put your contribution to work taking the fight to red state authoritarian leaders.

CONTRIBUTE: https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4021?akid=2284%2E4767699%2E5tUwGA

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.gavinnewsom.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2284%2E4767699%2E5tUwGA

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
In case you missed it

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b15b238f8ac8456e9756fd2f672fa2bb&_e=-mQIxgC_9tLhyUZNiEVVT2o38uzwOwu2es7tsincSoiKsMLvUolHz6Ny8x5-JFRaI20VL-RAtGVti9cysGUm64JA6ktStgRg4nurWLSy55W3sgnp2_v9nlfodqressRYbKiF5-JxxwSuaLocwAW1tgDAh19MqgoXTJA4H6RRMP6pEFJlNLxHF1jrRELvZvmk9O3U5pj_yTmx1v5KqAxV-7kYC7E9EE2uWN95kmuy0XCrwG2sq_ZIYhms6Xjf1z1cXluIH-VFB0gNOMNIs-tCgyD4vM26DkLZ8FYu3QRPKUE0wPqXVWlvQKEOXh5dbArz-TlYE3j1oceY2cMsLQ4tAeaTOeJNs3pLLr4dd4X_lu6xBar5__R8kgQ2mJE86Z9Uaf7sQg_IEQjyhPjFdunfT7LnAbaHQCISa58qo8bcfq8Q03ktgXlMMVl6EMuCne_a)

Friend,

In case you missed it, here's the bottom line up front.

I joined Dana Perino and Bill Hemmer on _America 's Newsroom_ to discuss my big win in the Pennsylvania senate race.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b15b238f8ac8456e9756fd2f672fa2bb&_e=-mQIxgC_9tLhyUZNiEVVT2o38uzwOwu2es7tsincSoiKsMLvUolHz6Ny8x5-JFRaI20VL-RAtGVti9cysGUm64JA6ktStgRg4nurWLSy55W3sgnp2_v9nlfodqressRYbKiF5-JxxwSuaLocwAW1tgDAh19MqgoXTJA4H6RRMP6pEFJlNLxHF1jrRELvZvmk9O3U5pj_yTmx1v5KqAxV-7kYC7E9EE2uWN95kmuy0XCrwG2sq_ZIYhms6Xjf1z1cXluIH-VFB0gNOMNIs-tCgzB1FwnIyyRjCp_pU3tQ0uoeWHobH-nlkxFJOUXlCixu8rNtepC_8LyZM5aIA5vkwQ9i1cSmX0hQIOYjg2OPTvxIZJFff_nm_l-P4QjCUdVWaxR0waaL1AAeZg2LqOsGfxkae4WMr-zKix5RFCDS25TCe5oKZMaoT2WK8GJYmLUN)

**[WATCH DAVE ON _AMERICA 'S NEWSROOM_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b15b238f8ac8456e9756fd2f672fa2bb&_e=-mQIxgC_9tLhyUZNiEVVT2o38uzwOwu2es7tsincSoiKsMLvUolHz6Ny8x5-JFRaI20VL-RAtGVti9cysGUm64JA6ktStgRg4nurWLSy55W3sgnp2_v9nlfodqressRYbKiF5-JxxwSuaLocwAW1tgDAh19MqgoXTJA4H6RRMP6pEFJlNLxHF1jrRELvZvmk9O3U5pj_yTmx1v5KqAxV-7kYC7E9EE2uWN95kmuy0XCrwG2sq_ZIYhms6Xjf1z1cXluIH-VFB0gNOMNIs-tCg0JsenvjtJjZ7TmUqMxu7JV6TsPYWZRGo0Cq1ZCiNTHjxN89MiOW6ir2DFpZ42oAI4z-9uUxzfat_eDgpnlq3_oZr4tPhiQkqLkhUtJHtD0KW2W-hoJS-jSqnGLZZv5lItv1bm50kPom5fjPi4OyuVMI3g-hhOh2CCQt8oCgKNa_)**

Here's what I shared with Dana and Bill.

✔ **Pennsylvanians voted for CHANGE.** They don't want incremental change. They want significant change, and that's what I intend to do when I get to Washington.

✔ **Authenticity.** People want leaders who do what they say they will do. And if they make a mistake, they own it. I've said it many times over the course of the campaign; I live by the West Point cadet motto: _Duty, Honor, Country. _

✔ **The election is over, and I 'm leading by over 32,000 votes.** But that hasn't stopped my opponent Bob Casey and the national Democrat machine from organizing and fundraising to try and force a recount. Pennsylvania law dictates an automatic recount if the margin is less than .5%. I'm currently leading by EXACTLY .5%, and we expect my opponent to try and force a recount.

But we're following the lead of President Trump. We are going to **FIGHT! FIGHT! FIGHT! **

**[While votes continue to be counted, I'm asking for you to chip in today to help us keep up our fight.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b15b238f8ac8456e9756fd2f672fa2bb&_e=-mQIxgC_9tLhyUZNiEVVT2o38uzwOwu2es7tsincSoiKsMLvUolHz6Ny8x5-JFRaI20VL-RAtGVti9cysGUm64JA6ktStgRg4nurWLSy55W3sgnp2_v9nlfodqressRYbKiF5-JxxwSuaLocwAW1tgDAh19MqgoXTJA4H6RRMP6pEFJlNLxHF1jrRELvZvmk9O3U5pj_yTmx1v5KqAxV-7kYC7E9EE2uWN95kmuy0XCrwG2sq_ZIYhms6Xjf1z1cXluIH-VFB0gNOMNIs-tCg1yN8m7tFXhqPxK4dRfhIBErCjHyJ7dwmz4hiockHcWItK2zjA27-sarxo8HWXqFDiylkn3RmoM3dp4iAYmnUdabQJTUiNxtP6rICuncY9uTStoYJhvqaAu24tTldWFpcq_BcSk0613uXqx1aEDU3-cOoNWF8ozmTA7khKnQqNOx)**

_If you are not in a position to give right now, please don 't. I mean it. _

But if you are able to give, [I'm humbly asking you to chip in any amount to help us fund whatever the Democrats will throw at us in the coming days.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b15b238f8ac8456e9756fd2f672fa2bb&_e=-mQIxgC_9tLhyUZNiEVVT2o38uzwOwu2es7tsincSoiKsMLvUolHz6Ny8x5-JFRaI20VL-RAtGVti9cysGUm64JA6ktStgRg4nurWLSy55W3sgnp2_v9nlfodqressRYbKiF5-JxxwSuaLocwAW1tgDAh19MqgoXTJA4H6RRMP6pEFJlNLxHF1jrRELvZvmk9O3U5pj_yTmx1v5KqAxV-7kYC7E9EE2uWN95kmuy0XCrwG2sq_ZIYhms6Xjf1z1cXluIH-VFB0gNOMNIs-tCg0BwtRA_6W1NwjysoFtoNf6mmbJqUIiNNa2Xt7bR8SMfU76IE4PuMMY4zpaaOkcXh5wReXDAUmm40kukfzXRaFUu-WTyuGIcdFOSmzV5t8bALo4StDnUngTP3QIAG_9J2wro_Ushv1HCUihr6fMNDjeQGzs2kC2HAkuU49TK3pSr)

Thank you for all of your support. We couldn't have done this without you! I know how to restore strong leadership in our country because I've done it before. And I'll do it as your next Senator.

Thanks again,
_Dave McCormick_

name: Amy Carnevale
subject: Historic Election Night for Massachusetts Republicans
body:
| | | | |
---
| [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001O_3CTk2BgDBJOQWRCpMtyBETcthnDDKG4pxXFYaDKFBglleNz6uFRuIasSXBsgo2Cue6bDzrr1BNII9Lt8Upsz5TcrK76D95MB34uQbYtL8bR-WUFjiVvkk0TlqTMDauW1_5SM4hVCCTQmu8mCjGow==&c=Rj76r0bxcVlXCAoluj3qhchMqJf67EBBMIoqzkO0o7b3n49MnSxbsw==&ch=jP5oUr5kgAwxv9h2KQx-VQ5Irzcff6OkBsSlS1uRjOAeToCxTPl_XQ==)
---
| Historic Election Night for Massachusetts Republicans
---
---
| My Fellow Republicans,
Before diving into the election update, I want to wish you all a meaningful Veterans Day. To all veterans reading this message, the MassGOP extends our heartfelt gratitude for your service. Today, let us each take a moment to honor our veterans by reaching out within our communities to personally thank them for their service and sacrifice.
The 2024 election cycle will be remembered as a pivotal moment in Massachusetts Republican Party history. On election night, we continued our forward momentum--flipping multiple seats from blue to red and successfully defending every seat held by our incumbents. For the first time since 1984, the Republican Party made history by defending all incumbents seeking reelection and winning new victories across the state during a Presidential election year. These gains build on our 2023 special election State Senate seat pick up last year.
On November 5th, we flipped three additional key seats. Representative-elect Justin Thurber ousted a long-serving incumbent who also held the position of Speaker pro tempore. In the 6th Plymouth District, Representative-elect Ken Sweezey captured a seat long held by Democrats. And Senator-elect Kelly Dooner triumphed in the 3rd Bristol and Plymouth District, taking a seat previously held by Democratic supermajority favorite, Marc Pacheco.
Additionally, we celebrated two new Republican victories: Representative-elect John Gaskey in the 2nd Plymouth District and Michael Chaisson in the 1st Bristol District.
Securing new seats while protecting our Republican incumbents is no small feat; history proves how challenging it can be. Yet this election, we succeeded.
First and foremost, running for elective office as a Republican in Massachusetts is not for the faint of heart. I want to thank our candidates, win or lose, for sacrificing their time and energy to give voters a choice at the ballot box. And thank you to our grassroots supporters--your support was essential to our candidates' success!
These victories were a team effort, with National Committeeman Brad Wyatt playing a crucial role working with our candidates on data operations. For the first time in party history we collaborated with the Secretary of State's office to access early voting data and targeted those voters through a robust digital and mail strategy, expanding our reach and impact.
I also want to extend gratitude to Minority Leaders Senator Bruce Tarr and Brad Jones for their invaluable support of our candidates across Massachusetts. Their financial backing and professional guidance were instrumental in helping our incumbents and newly elected legislators cross the finish line.
Though John Deaton did not secure the U.S. Senate seat to advance a more common sense agenda for Bay Staters, his campaign underscored our momentum, outperforming previous GOP candidates by 4% and capturing over 40% of the vote. We intend to capitalize on this momentum in 2026.
The MassGOP played a pivotal role in supporting President-Elect Donald Trump's campaign, opening two field offices and rallying a grassroots movement that made Massachusetts a national leader in voter outreach. Under the leadership of National Committeewoman Janet Fogarty and Massachusetts Trump Campaign Chairman, Sheriff Tom Hodgson, Massachusetts ranked 4th nationwide in phone banking for President-Elect Trump. Our dedicated volunteers sent 10,000 handwritten postcards to Michigan and traveled to New Hampshire and Pennsylvania to doorknock, mobilizing voters with a strong commitment to our shared values. National Committeewoman Janet Fogarty also played a pivotal role in Massachusetts' early voting efforts, by hosting workshops for grassroots activists, and encouraging residents to vote early in support of President-Elect Trump.
Our efforts clearly paid off both nationally and here at home, as support for President-Elect Trump surged across Massachusetts. He carried 87 of the state's 351 cities and towns--33 of which previously backed President Biden in 2020--up from 58 municipalities in 2016. Republican support increased across nearly every county, with President-Elect Trump's strongest showings in Hampden, Worcester, and Bristol counties.
We are proud of this election cycle's outcomes and deeply grateful for your unwavering support and advocacy for our shared values. In the coming weeks, we look forward to presenting a more comprehensive analysis of the results.
To Victory, Amy Carnevale Massachusetts Republican Party Chair

---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Historic Election Night for Massachusetts Republicans | My Fellow Republicans, Before diving into the election update, I want to wish you all a meaningful Veterans Day. To all veterans reading this message, the MassGOP extends our heartfelt gratitude for your service. Today, let us each take a moment to honor our veterans by reaching out within our communities to personally thank them for their service and sacrifice. The 2024 election cycle will be remembered as a pivotal moment in Massachusetts Republican Party history. On election night, we continued our forward momentum--flipping multiple seats from blue to red and successfully defending every seat held by our incumbents. For the first time since 1984, the Republican Party made history by defending all incumbents seeking reelection and winning new victories across the state during a Presidential election year. These gains build on our 2023 special election State Senate seat pick up last year. On November 5th, we flipped three additional key seats. Representative-elect Justin Thurber ousted a long-serving incumbent who also held the position of Speaker pro tempore. In the 6th Plymouth District, Representative-elect Ken Sweezey captured a seat long held by Democrats. And Senator-elect Kelly Dooner triumphed in the 3rd Bristol and Plymouth District, taking a seat previously held by Democratic supermajority favorite, Marc Pacheco. Additionally, we celebrated two new Republican victories: Representative-elect John Gaskey in the 2nd Plymouth District and Michael Chaisson in the 1st Bristol District. Securing new seats while protecting our Republican incumbents is no small feat; history proves how challenging it can be. Yet this election, we succeeded. First and foremost, running for elective office as a Republican in Massachusetts is not for the faint of heart. I want to thank our candidates, win or lose, for sacrificing their time and energy to give voters a choice at the ballot box. And thank you to our grassroots supporters--your support was essential to our candidates' success! These victories were a team effort, with National Committeeman Brad Wyatt playing a crucial role working with our candidates on data operations. For the first time in party history we collaborated with the Secretary of State's office to access early voting data and targeted those voters through a robust digital and mail strategy, expanding our reach and impact. I also want to extend gratitude to Minority Leaders Senator Bruce Tarr and Brad Jones for their invaluable support of our candidates across Massachusetts. Their financial backing and professional guidance were instrumental in helping our incumbents and newly elected legislators cross the finish line. Though John Deaton did not secure the U.S. Senate seat to advance a more common sense agenda for Bay Staters, his campaign underscored our momentum, outperforming previous GOP candidates by 4% and capturing over 40% of the vote. We intend to capitalize on this momentum in 2026. The MassGOP played a pivotal role in supporting President-Elect Donald Trump's campaign, opening two field offices and rallying a grassroots movement that made Massachusetts a national leader in voter outreach. Under the leadership of National Committeewoman Janet Fogarty and Massachusetts Trump Campaign Chairman, Sheriff Tom Hodgson, Massachusetts ranked 4th nationwide in phone banking for President-Elect Trump. Our dedicated volunteers sent 10,000 handwritten postcards to Michigan and traveled to New Hampshire and Pennsylvania to doorknock, mobilizing voters with a strong commitment to our shared values. National Committeewoman Janet Fogarty also played a pivotal role in Massachusetts' early voting efforts, by hosting workshops for grassroots activists, and encouraging residents to vote early in support of President-Elect Trump. Our efforts clearly paid off both nationally and here at home, as support for President-Elect Trump surged across Massachusetts. He carried 87 of the state's 351 cities and towns--33 of which previously backed President Biden in 2020--up from 58 municipalities in 2016. Republican support increased across nearly every county, with President-Elect Trump's strongest showings in Hampden, Worcester, and Bristol counties. name: Truth to Power
subject: We’re not going to BS you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39287%2E3422442%2EoNHDZp)
Derek,
You already know that Katie doesn’t believe in sending emails that attempt to scare folks into making a contribution.
But, we won’t BS you either—with Trump winning the Presidency, Republicans winning the Senate, and the House still up for grabs, we are going to have to fight back with everything we’ve got to protect our rights, our planet, and our democracy.
Katie knows what it means to fight:
When she ran for Congress in 2018 and flipped a Red district to Blue, it was during Trump’s first presidency. She ran for Congress to fight for Californians against Trump, his sycophants, and their corruption.
Katie will always stand by her neighbors. We are going to meet this moment with the gravity it deserves, and our work starts _right now._
**[Will you donate $5 right now to help Katie and Truth to Power as we build a movement to stand up to Trump?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241111?refcode=em20241111-39287&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39287_3422442_oNHDZp&akid=39287%2E3422442%2EoNHDZp)**

Thank you for your support,
Truth to Power

name: Edward Byers, Medal of Honor Recipient and Ret. Navy SEAL Master Chief
subject: Fighting for America’s Survival
body:
I am unapologetically American and have a profound love and pride for our Country.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8p5gs1p5o56bm9ct2gnpk4u5o28tsbh7oj9c3jo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm4ob4c9h2bs)
Friend,

I am unapologetically American and have a profound love and pride for our Country. For more than two decades, I swore an oath as a Corpsman and SEAL within the Navy to protect the United States of America from all enemies, foreign and domestic.

This is why I am deeply disturbed by what I see happening in our country today - the rapid deterioration of our hard-fought-for way of life and the weaponization of our justice system against those who believe in law and order.

**Mark my words:** The United States of America will only survive if we unite as Americans and root out the destructive and evil forces who want to destroy all God has blessed us with.

The freedom we have been granted as Americans is unlike any place else in the world. We still have economic and civil opportunities because of our liberty. However, that freedom is not guaranteed.

If America continues to fall prey to abuse and we lose our liberties, I am confident that no other country will take up the mantle of defending inalienable rights for all people.

We have a severe problem when our rule of law is perverted to punish political enemies. It’s happening in our courts. And it’s even happening within the administrative state, colloquially known as the Deep State.

When I served to defend Americans’ lives in Afghanistan, Iraq, Africa, and Yemen, I protected all Americans. Not just Americans, I agreed with politically.

_Likewise, our justice system and our government agents must serve all Americans without regard to their politics_.

No one is above the law.

My dear friend Kash Patel created the Kash Foundation. Their mission is to support educational and legal efforts to facilitate government transparency and create a healthier relationship between the US federal government and American citizens.

[I am personally asking for you to support the Kash Foundation and help us restore trust in our institutions by exposing bad actors. Can you donate $10, $35, $50, $250, or any amount today? Click here to give >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0h5m8bbr8lmgbuhsspl8tu2d155dkk8kph6ug88_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm4ob4c9h2bs) The Kash Foundation works in three main areas:
* Legal funds to support whistleblowers within the federal government and media accountability efforts
* Education of the public in areas the mainstream media refuses to cover
* Veteran and law enforcement financial support

Through their program, they have helped FBI whistleblowers come forward to expose corruption — such as Kyle Seraphin, Steve Friend, Garrett O’Boyle, and Marcus Allen.

Recently, the Kash Foundation has reached a milestone of distributing half a million dollars to scores of Americans needing assistance. Many of these grants were given out to veterans.

[Please join me in supporting Kash Foundation today. My goal is to help raise $35,000 online in the next 48 hours. Chip in any amount you can generously spare; even $10 goes a long way. Select an amount below to give:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4smv5bfmhh5qk6rp01m9m7vcb26ifrgahe18dao_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm4ob4c9h2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z99p7f0b0vngjvdafq9ji0rulkb6v2esdt6af9do_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm4ob4c9h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo4qkn8upkbjgtmc9g0fnui12190okqv2ork96h0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm4ob4c9h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1rc625g4i69ceehgb25isml1e820vstas8qr49g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm4ob4c9h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z42bovqkasvbtfa0aq6k5nhu61159afk0nrfkgh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm4ob4c9h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zif60umuq6cantd0i9sarne81h5u0pglrotq1qv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm4ob4c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeatd226hnarqsfcom6vtr6eki6128m3bclgd8a0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm4ob4c9h2bs)

[Donate Other](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl7s0skipa72hnq2ojsh0bo11ufl08nm83bgtgno_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm4ob4c9h2bs)
It has been an honor to have been friends with Kash for over a decade now, and I hope you can join me to serve their mission. Now more than ever, our nation needs trust in its institutions, which will only happen by exposing and rooting out bad actors.

Thank you,

Edward Byers
Medal of Honor Recipient and Master Chief Special Warfare Operator (SEAL) USN Ret.

name: THANK YOU!
subject: With your help, we SAVED America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Now, it’s time to look forward to 2025

**[THANK YOU!](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=777bde552c4d4c88a1fa3899063d3c87&_e=aVqHWRncZ_r5NUGhDBz9BChLdeEKzj1GqcgMcEzA7B8YQdoOqHSjJXczV1VK2lWaKdXfPAcr7Ri_ngJ9rHk2IqgMjfE7XSH_eZHtbnvx7VhTjK1Ghvg1i5O8_FYbt_iTMEnY39o4YHK-txfWvWc3zxrMw0oqJ2rjoA0OcNgxaBiVKMFkIWRWAOvX3TFY_cbt5GrKMnaDhWN_-85VUZOwwfMv8yZop6QTwPhRSFqIq5Ekt560HrGQdGEVhxdgZUkTt7xv_38WNi-LjFiKHAzqM_Z2l5NIUUGY4vXnXigMaLFoaQvuSauV5oV-3DOrW1nOsNgDXd_4fUgqEKuEK6u-jRVYeEV_dQ7bqm7_36yY-eyZtdEP3oNzWx_IM44fVdkSOQwGwD48q04lP2zJ25xZcICuYCrh8LYBUpP-qx2XbKzmf5u7ShlGWgOWJHce38w6SdpYEsWJ11HSZp-pGSn067T2JfF9O3yG0WX829eAPAo%3D)**

With your help, we SAVED America.

Now, it's time to look forward to 2025. We plan to hit the ground running in January and we need YOU to help us out.

Your political prowess allowed us to retake the Senate, which is why we are reaching out again to get your thoughts on our 2025 priorities.

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Honoring our veterans today…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
...tomorrow, and every day |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96934450/511692059/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGE4ZWI3Yi00ZmEwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FARL5lMfdenxCKcWwKRqd87c9y4tw2Ompj409fm-AFs=&emci=bfc13d60-399d-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=f4a8eb7b-4fa0-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=7878003)
Friends, Today, let’s take a moment to recognize and thank the veterans who’ve stood up for our nation. Their honorable sacrifice represents America’s best values — a commitment to a greater cause and a belief in democracy. One day is simply not enough to thank our men and women for stepping up in times of need and putting our country over themselves. Each Veterans Day reminds us of the great strength, courage, and commitment our service members display — both overseas and at home. They’ve done their part, and now it’s on us to give them the dignity and respect they deserve. I am forever grateful for the sacrifices our veterans have made for our country. To those who’ve served and their families, thank you. Today, we honor you, and every day, we stand behind you. — Eric
|

| | Dear Fellow American,

**I 'm excited to let you know about our free documentary course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."**

Today, Marxism goes by different names to make itself seem less dangerous. I'm sure you've heard of "critical race theory," "gender theory," or even "decolonization."

I know you're not fooled by these disguises.

Without a doubt, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" will be one of our most important courses **because the source of these dangerous ideologies is still Karl Marx.**

It's still the same Marxism that works to destroy your property and your country.

It's still the same Marxism that seeks to abolish your family and your God.

And it's still the same Marxism that leads to famines, show trials, gulags, and other atrocities.

The truth is, there's nothing fundamentally _new_ about this "new" Marxism, except for one crucial fact...

**... it's more popular with our youth than ever before. **

That's why I invite you to gain a deeper understanding of the history of Marxism as well as the threat it poses to our liberty.

[**You can do that by registering for "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism" today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=02aa0143eaf6486dad739e9eef030406&_e=U-_L74VFQk795wu_Kvk-SVGz8S2CWwCZQj4tLAPdFQjhxdodaOtEle9xXVEV_5KrGtMauNvmPFbXns6ra4_cXSG53pxd4bCgAje-NoxqMpXTC1dlEOBeR-NXvzdrNgg1yDvnvVUpOCjW1vPF5ZB3NvQnPtvHUcAtLc2H6aBqK0bnof2eaVcE6O31fNs-MtTtx2zqRsT7Iw21xPlaegdnNQliVOybftGQSGzbvNOo6g0M-T6jczstyAveowJevuPE_9r-Afuq2VLd8GHQMvtXf9Z9ZjiCJlUx9tC_m4Ri-KjyBVGUmOXyOqgH6fII_1AZObwUmxK4IKDgUDFKCKNwgyu7FGqegMn8ZV1Bxd2ktEmxHa-huxbJ11sW7l_sAKERtKeUm4qCnpxuuJQ526z6B8WLXKCZHA0zEq8ifFB7nt8%3D)

Or you can send this to a friend!

**Will you join us by registering for this free online course?** You can click on the secure link below to register and get access today:

Most colleges and universities work to indoctrinate young people with Marxism.

That's why taking this course and making it available to as many Americans as possible will be one of the most important ways you will defend liberty in America.

You're one of the reasons why we can defend liberty by producing and promoting courses like "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--so thank you so much for all you do.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Will Rollins
subject: Update: CA-41 is too early to call.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend,

The race for California's 41st Congressional District is still too early to call.

We now need to fund an intensive ballot curing program to ensure that any voters with rejected ballots have an opportunity to correct their ballots and make their voice heard. **It could be the difference between winning and losing this election.**

[**We've set up a critical new account to cover expenses towards ballot curing and other voter protection activities. Can you help us fill our war chest by splitting a donation of $10 or more between the Voter Protection Project and our campaign?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85017?t=6&akid=18013%2E878179%2EUz21Kh) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Will Rollins - Recount Fund and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85018?t=7&akid=18013%2E878179%2EUz21Kh)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85019?t=8&akid=18013%2E878179%2EUz21Kh)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85020?t=9&akid=18013%2E878179%2EUz21Kh)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85021?t=10&akid=18013%2E878179%2EUz21Kh)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85017?t=11&akid=18013%2E878179%2EUz21Kh)
I'd like to extend a huge thank you to everyone who brought us to this point. I know many of us are disappointed in the outcome at the presidential and senate levels, but I want you to know how proud I am to have the incredible support of this grassroots team.

**We still have a shot to flip this longtime Republican stronghold and retake the House.**

[**This isn’t over. Please split a donation of $10 or more between the Voter Protection Project and our campaign towards our voter protection activities. In a race this close, everything counts.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85017?t=12&akid=18013%2E878179%2EUz21Kh)

Thanks for your support and patience,

Will
[DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85017?t=13&akid=18013%2E878179%2EUz21Kh)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18013%2E878179%2EUz21Kh). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18013%2E878179%2EUz21Kh).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18013%2E878179%2EUz21Kh) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=18013%2E878179%2EUz21Kh). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18013%2E878179%2EUz21Kh)
---

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: Share your thoughts on CRT and its influence
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acb85f02db854b1889fad296aea2c3c0&_e=5yrtjiyKCW1u5uJYit98DZ22z4Kbpfeb7VEMRkpTm3GJvoNfE-1q-wJ_8TFxiR_GqvYniuHRga9bEsP5PU_xucfX24ZBzIoh7sUREmDBenTgA1EsSVRPr4jqnav4hlZSRk4Zb-YR3ysmf0kwl5_mHK62vKwG64eg5G4dn-axI1e9Fky7cwuP98c4N4eMyIbDdQ5S176r3oMr6VAPTGLAq2_uOq-qVap7uIIKWE4cNtV0QlJnMdxsf3W2oH9pp82d473fpUsUK6thXPWueFrifgjnuG2nw4swaDrd0R2vIpSQ-jUGjcPyOulkTpQjRhXUYz7zbmu3qfz2hPdCNCkgCMEZ5gLUUz5WxDC9kg1t_251SVYfwGXCC-lNnoPM8fba)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acb85f02db854b1889fad296aea2c3c0&_e=5yrtjiyKCW1u5uJYit98DZ22z4Kbpfeb7VEMRkpTm3GJvoNfE-1q-wJ_8TFxiR_GqvYniuHRga9bEsP5PU_xucfX24ZBzIoh7sUREmDBenTgA1EsSVRPr4jqnav4hlZSRk4Zb-YR3ysmf0kwl5_mHK62vKwG64eg5G4dn-axI1e9Fky7cwuP98c4N4eMyIbDdQ5S176r3oMr6VAPTGLAq2_uOq-qVap7uIIKWE4cNtVDoC1882wtTKpGHe3G5yUiZnM81zYJKl490BUcp8KHbQxy-ud0E6BjIyZf5-fgF_3lrPNfMDD1namIWNCz8e3w3FpcpSDCOvQbeB5uGkgpXdAZCBa7G97Sw33g9quy4C-zuz951JrlHG4JallIS46U)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acb85f02db854b1889fad296aea2c3c0&_e=5yrtjiyKCW1u5uJYit98DZ22z4Kbpfeb7VEMRkpTm3GJvoNfE-1q-wJ_8TFxiR_GqvYniuHRga9bEsP5PU_xucfX24ZBzIoh7sUREmDBenTgA1EsSVRPr4jqnav4hlZSRk4Zb-YR3ysmf0kwl5_mHK62vKwG64eg5G4dn-axI1e9Fky7cwuP98c4N4eMyIbDdQ5S176r3oMr6VAPTGLAq2_uOq-qVap7uIIKWE4cNtUud29UkRMrfwDXEAI4tiUt7Ifmr_9PpPbz2ERIp9HPVoIJQCgtf__lLc76FlPuQVmrFitnqaHpIuAZahh03hsKiQZ6X8nsxW3zDfEwDB_iuQLYUd55GJjrCVU2kehMwtg-GXMQGHC0q4g9-rsyizOh)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acb85f02db854b1889fad296aea2c3c0&_e=5yrtjiyKCW1u5uJYit98DZ22z4Kbpfeb7VEMRkpTm3GJvoNfE-1q-wJ_8TFxiR_GqvYniuHRga9bEsP5PU_xucfX24ZBzIoh7sUREmDBenTgA1EsSVRPr4jqnav4hlZSRk4Zb-YR3ysmf0kwl5_mHK62vKwG64eg5G4dn-axI1e9Fky7cwuP98c4N4eMyIbDdQ5S176r3oMr6VAPTGLAq2_uOq-qVap7uIIKWE4cNtVC6icW_U2YmJf5JfyjGR1DYFunoMrARM9d7_JnmOTlcxk1X5TpYlZdRSFQhCL2ORzqk7WvWpyQmaZ7aRDulzz27rvqj-fzGDwy6T4NVqCDYBVvg0N3NAqVaekVPRpPVsQGHTaeFR-9-IyIszO_kUFd)
---

body:
We need to secure every possible vote

|

| | | _Friend, there are**still seats in California that are too close to call!**_

Best Week To Date | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e89c110c69f3/thank-you-to-our-brave-veterans?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | |
---
| Good Morning,
Today, we honor all the brave men and women who served our country. Without them, there would not be elections and freedom would be an abstract idea as opposed to the reality we live in today. From Rob and the whole team, THANK YOU to everyone who served to keep this country free!
---
|
---
| Republicans won up and down the ballot last week! This great victory would not have been possible without all of your help. We had a phenomenal volunteer operation and will continue to grow it out for 2026!
---
|
---
| Rob was out and about in NEPA this weekend! We had several Veterans Day events and community events throughout the weekend. Rob will STILL be a staple of our community and you’ll see him throughout NEPA when he’s not working diligently for us in D.C.
---
|
---
[](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=2801c96416&e=131e83a3c2)
| We are starting our Small Business of the Week in our weekly emails. We will highlight local businesses and entrepreneurs that make our community great! The first small business we are highlighting is Tammy’s Kitchen, in Larksville. Tammy made the decision to open her doors and take a chance in NEPA! Thank you to Tammy, and definitely swing by to get some great food!
---
|
---
| The road to 2026 starts TODAY! Congressman-Elect Bresnahan will face the same California donors getting ready to spread lies about Rob, and we need your help to fight it!

name: Edward Byers, Medal of Honor Recipient and Ret. Navy SEAL Master Chief
subject: Fighting for America’s Survival
body:
I am unapologetically American and have a profound love and pride for our Country.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2znh4fmhv46q679iukuvd3gsv3ob78ofoiqk0gt38_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphmcpj6chh2bs)
Friend,

I am unapologetically American and have a profound love and pride for our Country. For more than two decades, I swore an oath as a Corpsman and SEAL within the Navy to protect the United States of America from all enemies, foreign and domestic.

This is why I am deeply disturbed by what I see happening in our country today - the rapid deterioration of our hard-fought-for way of life and the weaponization of our justice system against those who believe in law and order.

**Mark my words:** The United States of America will only survive if we unite as Americans and root out the destructive and evil forces who want to destroy all God has blessed us with.

The freedom we have been granted as Americans is unlike any place else in the world. We still have economic and civil opportunities because of our liberty. However, that freedom is not guaranteed.

If America continues to fall prey to abuse and we lose our liberties, I am confident that no other country will take up the mantle of defending inalienable rights for all people.

We have a severe problem when our rule of law is perverted to punish political enemies. It’s happening in our courts. And it’s even happening within the administrative state, colloquially known as the Deep State.

When I served to defend Americans’ lives in Afghanistan, Iraq, Africa, and Yemen, I protected all Americans. Not just Americans, I agreed with politically.

_Likewise, our justice system and our government agents must serve all Americans without regard to their politics_.

No one is above the law.

My dear friend Kash Patel created the Kash Foundation. Their mission is to support educational and legal efforts to facilitate government transparency and create a healthier relationship between the US federal government and American citizens.

[I am personally asking for you to support the Kash Foundation and help us restore trust in our institutions by exposing bad actors. Can you donate $10, $35, $50, $250, or any amount today? Click here to give >>](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zpn7k4t2ir29pei7n8u5mqbfvvb8cvcd12qoqti8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphmcpj6chh2bs) The Kash Foundation works in three main areas:
* Legal funds to support whistleblowers within the federal government and media accountability efforts
* Education of the public in areas the mainstream media refuses to cover
* Veteran and law enforcement financial support

Through their program, they have helped FBI whistleblowers come forward to expose corruption — such as Kyle Seraphin, Steve Friend, Garrett O’Boyle, and Marcus Allen.

Recently, the Kash Foundation has reached a milestone of distributing half a million dollars to scores of Americans needing assistance. Many of these grants were given out to veterans.

[Please join me in supporting Kash Foundation today. My goal is to help raise $35,000 online in the next 48 hours. Chip in any amount you can generously spare; even $10 goes a long way. Select an amount below to give:](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z5954uuahk30eeq3cgne88r4f5bvb7aq4iviv8l0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphmcpj6chh2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8sqb0qd1rhv92ilflg2h06esr6hs88mbi74ro78_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphmcpj6chh2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z55mfq4a73jplrub2mi2e24ecs0ispudh38cf6io_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphmcpj6chh2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zre050c1j0nnjes0rm6hj4r77e6h8v8ofq5nnp18_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphmcpj6chh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zn6a89kf592h8c45n92rq93jq9fma5lef0f8lfso_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphmcpj6chh2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zkdts7a1h6aco3f2emh66lubmqvmcpnjri9gvvqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphmcpj6chh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z6u0gmik8879dmvc54pji6j1bssj1eggcqh4glpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphmcpj6chh2bs)

[Donate Other](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zirr2vidfti2u3og3afjlm7dek0kua44k2l6uflg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphmcpj6chh2bs)
It has been an honor to have been friends with Kash for over a decade now, and I hope you can join me to serve their mission. Now more than ever, our nation needs trust in its institutions, which will only happen by exposing and rooting out bad actors.

Thank you,

Edward Byers
Medal of Honor Recipient and Master Chief Special Warfare Operator (SEAL) USN Ret.

clean_body: I am unapologetically American and have a profound love and pride for our Country. |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | Friend, I am unapologetically American and have a profound love and pride for our Country. For more than two decades, I swore an oath as a Corpsman and SEAL within the Navy to protect the United States of America from all enemies, foreign and domestic. This is why I am deeply disturbed by what I see happening in our country today - the rapid deterioration of our hard-fought-for way of life and the weaponization of our justice system against those who believe in law and order. Mark my words: The United States of America will only survive if we unite as Americans and root out the destructive and evil forces who want to destroy all God has blessed us with. The freedom we have been granted as Americans is unlike any place else in the world. We still have economic and civil opportunities because of our liberty. However, that freedom is not guaranteed. If America continues to fall prey to abuse and we lose our liberties, I am confident that no other country will take up the mantle of defending inalienable rights for all people. We have a severe problem when our rule of law is perverted to punish political enemies. It’s happening in our courts. And it’s even happening within the administrative state, colloquially known as the Deep State. When I served to defend Americans’ lives in Afghanistan, Iraq, Africa, and Yemen, I protected all Americans. Not just Americans, I agreed with politically. Likewise, our justice system and our government agents must serve all Americans without regard to their politics. No one is above the law. My dear friend Kash Patel created the Kash Foundation. Their mission is to support educational and legal efforts to facilitate government transparency and create a healthier relationship between the US federal government and American citizens. The Kash Foundation works in three main areas: Legal funds to support whistleblowers within the federal government and media accountability efforts Education of the public in areas the mainstream media refuses to cover Veteran and law enforcement financial support Through their program, they have helped FBI whistleblowers come forward to expose corruption — such as Kyle Seraphin, Steve Friend, Garrett O’Boyle, and Marcus Allen. Recently, the Kash Foundation has reached a milestone of distributing half a million dollars to scores of Americans needing assistance. Many of these grants were given out to veterans. It has been an honor to have been friends with Kash for over a decade now, and I hope you can join me to serve their mission. Now more than ever, our nation needs trust in its institutions, which will only happen by exposing and rooting out bad actors. Thank you, Edward Byers Medal of Honor Recipient and Master Chief Special Warfare Operator (SEAL) USN Ret. name: Hillsdale College via Old Glory Today
subject: Complete our CRT survey today
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Old Glory Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/D3LJDTSkQ-NGd6EOmmRayg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFNOuP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLU9HVC0yMDI0MTExMVcDc3BjQgpnK7I9MmdwfAUHUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/D3LJDTSkQ-NGd6EOmmRayg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFNOuP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLU9HVC0yMDI0MTExMVcDc3BjQgpnK7I9MmdwfAUHUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/D3LJDTSkQ-NGd6EOmmRayg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFNOuP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLU9HVC0yMDI0MTExMVcDc3BjQgpnK7I9MmdwfAUHUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/D3LJDTSkQ-NGd6EOmmRayg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpFNOuP0SdaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvY3J0LXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDE1NzJOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNydHN1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1MT05HX1BBLU9HVC0yMDI0MTExMVcDc3BjQgpnK7I9MmdwfAUHUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| |
---

Old Glory Today
