name: Monica Montgomery Steppe
subject: for the brave
body:
Every day I am inspired by the valor, selflessness, and courage of those who serve our country. I am also reminded that this day is about more than honoring their dedication.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96935598/511697199/1737394279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQ5ZGEyOC01MmEwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l_Gh3qhC7gzjY8kZgj0HsOElzzqLGm_UgPEvgHOUAO0=&emci=decf7ce5-c19b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=91d9da28-52a0-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=31112076)
---
Happy Veterans Day, friend.

Every day I am inspired by the valor, selflessness, and courage of those who serve our country. I am also reminded that this day is about more than honoring their dedication.

**It’s about keeping our promise and taking care of our veterans and their families in thanks for all they’ve given us.**

San Diego County has one of the largest veteran communities in the country. We have a special responsibility to care for those who served and their families when they come back home.

When my father returned from Vietnam, he poured all his selflessness and energy into raising a family, starting a business, and becoming an integral part of our church and local community.

But far too many veterans don’t get those opportunities. Today, our veterans disproportionately struggle with homelessness, drug addiction, and mental health.

Veterans often fight a second battle when they come back home — lack of support networks, underfunded healthcare, and gaps in affordable housing access leaves them with few options and little hope. _They deserve better than that._

**For all they’ve sacrificed, we owe them a place to turn the corner before they move on to their next chapter of life.**

I am committed to using my position on the Board of Supervisors to keep San Diego’s veterans safe and supported.

Thank you for honoring them,

— Monica Montgomery Steppe

* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96935599/511697200/1737394279?nvep=&hmac=&emci=cd82577a-a213-ef11-96f3-7c1e5214dad0&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQ5ZGEyOC01MmEwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l_Gh3qhC7gzjY8kZgj0HsOElzzqLGm_UgPEvgHOUAO0=)
Born and raised in San Diego, Monica Montgomery Steppe is an HBCU graduate, and an attorney by trade. Monica believes in her heart that the neighborhoods and community members are vibrant and worthy of care and investment. To learn more about Monica and the work she's doing for District Four, [**_click here_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96935600/511697201/1737394279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQ5ZGEyOC01MmEwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l_Gh3qhC7gzjY8kZgj0HsOElzzqLGm_UgPEvgHOUAO0=&emci=decf7ce5-c19b-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=91d9da28-52a0-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=31112076).

If you believe you received this email in error or would no longer like to receive email updates from Monica, please click here to **_[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/hZMF-tZ-C06qwqM-3EbHOw2?unsubscribedata=kX6XrI15H28khtCpkCLaAUdpjWXGcL57L5g0lh8Ape5ocZP0Sisw74%2FN3rC5S94nf4G2jZ5%2BFbw5Adup0Rlkz8A%2F4GffOuLY8xjt%2BtAIR%2FUt3K1fS8C7YwndtH9O55HN7aOwLfLuVvb7JkxkiJww0DDNaaHo3NXjz1Pq4a%2FesNpX%2FLlE4hnHgwM9Y14SToFMisU1Du4nBO8e3vyKkRHzUvgAH%2Fxr%2B9Tiw%2FX4IrCsbDUtmeOXgeSKtbLfgaNJIL4zIfuen2vUSL%2B5wXd35cy6Qkynb4SDf%2FAZ8wT%2BAKZFoaoWCrlQUsvXb276WGjVWgyl5cXWDdFDdAVLmwRAGdlwHdUGJTLlz0ugLLlOeTGbUG9qvO%2FdhKFNICVgSp9tfpzCeQJBiz%2BWePb%2FNqpUCVeFZ9Bknl76CAxMEJjeEH8OvoHMhZFb3JLTco5FW3leuFNN)._**

name: Edward Byers, Medal of Honor Recipient and Ret. Navy SEAL Master Chief
subject: Fighting for America’s Survival
body:
I am unapologetically American and have a profound love and pride for our Country.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7tensrhmjhllunm4bketmq9c96b3in94ssij5s0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm2oj4c3h2bs)
Friend,

I am unapologetically American and have a profound love and pride for our Country. For more than two decades, I swore an oath as a Corpsman and SEAL within the Navy to protect the United States of America from all enemies, foreign and domestic.

This is why I am deeply disturbed by what I see happening in our country today - the rapid deterioration of our hard-fought-for way of life and the weaponization of our justice system against those who believe in law and order.

**Mark my words:** The United States of America will only survive if we unite as Americans and root out the destructive and evil forces who want to destroy all God has blessed us with.

The freedom we have been granted as Americans is unlike any place else in the world. We still have economic and civil opportunities because of our liberty. However, that freedom is not guaranteed.

If America continues to fall prey to abuse and we lose our liberties, I am confident that no other country will take up the mantle of defending inalienable rights for all people.

We have a severe problem when our rule of law is perverted to punish political enemies. It’s happening in our courts. And it’s even happening within the administrative state, colloquially known as the Deep State.

When I served to defend Americans’ lives in Afghanistan, Iraq, Africa, and Yemen, I protected all Americans. Not just Americans, I agreed with politically.

_Likewise, our justice system and our government agents must serve all Americans without regard to their politics_.

No one is above the law.

My dear friend Kash Patel created the Kash Foundation. Their mission is to support educational and legal efforts to facilitate government transparency and create a healthier relationship between the US federal government and American citizens.

[I am personally asking for you to support the Kash Foundation and help us restore trust in our institutions by exposing bad actors. Can you donate $10, $35, $50, $250, or any amount today? Click here to give >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsrh9b033f2gsasf8uvkcjsh74ul1js7tfvmko8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm2oj4c3h2bs) The Kash Foundation works in three main areas:
* Legal funds to support whistleblowers within the federal government and media accountability efforts
* Education of the public in areas the mainstream media refuses to cover
* Veteran and law enforcement financial support

Through their program, they have helped FBI whistleblowers come forward to expose corruption — such as Kyle Seraphin, Steve Friend, Garrett O’Boyle, and Marcus Allen.

Recently, the Kash Foundation has reached a milestone of distributing half a million dollars to scores of Americans needing assistance. Many of these grants were given out to veterans.

[Please join me in supporting Kash Foundation today. My goal is to help raise $35,000 online in the next 48 hours. Chip in any amount you can generously spare; even $10 goes a long way. Select an amount below to give:](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvekv8aat4m654p75j1d6upoltdvehhnkf5u4cr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm2oj4c3h2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi09fmqutrgvgaa9sjl71olp1o2nosrej5hjl2cg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm2oj4c3h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5l27c1ch43v1u6gls3bs8tl91rrssk2v00qr5h8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm2oj4c3h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0jp1us8g2l781cavimkivr6vhnfm3lhdp2pfrvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm2oj4c3h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgn1rniqop5hk7oipe09ard5l09rchlqsepcogr0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm2oj4c3h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1jn4bant4ugt5ogm0q2sfr1b8sd91rtb00jdff0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm2oj4c3h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0jh6pr8gdn2vslpsq62884idc7she8rolfrpcrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm2oj4c3h2bs)

[Donate Other](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd0d2s6c0rggnbm4m1ptnf7b1jqrpu6gr06i7dmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4cphm2oj4c3h2bs)
It has been an honor to have been friends with Kash for over a decade now, and I hope you can join me to serve their mission. Now more than ever, our nation needs trust in its institutions, which will only happen by exposing and rooting out bad actors.

Thank you,

Edward Byers
Medal of Honor Recipient and Master Chief Special Warfare Operator (SEAL) USN Ret.

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: Democrats clinch key victories in ultra-competitive chambers… and everything else you need to know in the states→
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Monday, November 11th, 2024. | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJViqSOAPtdfRJrzMKtRCwblAdhaJUhRuEFlNXADRasEq7RYL0EztMxNel7cwSbueLpB4GsKodSdVKFb26niVvCqU4QwyI8HUPlj4jqUBAEltm7hfoJDP56OXcFA3yL8KNvuWAlM1-6GuQZJoN2V8HEtqHnocF7Q182t_YABTzAvtr-ZITKrzGzwvHF6BDbEdoHomTFJtsuMDGAzfcGwBmNaUJ7GMBe3xPLu-zz39XUmEDyPBqw1LtCgmYjAwFXvDOliV-nT1BAQKtWaJ2ibyTPRSkE6Oyv7ucvzbxhgNaianaQ67Boxa04rVTGipVTx-0-PzpwJQsaWcCyNy70QzYS_B3zbyyqnL3l_m2TInS-omzVSDEKDBpBIDMV-0akTEnq8/4bd/-aadGAL2T9W0nlP6mNUl6A/h0/h001.rNpMG6-H455Q5FG3mwroM88n3NvQ6akHJRRjLlqTdaw)
---
1️⃣ **_Pennsylvania:_ Democrats protect Pennsylvania House Majority **
In one of the most competitive state legislative chambers in the country, the DLCC and Pennsylvania House Democrats have successfully secured enough seats to protect their crucial majority and keep this chamber under Democratic control. [Republicans failed to gain a single seat after spending millions to flip this critical chamber → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW62rQa9Pz0Y7yher5LoycxnbL5dndfalsAVRkTHdyI2D4WHasA4G-N_xWKikj44FfzYpbET_sHPWbLaPQ1xf7jetABz3Ux1GqSXB3MCYQKrxsmop-VAPbs8CdPM9e55yffbxCHHtWxeg2Iz0nYBsHJwKb2fQIj4Buvsj9qV5jchAWsEM-ioZfIATNLdabrkHQUf9vmjo0jYbeOV75uttbMiK_xV0jHKnc__NFizl2IDKRK8Z4IO4yOludda_x7VCrlfK7-Re95DiULb-NqsfusNuUHEvON5DOphNHdQEJQ6iOG_s2U6yL0hbB8jsJq5wLR-V66y2ADFfiTSrJd80-sohsiQ_jVLaBk3eggAPRinnimzQfGlh2URmhAni8YzpHWmOXckMNnnQO4teg6u4IQ8Rj8pelSyUXjV0mjL5KBZrfwbPVu7svSCHjFXxSPZzr83-7xBb_Dnu9C4fv_mW_H4kopitJ30l6bUxTmB_RhhBxb7yS1xQSFm00dfd96P7i9-DgHCUQ2NWcF8-ivgwT1Y/4bd/-aadGAL2T9W0nlP6mNUl6A/h1/h001.73S2Yjsen1Cxa0DlSSJpBjWUtBl9mz24qPYfEjEGpgM)
2️⃣ **_Wisconsin:_ Democrats made key gains in Wisconsin Assembly and Senate **
Republicans lost their Senate supermajority & lost significant ground in the Assembly, despite marking Wisconsin as a top priority. These victories are crucial milestones in the DLCC’s long-term strategy to shift the balance of power in Wisconsin and [lay the groundwork for future gains to put majorities in play in 2026 → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWwpbRT_BYJsLvsW0RbBHsbDbHDDWJoChQP3icQphBvdoPRFKIfQbAOdtlAXdJPovpcTmJ6I0NIrWxtoZAUbbkAtROBJBV3ca78IXp9E5x_K8c5jCgfObQR5my9RwzkE5vFz3TNe0Lw_d_Ccjufc9ezgJ0D022S9fKbU2xhQB-9Gz-xcWmETiNhon9XlhmmI_-cjYvBcG4b9mbvQl3w2Zz5a5KkxsKMuNUhkTGMAQDvKnj9j_iZa0Hvqurvq2BqNwh7L0r_b2zxJscpPJ1RWs8iunZWsZBkYqBsF2yU6ltw3ggGSlrvwPw0i_tfvtZbaSUpSiTid5-Um6OlH77cWEbAvuCMEblDrF1nWDNk1TuvSvhEhB2D4EL5IuwjpcOOaFa_mYs7V36mlVP2pjOM2Bj2Aa-gLhSW54uE9Z6Tx0ir77kCMTP3pxiqSen8Wi4PpGrPq2JUlpzjmTy45AI4VsbL2uugvFEloS8DoIonGydWPnaqT8Ac4YtvtSiAB8CE_ruwUe1XybzB6lyYg7LD3NyJm7Wtupz3Evk6mHPgLzaf4J/4bd/-aadGAL2T9W0nlP6mNUl6A/h2/h001.LrdUbccaZ02LxKbkU_RMDQS0CdmIQiXW9XtmIiBhTjE)
3️⃣ **_North Carolina:_ Democrats broke the North Carolina House supermajority **
Democrats broke the Republican supermajority in the NC House. This victory restores the veto power for incoming Democratic Governor Josh Stein and turns the tide after years of egregious veto overrides carried out by Republicans set on undermining fundamental freedoms and preserving their own power. [**Read more here →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW62rQa9Pz0Y7yher5LoycxlBqN-wPTxMoSMD51N_njNOBe5VasdR9ZHRzMsMs8UgO7oBzJF_kad2AvaUORJb5qggT4rIqKJCJyQp2LjeWTEmQ4Pa3rUvZCbTEK_n9QmveI-WV2Om79-XQLQYzuKv6uatcFTtf_si79Vninz0IBFUv7KPSYU5QHhiO8T9ULg9lwI-ksL-34hQb4po3mb-vmqgEYXB7cz8QVej4YSwlp4nlqeJzxBrihp04zwJAGhFBfd9Rbd2bRXkYCtWab1mgAiu9edlmfO8PgFZrhOQaJ6w82AjtX5w3DtXqat0hu_i4XDDVP0_eBVmYBwiL3HqPWy8XxxD_SDDzVlZ-_ga5hn2D5OL_uM6aRWbMm_HfU86iFwyIssrCy_zEQbgdbKyDQmfc8xI_4yW3mqcSP7IviStI0NVLEPYIQE_pyeTGA9b788KBz1REafnZKt2LPDWa8gMnhYmwE1wUeP1gwcuI23ISBFzCcRiRbxKEi4Jm1S-mgVheHsMZoIUcAuN4BfluxN4USHiqc9b3Th-nPEmPeWd/4bd/-aadGAL2T9W0nlP6mNUl6A/h3/h001.z15ZByNyW-_Kev1QB-lqRWdbFsc18H9y_gU5RKL8lGY)

In a majority-making special election, DLCC Spotlight candidate Ann Johnson Stewart emerged victorious, protecting Democrats’ majority in the Minnesota Senate. clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Monday, November 11th, 2024. | | | | | | 1️⃣ Pennsylvania: Democrats protect Pennsylvania House Majority In one of the most competitive state legislative chambers in the country, the DLCC and Pennsylvania House Democrats have successfully secured enough seats to protect their crucial majority and keep this chamber under Democratic control. 2️⃣ Wisconsin: Democrats made key gains in Wisconsin Assembly and Senate Republicans lost their Senate supermajority & lost significant ground in the Assembly, despite marking Wisconsin as a top priority. These victories are crucial milestones in the DLCC’s long-term strategy to shift the balance of power in Wisconsin and 3️⃣ North Carolina: Democrats broke the North Carolina House supermajority Democrats broke the Republican supermajority in the NC House. This victory restores the veto power for incoming Democratic Governor Josh Stein and turns the tide after years of egregious veto overrides carried out by Republicans set on undermining fundamental freedoms and preserving their own power. 4️⃣ Minnesota: Democrats defend Minnesota Senate Majority In a majority-making special election, DLCC Spotlight candidate Ann Johnson Stewart emerged victorious, protecting Democrats’ majority in the Minnesota Senate. 🏳️⚧️ Breaking Barriers: Sarah McBride becomes the first Transgender Member of Congress DLCC Board Member Sarah McBride becomes the first openly transgender person to be elected federally – we could not be more proud of her and all she stands for. 🎉 Making History: New Mexico now has a majority women-led legislature Following Election Day, the chamber elected six new women, 🗳️ Looking to upcoming races: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are sure to face recounts, runoffs, and critical special elections in places like Virginia in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee is dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . subject: Too early to call

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: We can't sit this out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Don’t do it.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4824%2E552475%2ECqRQUf)
Peter,
**With thousands of votes left to count and a razor-thin margin still between Bob Casey and his opponent, we can’t sit this out.**
Our democracy only works if voters’ voices are heard. If we want this done right and done fairly, it’s on us to show up and fight for it.
**Bob’s never stopped fighting to ensure every single Pennsylvanian has their voice heard, and he won’t stop now -- but he needs you by his side. [Fund the fight in Pennsylvania's critical Senate race with a donation of $5 or more right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241111-3?refcode=em20241111-3&refcode2=4824_552475_CqRQUf&akid=4824%2E552475%2ECqRQUf)**

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: "Are we screwed?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Will you hurt or heal? Build or break down?
#
It’s been a difficult week.
In moments like these, it can be easy to feel hopeless.
After the ruling to overturn Roe v. Wade was leaked, someone asked Alexandria on Instagram, “Are we screwed?” Here’s what she had to say:
What is important in moments like these is not to think in binaries. Good/bad, screwed/not screwed. There is no doubt that things are bad. Some things, really bad. And they may likely get worse.
But that does not preclude the fact that slowly but surely, some good can be growing as other things fall apart. This is not some syrupy sweet silver lining case for optimism. Rather, it is really about a choice all of us will have to make in life, either consciously or unconsciously: **will I be a person who is safe and creates good for others?**
Will I be a person who stands up? Will I be a person who primarily minds my business and serves myself or try to be part of something bigger? Or will I just be a passive, “neutral” observer of it all?
What I sometimes tell my staff is that **the world we are fighting for is already here**. It exists in small spaces, places, and communities. We don’t have to deal with the insurmountable burden of coming up with novel solutions to the world’s problems.
Much of our work is about scaling existing solutions, many created by small, committed groups of people, that others haven’t seen or don’t even know are around the corner. So while we can’t change the world in a day, we _can_ and _do_ have the power to make our own world within our own four walls, or on our own blocks.
We can grow from there with the faith that somewhere out there, everywhere, others are doing the same. **And we will come together.**
That’s why if you’re a parent, how you parent matters. If you’re a neighbor, how you are a neighbor matters. Many of our biggest problems are results of massively scaled up isolation from others. That means many of our solutions can be found in creating community.
Ultimately, we live in this world and in this time. We have no choice but to engage in it while we’re here. Even running away is a form of engagement. So will your engagement hurt or heal? Build or bring down?
There is no neutral choice, so we can at least do our best to make good ones and learn and do better the next day.
You are allowed to be scared. To grieve. To be angry. But you are also allowed to create good, to be soft, and enjoy the small reprieves. Struggle lasts as long as we do.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

[Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots donation.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241111.hXAtJV&refcode=em20241111-7558-P_FND_EXP_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7558%2E2526796%2E_SzldH)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241111.hXAtJV&refcode=em20241111-7558-P_FND_EXP_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7558%2E2526796%2E_SzldH)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241111?refcode=em20241111-7558-P_FND_EXP_CTR&t=21&refcode2=7558_2526796__SzldH&akid=7558%2E2526796%2E_SzldH)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241111-7558-P_FND_EXP_CTR&t=22&akid=7558%2E2526796%2E_SzldH)**

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Thank a veteran today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Glenn Grothman for Congress
body:
| | | Happy Veterans Day, my friend. I am honored to thank those who have served our nation in the Armed Services. Throughout my time in Congress, I have had the great privilege to meet with many of our nation’s bravest who have fought for our country’s liberties. These men and women have sacrificed comfort, time with families, and even their lives to protect us all. I am moved beyond words by their service. To all of you who have served our country, _**thank you****!**_ Your service to our country is an inspiration to us all. As your representative, I will always work to make sure you receive the respect and support you have earned and deserve. Sincerely, **Glenn Grothman**
---

name: Oregon GOP
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
| | | | [ ](https://oregon.gop/)
---
| | Friend,
This Veterans Day, we take a moment to reflect on the sacrifices made by the brave men and women who have served in our armed forces. Their commitment, dedication, and courage have shaped the freedoms we enjoy today, and for that, we are deeply grateful.
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/y3bxspbZx7BG/MTFtTURaYTZNRkZEYi9oRTkzSnlJalhoYTdlVEpSWFJMUEZXZFRhYStPYTdkSjkwek1BbHNjMnJhcE1UZ3M3U3ByTU1wM0JGL2ExcWhLcGZZNGhrRUFhSSt4cklNWWh2RU9JdFoweHZsWmM9S0/)
---
| | On this day, we recognize the extraordinary contributions of veterans and their families. Whether at home or abroad, they have given up so much to protect and defend our nation’s values. Join us in honoring their service, not just today, but every day. We hope you will take a moment to thank a veteran, whether in your family, community, or workplace. To all veterans, we thank you for your service. God bless America and our veterans everywhere. Thank you, Oregon Republican Party
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Friend, This Veterans Day, we take a moment to reflect on the sacrifices made by the brave men and women who have served in our armed forces. Their commitment, dedication, and courage have shaped the freedoms we enjoy today, and for that, we are deeply grateful. | | | | On this day, we recognize the extraordinary contributions of veterans and their families. Whether at home or abroad, they have given up so much to protect and defend our nation’s values. Join us in honoring their service, not just today, but every day. We hope you will take a moment to thank a veteran, whether in your family, community, or workplace. To all veterans, we thank you for your service. God bless America and our veterans everywhere. Thank you, Oregon Republican Party | | | | | | Welcome to Oregon's frontlines! Thank you for being part of our mission to help save Oregon. Our goal is to improve Oregon’s way of life by helping elect common-sense Republican leaders who will fight for YOU. | | | | | | | | The Democrats have had control of Oregon for far too long, it’s time for a change - but we can’t do it without you. Help us make a better tomorrow here in Oregon for you and your family by getting involved below: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Make sure you’re following us on socials to stay up to date on all things Oregon GOP!** ⬇ CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK ⬇Oregon Republican PartyPO Box 1586Lake Oswego, OR 97035 | | | | |

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dd559f6497642b58475e9f2a51685ec&_e=5vdAqrXTK_OCMHOsRrR6JueIPU2YLsTuBIN_ddGuw8iQIMjyYDc2R3w_Eg1aaCM2JwcBizQSkqEJXWVHt974cReicOeP5ah0MfnvPHKjCB2cXxkZ7V9Q1_c61qncjYJygt65GjN3t_D3HjOgRzaX6RZOgZew7X0EZWsu0By6Crb3KBKeD48I7EYvRI0xEzXhsInjRV_O23ggzoCkuVW0buJawGzLXGO2CT_bwr3iwLtOjHD11dGeWT6zZgPmUYW00nCoeWiZ44TiO19L0KYSidGCCP9uB8qwrpItl5ZlqGV_CJTkq5E1dyOOkVsWbwDQNz6OiuWYcCYyfdFeRlwUIU0VZ_CIpqCQbvvwRIJt_rV5lVeJZCe-cXIoB97keG9z)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dd559f6497642b58475e9f2a51685ec&_e=5vdAqrXTK_OCMHOsRrR6JueIPU2YLsTuBIN_ddGuw8iQIMjyYDc2R3w_Eg1aaCM2JwcBizQSkqEJXWVHt974cReicOeP5ah0MfnvPHKjCB2cXxkZ7V9Q1_c61qncjYJygt65GjN3t_D3HjOgRzaX6RZOgZew7X0EZWsu0By6Crb3KBKeD48I7EYvRI0xEzXhsInjRV_O23ggzoCkuVW0buJawGzLXGO2CT_bwr3iwLvF1nSiXsnGBZjJrva7VzjmEnNT7wiz2dqTRnyX8R7dUn9Jj0sIWNXFtz_XkP6Gyj4nofXXaQSZIpSzV127jENrpMX3pmc56lG33tPpTpsCiebFqGjnm2tDMxOgGQlliFFHKz9Qw4prTAa6S03RGXBp)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dd559f6497642b58475e9f2a51685ec&_e=5vdAqrXTK_OCMHOsRrR6JueIPU2YLsTuBIN_ddGuw8iQIMjyYDc2R3w_Eg1aaCM2JwcBizQSkqEJXWVHt974cReicOeP5ah0MfnvPHKjCB2cXxkZ7V9Q1_c61qncjYJygt65GjN3t_D3HjOgRzaX6RZOgZew7X0EZWsu0By6Crb3KBKeD48I7EYvRI0xEzXhsInjRV_O23ggzoCkuVW0buJawGzLXGO2CT_bwr3iwLtNO9OnYFCL0x1eX79IAA_8-vTVF-yQIEQYpUR0KJozdDRdFCVUAh8PSdddJGQDzlizj6e0VDid74O0QmQz-Mnhk7dKdwM_Ee4ODWOaaagN8rpbBUApbi0g11xvWJippCtGK0Fif6gsAkCbL3sdWj1P)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dd559f6497642b58475e9f2a51685ec&_e=5vdAqrXTK_OCMHOsRrR6JueIPU2YLsTuBIN_ddGuw8iQIMjyYDc2R3w_Eg1aaCM2JwcBizQSkqEJXWVHt974cReicOeP5ah0MfnvPHKjCB2cXxkZ7V9Q1_c61qncjYJygt65GjN3t_D3HjOgRzaX6RZOgZew7X0EZWsu0By6Crb3KBKeD48I7EYvRI0xEzXhsInjRV_O23ggzoCkuVW0buJawGzLXGO2CT_bwr3iwLsPW0q1b5ZPJ8n_fRUJC9n6OPHfAmOZ_SQJB00Ci91mspO2sc83vnukX7GHtIQLlNl1L8sCD7wfmVPfvr485LP6QmA5gSWBN98hSYYIc9_WQASYTrjjAqfsOM8spuG-ocgSc_mubfTdf8QSV3SNXezT)
---
| |
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=6dd559f6497642b58475e9f2a51685ec&_t=ThcYQfgIO2JEU_Tbw88igAnH9Je5zTRGIRocTN-4ZaJs8_JGw6OruM6jZnTHrGsUQRFYXW54TFdPbdv-0KY5wxnt7UfMTywEK8M2JwTW82ZTe0HxEMSvKUp4rn3dKeTqVqKn-LxNPW-OFS1zvftsYq7MXUE5K3zndG3mQ5QyYhU%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dd559f6497642b58475e9f2a51685ec&_e=9sHluyd0aiJ0GfG6Xfr9E7L-kXwbAxB-yTSqrLiAAWMDh-oI6Smg38ZZ8YJ7kUXeIgUgxCxe6maCIaUvwQ6yhHRM1h4ByBWSXdyql4tEZPoqDOopjnrKql4heM1wv5I6keMbTAW-89mon-4vX8A2tlrUBgUhxz_4DXBCSh1mkLgdk4sKlTnVFHZz1vPjd6ZBnHyc6cWA1M0dJWedDc-Iimk0QpY2Nd1pZnszpibenfzbPyLIFND37toroq8zKERhGT26efv8idaJYsDRr5lPjT5_lKeUKchubQ4V4WXs_zg%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6dd559f6497642b58475e9f2a51685ec&_e=5vdAqrXTK_OCMHOsRrR6JqvvOLL3dvVMhPvZ7LyhOk_xWtDpBqgVt8NFKK_QZBgyUs4qPLngcnwqo8asbCzOhNAURnrT9VXZUCZIs6ISLueb06IW3EsHfRgoYz7tSlqSHjtdiG8BZHGr34yExeuapQTxFjoGVAHw4R-vbZ-qDVaz8tVyEYxfpwKLnCSxe_CdPVt3D96C04AO5wq7lacy96jq8l5O2rSHctkTjIFHQeA%3D)_

Long before anyone
else.
Like Apple at just

subject: Honoring Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kelly for New Hampshire, Chris Connelly Treasurer, PO Box 4723 Manchester, NH 03108**](https://press1535

| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://press1535.wixsite.com/so/fdPCRMf-_/c?w=7o1ufdQ0wDr_-50TDQmhpS9Ve0F1HHkwpTLA5FzGhZ0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wcmVzczE1MzUud2l4c2l0ZS5jb20vc28vZmRQQ1JNZi1fP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMmIwOGU3MDMtYTYyNy00NmYzLWJlOGEtNWQ1NjU0NDI2MjAyIn0)_**

| |
---
| | Friend, Today on Veterans Day, we honor all the brave men and women who served our nation in the United States military. America is the land of the free because of the brave. To each of our veterans, thank you for your service and sacrifice. Honoring Veterans Day is personal to me. I'm proud that my husband, Joe, served our country in the United States Air Force. Today, I also remember my grandfather, who served in the Army Air Corps during World War II and lived to be 98 years old. I hope you will join me today in thanking our veterans for defending our freedoms at home and overseas. All the best, Kelly
---
| | [**Paid for by Kelly for New Hampshire, Chris Connelly Treasurer, PO Box 4723 Manchester, NH 03108**](https://press1535.wixsite.com/so/fdPCRMf-_/c?w=MeI9v9Ec294TblndK7WDXjO_u8p-V4vywMkqzGo1syU.)

* **TOP NEWS**

"**U.S.-Mexico water agreement might bring relief to parched South Texas,** " Texas Tribune's**Berenice Garcia** -- "The U.S. and Mexico agreed to amend a 1944 water treaty, which might bring some relief to South Texas farmers struggling with scarce water.

The International Water and Boundary Commission, a federal agency that oversees international water treaties between the U.S. and Mexico, announced Saturday that the two countries had signed a highly-anticipated agreement that will give Mexico more options to meet its water deliveries to the U.S. Mexico still needs to give the U.S. more than a million acre-feet of water.

South Texas farmers and ranchers have been devastated lately by low rainfall and Mexico falling behind on its deliveries to the region.

Under the 1944 international treaty, Mexico must deliver 1,750,000 acre-feet of water to the U.S. from six tributaries every five years, or an average of 350,000 every year. But Mexico is at a high risk of not meeting that deadline. The country still has a balance of more than 1.3 million acre-feet of water it needs to deliver by October 2025.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/df84fede-9b5e-4f39-945a-5b749d236fcb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The new amendment will allow Mexico to meet its delivery obligations by giving up water that was allotted to the country under the treaty. It also allows Mexico to transfer water it has stored at the Falcon and Amistad international reservoirs to the U.S.

Additionally, the agreement gives Mexico the option of delivering water it doesn't need from the San Juan and Alamo rivers, which are not part of the six tributaries.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/df84fede-9b5e-4f39-945a-5b749d236fcb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The amendment also addresses a current offer Mexico made to give the U.S. 120,000 acre-feet of water. South Texas farmers [were wary](https://substack.com/redirect/edf8a073-7b03-44f6-b55b-7e08d1a68f61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the offer because they worried that by accepting the water, the state would later force farmers to make up for it by giving up water they have been storing for next year.

But because the amendment allows Mexico to make use of water in its reservoirs to meet its treaty obligations, the farmers hope the country will transfer enough water for the next planting season to make up for any water they might have to give up." ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "U.S.-Mexico water agreement might bring relief to parched South Texas, " Texas Tribune'sBerenice Garcia -- "The U.S. and Mexico agreed to amend a 1944 water treaty, which might bring some relief to South Texas farmers struggling with scarce water. The International Water and Boundary Commission, a federal agency that oversees international water treaties between the U.S. and Mexico, announced Saturday that the two countries had signed a highly-anticipated agreement that will give Mexico more options to meet its water deliveries to the U.S. Mexico still needs to give the U.S. more than a million acre-feet of water. South Texas farmers and ranchers have been devastated lately by low rainfall and Mexico falling behind on its deliveries to the region. Under the 1944 international treaty, Mexico must deliver 1,750,000 acre-feet of water to the U.S. from six tributaries every five years, or an average of 350,000 every year. But Mexico is at a high risk of not meeting that deadline. The country still has a balance of more than 1.3 million acre-feet of water it needs to deliver by October 2025. The new amendment will allow Mexico to meet its delivery obligations by giving up water that was allotted to the country under the treaty. It also allows Mexico to transfer water it has stored at the Falcon and Amistad international reservoirs to the U.S. Additionally, the agreement gives Mexico the option of delivering water it doesn't need from the San Juan and Alamo rivers, which are not part of the six tributaries. The amendment also addresses a current offer Mexico made to give the U.S. 120,000 acre-feet of water. South Texas farmers of the offer because they worried that by accepting the water, the state would later force farmers to make up for it by giving up water they have been storing for next year. But because the amendment allows Mexico to make use of water in its reservoirs to meet its treaty obligations, the farmers hope the country will transfer enough water for the next planting season to make up for any water they might have to give up." Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_? Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j81uozwUhq_G7ED28R8sWIQPiKp87UjMKFJXyBjTOMWBGkiUux85E8WLI_nxI7_nVW4e7XDPkSwQwMn2CwJAdIcAfj5vzm9nd9jH5-bXZ_wjPhwPr_DfU73CS75otSvGWvzfvZ2XD3zfvue0uJKXvt5n85KfoYlxyo6ByjLqczr0mEUmJ5ISyjIscXTKNTESOsKJTA0fhOYkpalQHQXoqOogsjlgYCSclFBCEswENjzNSMZ4pweNGH7kJMoZb7Uiy3pT3k-TS_TkojE_reu8PBarEdSL0Zs3ibqYflqDgaDuvLqauJum7wVBTVLJKOc07hnFMRMG4hQbHAbPMiEJw0P4i9bb6tpl2rw2iJZFuY-b6ohABOxMbzeHaFm9P8lqfLjfPHkCrdys7NcF0fJfRSzboty3RbM7Vu3hrTnQtnpvm-rY_v6za-IwIp_3882Oo12ERAx_PZqHntcc_gYAAP__S2-Raw)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j81uozwUhq_G7ED28R8sWIQPiKp87UjMKFJXyBjTOMWBGkiUux85E8WLI_nxI7_nVW4e7XDPkSwQwMn2CwJAdIcAfj5vzm9nd9jH5-bXZ_wjPhwPr_DfU73CS75otSvGWvzfvZ2XD3zfvue0uJKXvt5n85KfoYlxyo6ByjLqczr0mEUmJ5ISyjIscXTKNTESOsKJTA0fhOYkpalQHQXoqOogsjlgYCSclFBCEswENjzNSMZ4pweNGH7kJMoZb7Uiy3pT3k-TS_TkojE_reu8PBarEdSL0Zs3ibqYflqDgaDuvLqauJum7wVBTVLJKOc07hnFMRMG4hQbHAbPMiEJw0P4i9bb6tpl2rw2iJZFuY-b6ohABOxMbzeHaFm9P8lqfLjfPHkCrdys7NcF0fJfRSzboty3RbM7Vu3hrTnQtnpvm-rY_v6za-IwIp_3882Oo12ERAx_PZqHntcc_gYAAP__S2-Raw) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events. Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories. Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries. Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j81uozwUhq_G7ED28R8sWIQPiKp87UjMKFJXyBjTOMWBGkiUux85E8WLI_nxI7_nVW4e7XDPkSwQwMn2CwJAdIcAfj5vzm9nd9jH5-bXZ_wjPhwPr_DfU73CS75otSvGWvzfvZ2XD3zfvue0uJKXvt5n85KfoYlxyo6ByjLqczr0mEUmJ5ISyjIscXTKNTESOsKJTA0fhOYkpalQHQXoqOogsjlgYCSclFBCEswENjzNSMZ4pweNGH7kJMoZb7Uiy3pT3k-TS_TkojE_reu8PBarEdSL0Zs3ibqYflqDgaDuvLqauJum7wVBTVLJKOc07hnFMRMG4hQbHAbPMiEJw0P4i9bb6tpl2rw2iJZFuY-b6ohABOxMbzeHaFm9P8lqfLjfPHkCrdys7NcF0fJfRSzboty3RbM7Vu3hrTnQtnpvm-rY_v6za-IwIp_3882Oo12ERAx_PZqHntcc_gYAAP__S2-Raw)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values. God bless America,

* **TOP NEWS**

"**U.S.-Mexico water agreement might bring relief to parched South Texas,** " Texas Tribune's**Berenice Garcia** -- "The U.S. and Mexico agreed to amend a 1944 water treaty, which might bring some relief to South Texas farmers struggling with scarce water.

The International Water and Boundary Commission, a federal agency that oversees international water treaties between the U.S. and Mexico, announced Saturday that the two countries had signed a highly-anticipated agreement that will give Mexico more options to meet its water deliveries to the U.S. Mexico still needs to give the U.S. more than a million acre-feet of water.

South Texas farmers and ranchers have been devastated lately by low rainfall and Mexico falling behind on its deliveries to the region.

Under the 1944 international treaty, Mexico must deliver 1,750,000 acre-feet of water to the U.S. from six tributaries every five years, or an average of 350,000 every year. But Mexico is at a high risk of not meeting that deadline. The country still has a balance of more than 1.3 million acre-feet of water it needs to deliver by October 2025.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/bec1c48d-5965-465d-9657-b8487e74c949?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The new amendment will allow Mexico to meet its delivery obligations by giving up water that was allotted to the country under the treaty. It also allows Mexico to transfer water it has stored at the Falcon and Amistad international reservoirs to the U.S.

Additionally, the agreement gives Mexico the option of delivering water it doesn't need from the San Juan and Alamo rivers, which are not part of the six tributaries.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/bec1c48d-5965-465d-9657-b8487e74c949?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The amendment also addresses a current offer Mexico made to give the U.S. 120,000 acre-feet of water. South Texas farmers [were wary](https://substack.com/redirect/756fa6f5-0bdc-496d-b068-5370d8f3e085?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the offer because they worried that by accepting the water, the state would later force farmers to make up for it by giving up water they have been storing for next year.

But because the amendment allows Mexico to make use of water in its reservoirs to meet its treaty obligations, the farmers hope the country will transfer enough water for the next planting season to make up for any water they might have to give up." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/7e488472-effa-4a23-8f0a-cd56e0954e27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "U.S.-Mexico water agreement might bring relief to parched South Texas, " Texas Tribune'sBerenice Garcia -- "The U.S. and Mexico agreed to amend a 1944 water treaty, which might bring some relief to South Texas farmers struggling with scarce water. The International Water and Boundary Commission, a federal agency that oversees international water treaties between the U.S. and Mexico, announced Saturday that the two countries had signed a highly-anticipated agreement that will give Mexico more options to meet its water deliveries to the U.S. Mexico still needs to give the U.S. more than a million acre-feet of water. South Texas farmers and ranchers have been devastated lately by low rainfall and Mexico falling behind on its deliveries to the region. Under the 1944 international treaty, Mexico must deliver 1,750,000 acre-feet of water to the U.S. from six tributaries every five years, or an average of 350,000 every year. But Mexico is at a high risk of not meeting that deadline. The country still has a balance of more than 1.3 million acre-feet of water it needs to deliver by October 2025. The new amendment will allow Mexico to meet its delivery obligations by giving up water that was allotted to the country under the treaty. It also allows Mexico to transfer water it has stored at the Falcon and Amistad international reservoirs to the U.S. Additionally, the agreement gives Mexico the option of delivering water it doesn't need from the San Juan and Alamo rivers, which are not part of the six tributaries. The amendment also addresses a current offer Mexico made to give the U.S. 120,000 acre-feet of water. South Texas farmers of the offer because they worried that by accepting the water, the state would later force farmers to make up for it by giving up water they have been storing for next year. But because the amendment allows Mexico to make use of water in its reservoirs to meet its treaty obligations, the farmers hope the country will transfer enough water for the next planting season to make up for any water they might have to give up." FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Complete our CRT survey today
body:
I’m reaching out because you’re an informed patriot who cares about this country.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b23824701294567b1734a4a8ea8996e&_e=GDAAGsTRkxvUv0ZrSfF2Wlyisc7japJauxL0k3egsUCAXz83E-sPGNfftbsyWcl1Y9ELuHxScUtWk0AW1cCJAH2i5dniQqg1fPMo1RKZOiZaaoxfgjX80Q5hfMTuJY6ikz3K8XVtxY3_OhiXu_Ay9olZl7iXkTGcsYH5QnXl7ITmGC_6C-mGiBbPsENmh6ngwVhg73OWb8xpzqBGhlXqbqRcmgaCrBO3jgCH9QplNxsT3V7mmCE2vZQBdaZ902Sp9juictKSZw8fmfwFMYe-P-BlvOVS6_PxNiFe7ZyTZF0TBtolKYMQnEyZntQ6QmPQpGpHSgts0pVIJIL5fug1rG4e_5lSLoIkW2tNiYNEd3ZuGP9JavPWkp50cOt8PYGV)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b23824701294567b1734a4a8ea8996e&_e=GDAAGsTRkxvUv0ZrSfF2Wlyisc7japJauxL0k3egsUCAXz83E-sPGNfftbsyWcl1Y9ELuHxScUtWk0AW1cCJAH2i5dniQqg1fPMo1RKZOiZaaoxfgjX80Q5hfMTuJY6ikz3K8XVtxY3_OhiXu_Ay9olZl7iXkTGcsYH5QnXl7ITmGC_6C-mGiBbPsENmh6ngwVhg73OWb8xpzqBGhlXqbqRcmgaCrBO3jgCH9QplNxvAoxHWGxMI3kYUe1pGjt-loGe9vkAlSIRAZhLa4T3gGuXoIbT2sP0nOt9chxm0ULelJEx6VknIZuL27SNQAch2Ns1W9_9i64wk6-sHHcedyK9ExVlaHbQfxNhI5R39sG0qKqpCZw37jiVw4elTOuCx)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b23824701294567b1734a4a8ea8996e&_e=GDAAGsTRkxvUv0ZrSfF2Wlyisc7japJauxL0k3egsUCAXz83E-sPGNfftbsyWcl1Y9ELuHxScUtWk0AW1cCJAH2i5dniQqg1fPMo1RKZOiZaaoxfgjX80Q5hfMTuJY6ikz3K8XVtxY3_OhiXu_Ay9olZl7iXkTGcsYH5QnXl7ITmGC_6C-mGiBbPsENmh6ngwVhg73OWb8xpzqBGhlXqbqRcmgaCrBO3jgCH9QplNxvn4uFy5zBbe1lCKrYpQHh4a0hbWQqBQrvLSZ-Ql74uDyC0i83GyCgUS-ODzQXxUUVcbZ-TNhH_4c17VeLo_myUbAP96RyrnM__AyHREfC1RP1KQhza7S5Z3tTHTDbDsSd64F4_xos5Nit_stZhHrJS)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b23824701294567b1734a4a8ea8996e&_e=GDAAGsTRkxvUv0ZrSfF2Wlyisc7japJauxL0k3egsUCAXz83E-sPGNfftbsyWcl1Y9ELuHxScUtWk0AW1cCJAH2i5dniQqg1fPMo1RKZOiZaaoxfgjX80Q5hfMTuJY6ikz3K8XVtxY3_OhiXu_Ay9olZl7iXkTGcsYH5QnXl7ITmGC_6C-mGiBbPsENmh6ngwVhg73OWb8xpzqBGhlXqbqRcmgaCrBO3jgCH9QplNxv3vl-blkMON0LVfXsviAYGqCXOJcv-Q3c53jOXP5xi1zDqJ0Ii1XXSO818xTv1GEgGEbxPSrRCo4Xv9C16gNOJWRAkXPVJDnh6HoMA0-s2qBP_NVtiYmkQPREAaixmQiI4Cjy_PIZ02eviftiSi5YT)
---
| |

Defend the Constitution

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Here’s a close race you can help right now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8171%2E5257348%2E8ZhUOD)
Derek — Because of this team, I will be California’s next United States Senator. For that, I am deeply grateful to you.
**But my friend Bob Casey needs your urgent help _right now_.**
In Pennsylvania, the Senate race is currently too close to call. In that state, volunteers are helping with ballot curing measures to make sure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard.
**Nothing is more important to me than defending our democracy, and that means making sure every voice is heard in our elections. That’s why I’m asking:**
[**Will you split a contribution between the recount and ballot curing efforts for Bob Casey in Pennsylvania and my campaign? Your contribution now will help power this work in a race that will come down to the thinnest of margins.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2024_abs_em_casey.n3RhiE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20241111_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8171%2E5257348%2E8ZhUOD)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and the Bob Casey Recount Account will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=nov2024_abs_em_casey.d6KZsJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20241111_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8171%2E5257348%2E8ZhUOD)

With Republicans taking back the Senate majority, we need every last Democratic voice in the U.S. Senate to fight for our democracy and freedoms.
Bob Casey will be a critical vote. He will be an important advocate for reproductive freedoms, Medicare and Social Security benefits, workers’ rights, and far more.
**[Let’s make sure every voter's voice is heard in this crucial race. Please, split a contribution between my campaign and Bob Casey >>](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2024_abs_em_casey.n3RhiE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_RES_AC90_20241111_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=8171%2E5257348%2E8ZhUOD)**
We need to move with urgency here. Your support is greatly appreciated.
More soon,
Adam

subject: Because of you, I DID IT!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lauren Boebert for Congress
body:
| | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=95c7d7f7cd61411d898dcb1eb230b3a0&_e=kaHr9xQ7A4ZCm9yR9R7Mr_5SM00h7BzkjI6Hgcyw8CYMN2MigmLs63K2W-vQLEwyMZHEI_z6W7HZveFv6UiM3m5iaj6oilN6F4I4E8cOkeLOeNKQvjXLTx6EVuYsLo5fz60tPdpidlUrP6VWXtPld5_AbSO4EcVPGURhnHpJ8u1BcbVuiVZd0ftCxLTNajp-3dVD7TtmxvfjVvNUPNJBy0QEWC4e6COKV2IxvH0-C4OPWgETwlAwX8Fw9geiyidCgHpo1FYQKaacWE3ga9vS3XntnrjNWEH_04ZBd76VATajZR8hjldPGq95hd5sz_EbhjCPzbR5yxMpvt0wNx4kouhtUAaz4W5Mhqx-x1IoAalmKye3KUzf7IP77bJixx_50bVq9XAgS1xhxGtTpWsJhhi9qzCROFlubMUaJJkgaF56gSU0OGihyEewXxuRjQ_gNco7MlvfzwpP5_QLSd15OQ%3D%3D)

Peter,
It is because of you that I WON my race. It has been the honor of a lifetime having you on my team.
You've been a part of this movement since the start, which is why I want you to help set priorities for my next term. **
WHAT SHOULD CONGRESS FOCUS ON NEXT YEAR?**
[THE BORDER](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=95c7d7f7cd61411d898dcb1eb230b3a0&_e=kaHr9xQ7A4ZCm9yR9R7Mr_5SM00h7BzkjI6Hgcyw8CYMN2MigmLs63K2W-vQLEwyMZHEI_z6W7HZveFv6UiM3m5iaj6oilN6F4I4E8cOkeLOeNKQvjXLTx6EVuYsLo5fz60tPdpidlUrP6VWXtPld5_AbSO4EcVPGURhnHpJ8u1BcbVuiVZd0ftCxLTNajp-3dVD7TtmxvfjVvNUPNJBy0QEWC4e6COKV2IxvH0-C4OPWgETwlAwX8Fw9geiyidCgHpo1FYQKaacWE3ga9vS3XntnrjNWEH_04ZBd76VATY1YBSsINkQaKKUSDb1uU_0tTuyxIUa3Iw2HXNQZwoW8T6SoJW5IZ4Lh_FOrROg_qYUVIZwAkiDRUHHg2Bw1BIZNGTw90lX-zYuNdOOCBwC02UNUOjfHKBhTEWb3GL1MslzvR_UrC-_CizFfs2wh8oJExD49p4gJ4km0ukDwj9z4w%3D%3D)
[THE ECONOMY](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=95c7d7f7cd61411d898dcb1eb230b3a0&_e=kaHr9xQ7A4ZCm9yR9R7Mr_5SM00h7BzkjI6Hgcyw8CYMN2MigmLs63K2W-vQLEwyMZHEI_z6W7HZveFv6UiM3m5iaj6oilN6F4I4E8cOkeLOeNKQvjXLTx6EVuYsLo5fz60tPdpidlUrP6VWXtPld5_AbSO4EcVPGURhnHpJ8u1BcbVuiVZd0ftCxLTNajp-3dVD7TtmxvfjVvNUPNJBy0QEWC4e6COKV2IxvH0-C4OPWgETwlAwX8Fw9geiyidCgHpo1FYQKaacWE3ga9vS3XntnrjNWEH_04ZBd76VATYD0_F9rEHfCINeMIVMWqi78-LOlSaUEA-YInhxLvmsVYP_qHfRuxLdu6VR1-dkH6Ks0uPdlyfGg0GoksR3HCv_WejJw8KO_vlRlLOK7TX0YFzuc1b_43NSQclWaQs_z5Eahy8GLGuXQInlP5qWdd93hNMGhda-y608ex-a-m2xcw%3D%3D)
[ELECTION INTEGRITY](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=95c7d7f7cd61411d898dcb1eb230b3a0&_e=kaHr9xQ7A4ZCm9yR9R7Mr_5SM00h7BzkjI6Hgcyw8CYMN2MigmLs63K2W-vQLEwyMZHEI_z6W7HZveFv6UiM3m5iaj6oilN6F4I4E8cOkeLOeNKQvjXLTx6EVuYsLo5fz60tPdpidlUrP6VWXtPld5_AbSO4EcVPGURhnHpJ8u1BcbVuiVZd0ftCxLTNajp-3dVD7TtmxvfjVvNUPNJBy0QEWC4e6COKV2IxvH0-C4OPWgETwlAwX8Fw9geiyidCgHpo1FYQKaacWE3ga9vS3XntnrjNWEH_04ZBd76VATY5ywJmvBXknk5YXZiAdZMB4UtnVwH3UtKaxsIMqALRbo2XWGJPwPk00oMnV6yYtT6dltxlhamRRslW-JowjP9APkVkybqfKlzttgcJnYJnx8kBwOf4EqgoeCMB7NjW33dXkUkG9JAjYsEoDCwxGpLpQ3rsvb0TbGK2e0sbJURFgg%3D%3D)
[OTHER](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=95c7d7f7cd61411d898dcb1eb230b3a0&_e=kaHr9xQ7A4ZCm9yR9R7Mr_5SM00h7BzkjI6Hgcyw8CYMN2MigmLs63K2W-vQLEwyMZHEI_z6W7HZveFv6UiM3m5iaj6oilN6F4I4E8cOkeLOeNKQvjXLTx6EVuYsLo5fz60tPdpidlUrP6VWXtPld5_AbSO4EcVPGURhnHpJ8u1BcbVuiVZd0ftCxLTNajp-3dVD7TtmxvfjVvNUPNJBy0QEWC4e6COKV2IxvH0-C4OPWgETwlAwX8Fw9geiyidCgHpo1FYQKaacWE3ga9vS3XntnrjNWEH_04ZBd76VATZTTAobqAHlo47jf92Xb_eiDSg1_cze2RvkefpM9ZRS7oT0iSE_7-Nnm836n7hIaiBlohVlu5grtrTSVlo_7StXsMUEaeW2cQQ3hraIZtm1U0O4YFmHzB7LZMXFDOezGwSTYw-ztkqYonDDMFVlBOyo-oMkk4R9F5lNV7F6jqzS5Q%3D%3D)

I want to know what I should focus on next. [**I trust you more than anyone, Fellow Conservative >>**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=95c7d7f7cd61411d898dcb1eb230b3a0&_e=kaHr9xQ7A4ZCm9yR9R7Mr_5SM00h7BzkjI6Hgcyw8CYMN2MigmLs63K2W-vQLEwyMZHEI_z6W7HZveFv6UiM3m5iaj6oilN6F4I4E8cOkeLOeNKQvjXLTx6EVuYsLo5fz60tPdpidlUrP6VWXtPld5_AbSO4EcVPGURhnHpJ8u1BcbVuiVZd0ftCxLTNajp-3dVD7TtmxvfjVvNUPNJBy0QEWC4e6COKV2IxvH0-C4OPWgETwlAwX8Fw9geiyidCgHpo1FYQKaacWE3ga9vS3XntnrjNWEH_04ZBd76VATYI2yr0wiZ9kNmQvqc1vcpPofbIPXS5WT_dHr4wTU4mUOA1_65YcQTFCFxEyCuDMxrt7TkwWmkObomuAtSeP59BPEROZEjnT-Wi2hUhz3iU5diqQGijYxxhGMHWCh5BJYKOmIk-Sz9NbO6i1Ek1nwA_SrEQH0EJXMHnemyB8SwaRQ%3D%3D)
I couldn't have done this without you, and I can't wait to get back to Congress and keep fighting for you.

Thanks for everything, Lauren Boebert

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: We’ve been through a lot, but we’re not done yet.
body:
Peter: it’s tough.
I’m not going to lie to you. Our lead in Arizona continues to shrink, and there are still a considerable number of uncounted ballots across my state.
I don’t want to rile you up unnecessarily after everything you’ve been through over the last week, but I need all hands on deck now to ensure we hold the line.
I need you to chip in to my campaign as we fight to the final result. We have to secure this seat. Split $25 with The Real Texas PAC to help us get there. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?refcode=111024_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC and Ruben Gallego will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?express_lane=true&refcode=111024_1&amount=5]

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?express_lane=true&refcode=111024_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?express_lane=true&refcode=111024_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-ruben?refcode=111024_1&amount=25]
Thank you,
Ruben

Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. subject: Urgent update on my race

Friend,

The AP called the PA Senate race and named me the winner.

I'm leading my Democrat opponent Bob Casey. And the lead continues GROWING as the final votes are tallied.

We're ahead, and make no mistake, we WON this race.

But while votes continue to be counted, Bob Casey and his allies are organizing a potential recount, and we won't be caught flat-footed. I'm asking for your support.

**[Can I count on you to chip in $25 today to help us keep up our fight?](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkb2u3CAQhZ8Gd7b4MxcXFFEsN9FNkSYlwjDrRQs2Apx9_QhnV2kv5eHMp08zvz_1p_HB79tPE0E9bNa56AxOR2uPHL199GdypoKmmPKekJ4QzTqn3GSFER0o8sEIG7mccHdXhLuRjKsFydfRuhEzzARbOYYbiNvkOq8ah7QnqRzl4EYxSWqoYwQTySfEsQmQ6_AASPbYtwylZEjnGrw1-2CP2AV1rzUVxL4huiC6FLBnhuHp9wyuNRBd_vsng-iSjlJ7CGCrP_YeovGhN9cPYstZo64WsfnH91_92w9RkRs3-31DbK75BERFq0Zw_oyIzenivNJynNkCYnMu-iJfqTUxGb_tiM3_wFjq5vJWuQjsNWBiTUfxLW_9LiuXnj4EX8QH4nhr3WsB9euX-qPo3wAAAP__92KeZw)**

name: Action Needed
subject: re: your ballot in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there, we have an urgent request regarding this year's election.

If you voted by mail or you voted a provisional ballot, there may be steps you need to take to make sure your vote is counted.

**Step 1: Check your ballot status.**

If you voted _by mail,_ visit [**vote.pa/MailBallotStatus**](https://go.dscc.org/go/20732?t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241111-ActionNeeded-PABallotCureAsk-PA-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241111-ActionNeeded-PABallotCureAsk-PA-sl1&akid=18907%2E9716520%2EgL0dBE) to check if your ballot was received. If the status column reads "Record - Ballot Returned," then your ballot has been counted.

If you voted _in person or voted a provisional ballot,_ you must call your County Board of Elections to check the status of your ballot. Go to [**padems.org/cure**](https://go.dscc.org/go/20697?t=2&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241111-ActionNeeded-PABallotCureAsk-PA-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241111-ActionNeeded-PABallotCureAsk-PA-sl1&akid=18907%2E9716520%2EgL0dBE) to find the contact information for your county.

**Step 2: If needed, make your ballot count.**

If there is an issue with your ballot, it's easy to fix, but you need to act quickly.

**The deadline to fix any issues with your ballot is _tomorrow,_ _Tuesday, November 12th_ in most counties. Please take action to make sure your vote is counted as soon as possible.**

You can find information on how to make your ballot count at [**padems.org/cure**](https://go.dscc.org/go/20697?t=3&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241111-ActionNeeded-PABallotCureAsk-PA-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241111-ActionNeeded-PABallotCureAsk-PA-sl1&akid=18907%2E9716520%2EgL0dBE), or reach out to our Voter Protection Hotline at 1-833-728-6837 with any questions.

**Step 3: Check in with your friends and family to make sure their ballots are counted.**

Make sure that the folks in your community who took the time to vote are set, too – you can forward them this email, or direct them to the Voter Protection Hotline.

The Senate race is extremely close, and the stakes in this election could not be higher. With votes still being counted, your vote could make the difference. It's never been more important to make sure that your vote counts!

Thank you,

Team DSCC
---
| |
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2024-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=4&refcode2=18907_9716520_gL0dBE&akid=18907%2E9716520%2EgL0dBE)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=18907%2E9716520%2EgL0dBE)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=18907%2E9716520%2EgL0dBE)** to unsubscribe.

Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc.org](https://www.dscc.org/)** | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

body:
We’re putting together a BEAUTIFUL thank you note for President Trump- will you sign it?

|
---
| | |
Hey there, Friend.

Sorry to bother you, but we're finalizing our thank you note to President Trump and I didn't see your name.

So I wanted to give you another chance to sign it before we ship it off. **[Would you like to sign House GOP's thank you note to President Trump?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eYxIkPHW9j3UN_QlHhiGYw~~/AARclAA~~~ "Would you like to sign House GOP’s thank you note to President Trump?")**

I hope to see your name soon. Thank you for being such a generous supporter of our movement!

Yours in patriotism,

Triston
House GOP

Yours in patriotism, Triston House GOP \---------- Forwarded Message --------- From: House Republicans Subject: Last chance to add your name to our thank you note To: ~~ "dpwillis67@gmail.com" President Trump, we love you. ~~ "Join House GOP and sign our BEAUTIFUL thank you letter of LOVE to President Trump!" | | | ~~ "Generic Button" President Trump has done so much for us over these past few years, and he's going to do it all again during his second administration! For that, he deserves a BIG thank you! ~~ "Say “thank you President Trump” and sign House GOP’s letter to him today!" | | | ~~ "Generic Button" The deep state, the fake news media, and the rest of the radical left have been put on notice. Our country is going to be made great again, and it 's going to be made great again soon. But for now, we need to stand together and say thank you to the man who made it all possible- President Donald J. Trump. ~~ "Will you sign this letter right away?" | | | ~~ "Generic Button" America first, House GOP | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ~ NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (21818). NRCC is happy to help at 888-606-1023. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. MessFreqMayVary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. Message frequency may vary. Terms and Conditions ~~. Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

subject: The danger is not on the horizon – it’s here
body:
The election news is cause for concern, but our climate should be cause for alarm

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..nHC0E7AdszHPEPBJm1BEkCAQdg57XxFLFScFhugZ88k?) for more
---
NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [The danger is not on the horizon - it's here](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151509056&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNTA5MDU2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzEzNTAyOTMsImV4cCI6MTczMzk0MjI5MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BFCcfk-3xHF7bhFelz7E6QG1_bzlepibHe-b0Y_rP1k)
### The election news is cause for concern, but our climate should be cause for alarm
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Nov 11
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151509056&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNTA5MDU2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMTM1MDI5MywiZXhwIjoxNzMzOTQyMjkzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjYxODI2MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LGEupz7PJ0RWXyFMJaXPhOjFQLv2U2KXtWX7lL9cQm8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151509056&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNTA5MDU2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzEzNTAyOTMsImV4cCI6MTczMzk0MjI5MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BFCcfk-3xHF7bhFelz7E6QG1_bzlepibHe-b0Y_rP1k&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151509056&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNTA5MDU2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzEzNTAyOTMsImV4cCI6MTczMzk0MjI5MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BFCcfk-3xHF7bhFelz7E6QG1_bzlepibHe-b0Y_rP1k)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcGF1bGFueTIxL3AvdGhlLWRhbmdlci1pcy1ub3Qtb24tdGhlLWhvcml6b24_.JuyD6d8CdeWYAz-AA2HVFwSkzMLLhwwgeTIV9SP6FJc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paulany21/p/the-danger-is-not-on-the-horizon?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---
### Stefanik's new gig
The phone has been ringing, and my text screen has lit up repeatedly as [news of Elise Stefanik's appointment as UN Ambassador hits the headlines.](https://substack.com/redirect/a410afe3-7439-4164-b790-e9b59aaf7c39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Though the composition of the U.S. House of Representatives is not clear, it is likely that Republicans will maintain a majority, thus giving them the trifecta of the House, the Senate, and the Executive Office.
Still -- it would be nice to have another Democrat in there in the seat for NY-21, fighting the good fight.
### Here is what happens now
In case you missed my remarks last week, the procedure will be that Stefanik has to accept the offer, and the Senate has to approve her. I don't see any problem there. Then, Governor Kathy Hochul will call for a Special Election. I think - but I am not 100% sure - that the Governor has to call a Special Election within 10 days of a vacancy. The local party leaders will select candidates. I just ran, plus I already announced my candidacy for 2026. I remain hopeful that I will be selected by the county chairs of NY-21 to run. I do need to address my weak area, which is fundraising. S.O.S. on the fundraising issue. I'm back to interviewing fundraising resource teams this week.
The NY Times called Stefanik's district a "safe district for the party." I think NY-21 is more accurately described as a district that has suffered a lack of investment from the party. I'm still working on my Substack article on "Can we talk about the money." Stay tuned.
### Don't break out the champagne
Of all possible cabinet seats, the choice of Stefanik for the role as UN Ambassador is particularly unsettling. We can expect her to recommend to Congress that the U.S. should de-fund the UN, pull back on U.S. participation on any international matter that does not align with Putin's interests, and stand as an obstacle to any progress by the UN in terms of climate change, women's equality, or the safety of LGBT people throughout the world.
Don't write her off. Stefanik's most damaging work may lie ahead.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a71a55ab-7ab5-4e6b-86de-1e93dc0bbd09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
AP Photo, Seth Wenig, June 7, 2023. Accessed on Nov 11, 2024, at https://apnews.com/article/wildfires-canada-quebec-3291016eaa4905177c90feae02a139c5
### The effects of climate change in New York
As I said in the last month on the campaign trail, we really should be focused on the acceleration of the impact of climate change (aside from the fact, of course, that rising fascism is its own existential meltdown).
### As bitter a pill as this election has been to swallow, try swallowing it with no water.
Maybe I'm naive, but I did not think we would see a water supply issue in New York City in my lifetime.
As it turns out, the danger is not on the horizon - it's here.
(Full disclosure: I read a very similar line last week in my doom scrolling, but now I can't find the author in order to attribute it properly. Was it Rebecca Solnit who said it? If you know, please tell me in the comments. The context of the remark was Trump's second term. For now, I am using the line to underscore the realities of climate change.)
On the campaign trail, I spoke frequently about how upstate New York could become a desirable destination for people relocating due to the effects of climate change. That still may happen in the upstate counties.
Caution though. On November 2, 2024, while we were watching candidates criss-cross the country in a last-minute pitch for votes, New York City Eric Adams [issued a drought watch](https://substack.com/redirect/4ca8379c-515c-4aa6-b9e0-81afab63dbe6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the five boroughs.
Pause and reflect on that.
### Manhattan is an island, and it is under a drought watch.
There were [fires in Brooklyn, at the beloved Prospect Park](https://substack.com/redirect/e0eeb187-8c97-4610-9b1a-0414bafd8ae2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The fires are somewhat being downplayed by [members of the press who blame "vagrants"](https://substack.com/redirect/668e4c19-a610-4c7b-8efc-da4daf53adda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the fires. Of course. Blame the poor people and homeless.
I don't know. One brush fire in a city park could ruin my whole day. Do I really want to parse whose fault it is?
The fires in Prospect Park are alarming because they were not the only fires in the tri-state area. The New York Times [reported fires in New York, New Jersey, and Connecticut](https://substack.com/redirect/e83739ed-96c0-415c-b62a-74634d5b5a8a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), with smoke choking up air quality for miles around.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/69f98243-c05f-454e-b8f5-8d604bd0240f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
New Jersey and Connecticut have seen hundreds of brush fires during the unseasonably dry fall season. Dakota Santiago for The New York Times. Accessed Nov 11, 2024 at https://www.nytimes.com/2024/11/08/nyregion/wildfires-drought-new-jersey-connecticut.html
It wasn't that long ago that New York City endured the [effects of smoke and smog from wildfires in Canada.](https://substack.com/redirect/b6ec9b01-777e-4ab7-ba9c-88012497ce73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) In June of 2023, the air quality from wildfires in Canada caused public events in NYC to be cancelled, including two [Shakespeare in the Park performances of Hamlet](https://substack.com/redirect/f0cfd644-afc5-4550-b071-7d39d8f33ad4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
You may not care about seeing Hamlet in Central Park, but my point is that climate change is now impacting some of the uniquely New York activities that people enjoy doing.
### The New York City watershed is at risk
Most cataclysmic is the thought that the [current wildfires in New York are in the city's watershed in the Catskills. ](https://substack.com/redirect/8b7876fc-8823-4d1d-90c1-88cf65839303?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In case you don't know, the [Catskill Water Supply System](https://substack.com/redirect/5d51e455-22e6-49a0-a978-5128cf948ddf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is one of the main sources of water for New York City.
New York Governor Kathy Hochul has [deployed state resources to fight the wildfires](https://substack.com/redirect/c59d0303-01c8-4c09-9a37-401678ad29ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in New York.
But will it be enough? Friends from the city report to me that they are masking up again, using asthma inhalers more, and going out less frequently.
And there is precious little coverage of it in the mainstream press.
[Here is a 33-second news clip from a local news channel.](https://substack.com/redirect/8b7876fc-8823-4d1d-90c1-88cf65839303?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Homework for you: try to find out what will happen if a watershed burns. A simple Google search reveals only tiny bits of information, such as the fact that the vegetation around it would be damaged, and therefore evaporation would occur at accelerated rates. Smoke, ash, and sediment would impact the water supply. The taste of the water will change. Other than that, either we don't know or nobody has written extensively about it.
New York City Department of Environmental Protection Commissioner Rohit Aggarwala [reports ](https://substack.com/redirect/d416d573-42b1-4208-a41c-c379e55c9218?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)that as much as 1 billion gallons of water are used each day in New York City. Last week's drought watch is the first level of three, and calls for consumers to voluntarily cut back on water usage. Imagine the impact of the third stage of the drought levels, which would result in water rationing.
### With Stefanik as UN Ambassador, don't rely on a UN emphasis on Climate Justice to help poor kids in Brooklyn
As we might expect, there is a socio-economic impact. If you have an office job, maybe you can work from home with an air purification system of your choosing. If you have a job in the service industry, you're suiting up and showing up and taking whatever air purifier your boss does (or does not) provide.
Conserve your precious oxygen. I don't expect our new UN Ambassador to delve too deep into the intricacies of climate justice.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate for New York's 21st Congressional District. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _
[Pledge your support](https://substack..fD16rltkoJnZWrMnsIPpFI3d_9l0BlLVKvifCtqH6jA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151509056)
---
| | | [Like](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151509056&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNTA5MDU2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMTM1MDI5MywiZXhwIjoxNzMzOTQyMjkzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjYxODI2MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LGEupz7PJ0RWXyFMJaXPhOjFQLv2U2KXtWX7lL9cQm8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [Comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=151509056&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxNTA5MDU2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzEzNTAyOTMsImV4cCI6MTczMzk0MjI5MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BFCcfk-3xHF7bhFelz7E6QG1_bzlepibHe-b0Y_rP1k&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [Restack](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcGF1bGFueTIxL3AvdGhlLWRhbmdlci1pcy1ub3Qtb24tdGhlLWhvcml6b24_.JuyD6d8CdeWYAz-AA2HVFwSkzMLLhwwgeTIV9SP6FJc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Democrats are refusing to concede in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
Dave McCormick needs your help

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33f1eda2e74b4a45a602f3229fdb504f&_e=ZrULcq2Rn8-wrhIv8OfjbhvrFVRLgDchWMQf9LrG1jbJgD21PMpE8iLM7_HDXafUI6rp7Di8aDhkl5ksh1qnmHTzPbcUr3Lv4AO8ijWp8Ly6T11mKbIhZZ5A2deM9tp7nY8IB0ecCRSfAWyEL6tiQgpuzLd1VX0xUAGj7z8b7ocYVwdy1ZMIQGnmoLVR-5y_tqeRF80rM9X3IVPN7Sc_eFwDPe4zaUhnJiQlFhFUIkmb7-wV8TSzxfu7mNUaZ8pkg-zPJHFe67J9J3SPYt7JaauJ97Ev4_Udr9UblA_yyOgA4PPMDvOI0tnOR8AfoKeiP5KWKZ_o-UxRoWlwEtDOYKoZNxZChAyMO0t85z5X4R3JFAeQQdOvnbkVGY4pC5SGOzQ5nDFsy09dqIU4V5TSkQDOP_XGi1KmeS-5pspb264%3D)

Friend,

It's Ted Cruz with an urgent request.

The Senate race in Pennsylvania has been called and Republican Dave McCormick won fair and square.

_**But Democrat Bob Casey and his liberal allies are refusing to concede. We have to stop liberals from stealing this election.**_

**[That's where you come in.
