name: Genesis Code
subject: The most dangerous man in America?
body:
|
---
Dear Patriot,
Have you ever heard of this guy?
[ ](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)
His name is Alejandro Mayorkas. He's the Secretary of Homeland Security.
That means his job is to keep America safe. And that includes securing the border.
_Well, we all know how that's going._
But there's more to this story. When you dig into Mayorka's background, something shocking emerges...
It’s so explosive, I now consider him one of the most dangerous men in America.
But don’t expect mainstream media to cover this. That's why I've just released **[a scathing documentary](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)** that blows the lid off Mayorkas, the southern border invasion, and the threat of terrorist attacks on the homeland (which even the FBI admits is higher than EVER).
It's currently streaming free of charge, on a private, uncensored website.
I recommend you watch it now, because if even 10% of it is true, we are headed for some very chaotic times.
**[Click here to watch the uncensored expose...](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)**

name: Neil Parrott
subject: Counting Update - Veterans Day
body:
Freedom is not free, and it takes work from our military to stop outside threats. It takes work from U.S. citizens to stop inside threats. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us2.campaign-archive.com/?e=5a45ee1154&u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=a6b9e36d0d)
---
|
---
| | Peter,

Happy Veterans Day! Thank you to all who have served and are currently serving our country in the military.

Freedom is not free, and it takes work from our military to stop outside threats. It takes work from U.S. citizens to stop inside threats.

Having said that, I also want to thank everyone who has been supporting my race for US Congress. We love our country, we are thankful for our freedoms, and we want to make sure that every vote is counted legally and just once. Could you help with a donation today?

Right now, volunteers are in Montgomery County observing the continued counting of the vote-by-mail ballots. We plan to be in all 5 counties on Wednesday to observe the almost 20,000 provisional ballots to be counted in District 6. We are going to continue to monitor the mail-in ballot counting that will continue in Frederick and Montgomery Counties tomorrow and into Saturday.

If you have time this week, could you help our team to watch the provisional or regular mail-in ballot counting? Please respond to this email if you are able to help.
---
| [Send $10 Right Now](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=caf6201678&e=5a45ee1154 "Send $10 Right Now")
---
| [Send $25 Right Now](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=a73e59ae74&e=5a45ee1154 "Send $25 Right Now")
---
| [Send $50 Right Now](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=b5cf9c4bef&e=5a45ee1154 "Send $50 Right Now")
---
| [Send $100 Right Now](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=2c4801f648&e=5a45ee1154 "Send $100 Right Now")
---
| UPDATE: Right now the race shows 51.98% for Delaney and 47.81% for Parrott.

The AP Press called this race as one of the last ones in the country for Delaney late on Saturday night. Even so, almost 10% of the votes remain to be counted.

**Please continue to pray that God would be with our entire team through this time. ****Also, I ask for your immediate help to make sure every ballot is properly counted. **

Could you donate right now to help make sure the count is performed accurately?
---
| [DONATE $10](https://mdpetitions.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=21a75fded7&e=5a45ee1154 "DONATE $10")

| **__Thank you for your help and for your prayers.__**

For our country,
Neil

We gave it everything we had and now we're running on empty. "Can you rush an emergency donation to our Election Fund today to help finish this fight?" | | Dear Friend,

I'm thrilled to introduce an extraordinary opportunity for you...

Perhaps you've wondered where the artwork accompanying the lectures in our free online courses comes from. We hear this especially for one of our most popular courses, "The Genesis Story."

The Book of Genesis has inspired some of Western Civilization's greatest artists to produce iconic works. You may be familiar with Michelangelo's "The Creation of Adam" and Rembrandt's "The Sacrifice of Issac."

I can still remember seeing "The Creation of Adam" right after I graduated from Hillsdale at the Sistine Chapel...

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=91ec731a61a94aa09f1a6f383e82bef8&_e=byPq_Qbx8jwPULyzVzIFXkO7wOgPG20xIANzZ8HwyzPKP_E9NadJz0OpwmUgbQObmXp183lMZAUow5taLekTY0W-I5udilNlGdoJHeTO0SnojLqPImFSEHMQPn5TqR_zOSRV7nnRFhUdSKNIkokvYBdqI4CLJFM9qaIFuTLNlpDLz9cYQSuqDNxdpeS_C6QBqf1SEoA-OnFEus11zb2dCZKvLNJ7ju51wGjHVBrcOUoT010vnMKawrWp0CxEeEoVxRSUYGfPvxZ96tHvKxR81IiLth9Z-2JtjFXy_xbfMy5y9_8q3AQ0-V_BJnLKgiF6JxCliUeMkXQW9RLay_5SM1_M7toDgHn1Tr2ruxjq9gcfrjX6PvNZ8pwS2KcI59JycxxhMMQVKgYXg1xYNDm1pspPMygTG_k8XiHY39L7KD0%3D) **We 've compiled these paintings, along with many others featured in this course, into a brand-new coffee table book, "The Genesis Story: Course Companion." And I'd like you to receive a copy.**

With this exclusive book--available only from Hillsdale College--you can read the passages from the Book of Genesis that led Michelangelo, Rembrandt, Gustave Dore, and other masters to create these incredible works of art.

And with these works all in one place, you and your family can enjoy page after page of divinely inspired art.

**You can reserve your copy of "The Genesis Story: Course Companion," an exclusive hard-cover book from Hillsdale College, for a generous donation of $100 or more by clicking the secure link below: **

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/genesis-story-course-companion-book](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=91ec731a61a94aa09f1a6f383e82bef8&_e=byPq_Qbx8jwPULyzVzIFXkO7wOgPG20xIANzZ8HwyzPKP_E9NadJz0OpwmUgbQObmXp183lMZAUow5taLekTY0W-I5udilNlGdoJHeTO0SnojLqPImFSEHMQPn5TqR_zOSRV7nnRFhUdSKNIkokvYBdqI4CLJFM9qaIFuTLNlpDLz9cYQSuqDNxdpeS_C6QBqf1SEoA-OnFEus11zb2dCZKvLNJ7ju51wGjHVBrcOUoT010vnMKawrWp0CxEeEoVG4OixDrt6Ai849ZVRCgRZup6a5Rouc3wDTmm8i0uyH0SEW35_83eT-sKDOGenD0j64zmyTXbc5DnTbM_WfMflHanuiChW8on1eP16lKt-TxvvXNrZnxZ5chWOidJIFoI-hcpf0wQDL5d9ClVmesUoo0uUVeErRzj23l6YKnAyEg%3D)**

Thanks again for your continued support and generosity. I hope you'll enjoy this beautiful book.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---

## Mercer and Main Project – Meeting Tonight at 6 PM
| | |
---
|
---
Dear Neighbors, Tonight, **Monday, November 11th, at 6 PM at City Hall** , the **Board of Zoning Appeals **will consider a variance for the Mercer and Main Project led by Tom Dahlia. This initiative, supported by a federal grant to clean up an EPA hazard site, is a vital part of improving our community and enhancing Main Street. Unfortunately, recent efforts to improve Ward 1 have faced opposition, putting valuable assets and projects at risk. That’s why it’s so important that we show up tonight to demonstrate our support for this project. We want the council to know that we are committed to seeing this development succeed, bringing the community enhancement intended by the developer. Please join us to speak up in favor of the Mercer and Main Project. Together, we can ensure that our community’s voice is heard loud and clear. **Thank you for your support!**
|
---
|
## Can't Join Us Tonight?
No problem! Jump into the conversation and share your thoughts on the incredible transformation happening at the site over the past months. This is a community-led discussion – your voice matters! Click below to join us on Facebook and let’s chat about the future of Mercer and Main together.

clean_body: | | | | Ends MIDNIGHT tonight! 🇺🇸 Veterans Day Sale – Get Your Tickets for the 2024 Advance Today! 🇺🇸 The 2024 Advance is shaping up to be the most attended in recent history! As we prepare to gather in Charlottesville and celebrate the historic Republican victories across the Commonwealth and the nation, the excitement is building, and spots are filling up fast. To all who have served our nation in the military , we thank you for your courage, dedication, and sacrifice. Your service is an inspiration to us all. 🎟️ Veterans Day Special : Save 15% on all tickets with code USA at checkout. ⏰ This offer ends at midnight TONIGHT , so act fast and lock in your spot at the 2024 Advance for less! We can’t wait to see you there! | Our room block at the Forum Hotel is officially full, but we still have a limited number of rooms available at our alternative locations. Click below to book your room now —and make sure to purchase your ticket at the same time to secure both your accommodation and event access! Reminder: A ticket purchase is required to confirm your hotel reservation. Don't wait—book today to guarantee your spot! | | Thank you for your continued support, and we hope to see you in December! The Republican Party of Virginia PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA ==

name: Stop Oligarchy via Our Revolution
subject: Bernie - "Elon Musk – the richest guy in the world – is allowed to pour zillions of dollars into Donald Trump's presidential campaign"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1011?refcode=email-20241111_v&akid=7217%2E5885482%2EGH1y0N ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis — Elon Musk,
Big Oil executives, crypto billionaires, and right-wing mega donors were
able to dump massive amounts of money into this election and elect Donald
Trump.

Bernie pointed out how outrageous it is that, “Elon Musk – the richest guy
in the world – is allowed to pour zillions of dollars into Donald Trump's
presidential campaign.” Musk is set to become even more powerful and even
richer as a member of the Trump administration. Our movement must fight
the billionaire class with everything we’ve got.

Bernie also acknowledged that billionaires funded BOTH campaigns. This is
not simply a right-wing problem — both parties cater to the interests of
CEOs and the billionaire class. But under Trump and Musk, we will see the
oligarchy become even more powerful, get even more tax breaks, and even
more opportunities to privatize government services.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241111nd&akid=7217%2E5885482%2EGH1y0N ]We have a lot of work to do to build a unified working-class front against
Trump, Musk, and the billionaire class. Will you chip in and help us fight
the billionaire class and Trump?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20241111nd&akid=7217%2E5885482%2EGH1y0N ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241111nd&akid=7217%2E5885482%2EGH1y0N ]CHIP IN $22

Who dumped money into the election and stands to gain the most from
Trump’s election? Bernie had it right:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20459?t=1060&akid=7217%2E5885482%2EGH1y0N ][IMG]

Our post-election survey respondents said they’re very fearful of how
Trump will empower ultra-rich oligarchs like Elon Musk, give even more tax
breaks to the rich, and weaponize the government against the people.

This is the time our movement must stick together and keep the fight
going. We know Trump and Musk won’t stop their work to increase their own
power and profits, and the power and profits of CEOs and big corporations
all across America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20445?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241111nd&akid=7217%2E5885482%2EGH1y0N ]To help us fight Trump, Musk, and the billionaire class, can you make a
donation today? We have a lot of work to do in these next few weeks and we
need your support to make change.

Thank you,

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Take back the libraries
body:
Well... Times have certainly changed.

| | | Well... Times have certainly changed.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d725d1181592464d97eca125dfc89450&_e=HQ-ASmAYXK0lnlPiQhHXC11MdkRmBhonyDm1Gm6qyoTEcTQBUOLCqvxtKE_yPwmBhzwM9zNHTAXPECui_RjYR10bTme8doMRIyxNtzUjgt4BKuZuR2tp11XIynWw_a1HI-1ifQX9CwOJzEgPJHUWixnwUeiE3nJUGr7JMdkHpwkodYqSkeoZjZG-F05pg56pfPPDSGQX62DGrt7KA-c6HQTCMolLhmUU8-QAPJaBL_NBMyfz-5NDoa6hyrVl8Dt_NgRiNWHGuW4QqMzhzGZv0jG9ETbI5BXDfCb4kNbuloZtuhepWwircWA9pIh_9ZbAxgNXeTKge5tmTC2eXuhSh7f4fI3XHAra141E6iVMr9atA-LsLBYHAoLhAzJ-3t2WFyZY6HrmKc0zZrQTUiyrQJOyM4TUhG2BojMx8WDWU_A%3D)
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library discovering classic stories like _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_?Well... Times have certainly changed. Nowadays the president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians are calling _Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist" and are promoting books that push anti-family, activist messages to young children.
---
| | Instead of discovering the classics like Treasure Island and Charlotte's Web, they want kids to go to "Drag Queen Story Hours" that feature books like _Woke Baby_ , _A is for Activist_ , and _The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish_ \-- teaching children to "raise their fists" and embrace radical ideologies.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d725d1181592464d97eca125dfc89450&_e=HQ-ASmAYXK0lnlPiQhHXC11MdkRmBhonyDm1Gm6qyoTEcTQBUOLCqvxtKE_yPwmBhzwM9zNHTAXPECui_RjYR10bTme8doMRIyxNtzUjgt4BKuZuR2tp11XIynWw_a1HI-1ifQX9CwOJzEgPJHUWixnwUeiE3nJUGr7JMdkHpwkodYqSkeoZjZG-F05pg56pfPPDSGQX62DGrt7KA-c6HQTCMolLhmUU8-QAPJaBL_NBMyfz-5NDoa6hyrVl8Dt_O2mhCqCnrH4_cfklbK9PCmUYt_G35yI2H-gyv0SvbeYGo7-2nVBVHTAnqnRFwldNa7zxRu3rLis7i_wULDPceL-7qSt3HEZKKMcreBK8U1L2Dy6IZe9Baa2W_V4d9W1abZxLehmarXolsrsPTTLOoYGcgOTgetDBBi9UFxLWXfw%3D)
---
| | This is happening in libraries across the country, not just in liberal cities. **Our taxpayer-funded libraries are grooming a new generation to reject Godly and conservative values.** That's why we need your help to [**Take Back Our Libraries**.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d725d1181592464d97eca125dfc89450&_e=HQ-ASmAYXK0lnlPiQhHXC11MdkRmBhonyDm1Gm6qyoTEcTQBUOLCqvxtKE_yPwmBhzwM9zNHTAXPECui_RjYR10bTme8doMRIyxNtzUjgt4BKuZuR2tp11XIynWw_a1HI-1ifQX9CwOJzEgPJHUWixnwUeiE3nJUGr7JMdkHpwkodYqSkeoZjZG-F05pg56pfPPDSGQX62DGrt7KA-c6HQTCMolLhmUU8-QAPJaBL_NBMyfz-5NDoa6hyrVl8Dt_ZaS3cE6YbmdngL0cvacHe0p7S6w-0RsBkzVlwgA87ipv0n3xolqr1QvHkhOAtq1ZYYlJJzOaxbrKuzusanS235mnCLYyrw0W4jMP3afx-HDqJlti9ZQ81nDsrtVagua9uFNizisAYkxyWNdJ_mWP5qJhgQ-mKW_q3uUBsQ1IcTg%3D) My name is Kirk Cameron. With Brave Books, I created _As You Grow_ , teaching children to grow in wisdom through faith. Together, we've launched wholesome Story Hours, but radical librarians and the ALA have tried to shut us out, scheming to keep us from hosting events.Despite this, thousands of families have joined us at our Story Hours, pledging allegiance, singing "God Bless America," and sharing Godly values through wholesome stories.Now, Brave Books has started the "See You at the Library" movement to empower parents, grandparents, and patriots like you to host Story Hours at your local libraries.Our mission is simple: **reclaim childhood innocence and preserve family values.** To reach our goal of 100,000 children next year, we need your help to send "Story Hour Kits" to every committed patriot. Each kit includes books, flags, stickers, Bible verse cards, and everything needed to bring traditional values to public libraries. **[**Will you sponsor a Story Hour Kit with a gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d725d1181592464d97eca125dfc89450&_e=HQ-ASmAYXK0lnlPiQhHXC11MdkRmBhonyDm1Gm6qyoTEcTQBUOLCqvxtKE_yPwmBhzwM9zNHTAXPECui_RjYR10bTme8doMRIyxNtzUjgt4BKuZuR2tp11XIynWw_a1HI-1ifQX9CwOJzEgPJHUWixnwUeiE3nJUGr7JMdkHpwkodYqSkeoZjZG-F05pg56pfPPDSGQX62DGrt7KA-c6HQTCMolLhmUU8-QAPJaBL_NBMyfz-5NDoa6hyrVl8Dt_3unRsfrS-7MOZmuMb5D6tKNtEqbVdDY7tSoV7pjET50Oh70dlOLHzQzHhyBDbFKLhhwfclja86JeCOZiZm83MmWN7OpRpyLr5UtiEsRT15DZ-QvLM2sIoHLiUKM1kwxQ56HhDhBbqC6Xt44S0jNc2NXUECP_oPDS9LhjhNRcE9o%3D)** A gift of **$175** sponsors one entire kit, reaching 50 children with wholesome, patriotic messages. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items.Thank you for helping us protect our libraries and restore Godly values.God bless America,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d725d1181592464d97eca125dfc89450&_e=HQ-ASmAYXK0lnlPiQhHXC11MdkRmBhonyDm1Gm6qyoTEcTQBUOLCqvxtKE_yPwmBhzwM9zNHTAXPECui_RjYR10bTme8doMRIyxNtzUjgt4BKuZuR2tp11XIynWw_a1HI-1ifQX9CwOJzEgPJHUWixnwUeiE3nJUGr7JMdkHpwkodYqSkeoZjZG-F05pg56pfPPDSGQX62DGrt7KA-c6HQTCMolLhmUU8-QAPJaBL_NBMyfz-5NDoa6hyrVl8Dt_bQeS5-BgTZkre4P0LpgYWwiuCq0GR6QAoqk-TSY603rUPc5ebXPHyD7gX6rrWX4vNeOq-a1mgaMS6o-yzwqjlt7I2DWvy7cRtF-rWd6ukC-7LeiyA9xUyWR-gEmDXuaJc5xbH2IjGziEVClAaquSDznkHLHszNwl-nJvi5h96rE%3D)
---

**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**

Let us pull back the curtain behind the race for the House Majority.

→ In 2022, Republicans won the House by 6,675 votes (no, that’s not a typo.)

→ Right now, there are still THOUSANDS of votes left to count in the closest battleground.

→ And several races could be headed to a lengthy, expensive RECOUNT that could determine who wins the House.

REMEMBER: A Democratic House Majority could be the ONLY safeguard against Trump’s extremist agenda. That’s why we’re asking you to chip in to help ensure every legal vote is counted in this election – and that’s why our donors agreed to extend their 900% MATCH for another day! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-match-2024-post-ed?amount=15]

900% MATCH EXTENDED FOR:
dpwillis67@gmail.com [#]
DEADLINE: 11:59PM
SUGGESTED SUPPORT: $15 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-match-2024-post-ed?amount=15]

Project 2025 is a 1,000-page agenda handcrafted by the Heritage Foundation for a Trump presidency – and we have every reason to believe Trump will try to follow through on it.
Just look at his first term as president – where he enacted nearly two-thirds of the extreme policies the Heritage Foundation laid out for him.
And now in his second term, our system of checks and balances is going to be more important than ever – to limit Trump’s authoritarian ambitions and defend the bedrock values of our democracy: the rule of law, the right to vote, and the freedom to protest.
We can’t stand by in silence as our democracy is dismantled. Add your name if you agree: Congress, the Judiciary, and state leaders must reject Trump and Heritage's dangerous Project 2025 agenda >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=111124_2&amount=25]

We know that's bringing a lot of us down, and you're not wrong to feel down. But here’s something we know for sure – we must immediately prepare to push back against Trump's anti-democracy Project 2025 agenda: Criminalizing voters: cracking down on simple voting mistakes using a so-called “Election Crimes Branch” – which has never been done by any president from any political party. Installing partisan loyalists: Immediately firing thousands of qualified civil servants at every level of the federal government and replacing them with ideologues willing to push an extreme political agenda. * Stripping away our rights: Deploying the National Guard to crack down on protests, robbing us of fair representation by rigging the U.S. Census, and dramatically increasing the President’s power to act without Congressional oversight. name: Sean Feucht
subject: FWD: 😅My wife roped me into running a half-marathon
body:
| | | Dear Friend,
---
Your prayers were answered!! Despite not training, I successfully completed the Monterey Bay Half Marathon on Saturday. I'm a little sore, but grateful for the prayers, encouragements and messages people sent me over the weekend! I used the race as a little challenge to help kick-start the next chapter of Let Us Worship by challenging Believers to sponsor me per mile, and YOU RESPONDED!! If you would still like to donate, every dollar raised will go toward our Revive in 2025 Tour! Check out the hardware we earned, and donate below!!

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=b71b7c377141499297d34c29acd93dfd&_e=luxwTiusZYfuJhtDaruNKT3prt8w0Df9bC9ixZcBZMAOYzuKGtcsd-5HG7TQR_3MZMCZ3FlV-UeNzODBa8lRlGsYCMswTa_j7eWOaLstpEvnx9cGhecRiarg0BztbJQI55RDnMIsAM1JCMjsmNqykWWLL9fqMuzP1QDyi6RTzWn9ZzqvgILaehAYKv7h9Je3fsu5se3pv9CkFBO4lmSiRQqVF6oP1IadWIZ-BBqQiPuWhy4Hte4sCh_m1vhQ54qEN0V8-P7aE3CwlufEYtSyQZflTtiRKvfttmvyHyFIHJuzS1-rANFFdgd1M8W9uLV7)

Dear Friend,
---
After spending the last two years traveling across America, holding over FIFTY praise and worship revivals, I planned on catching my breath. Nope! My wife roped me into running a half-marathon TOMORROW in Monterey, California! It's crazy, but it's happening!

I'm stepping up and RUNNING THE RACE, and I'm calling on Let Us Worship to have my back! I'm turning this into a run for revival in 2025, and raising money to help launch the next move of God in 2025.

Will you be a part of this crazy undertaking by sponsoring me? $5, $3—even just $1 per mile will help lay the groundwork for what God has next for the Let Us Worship movement! Watch the video and donate below!
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=b71b7c377141499297d34c29acd93dfd&_e=luxwTiusZYfuJhtDaruNKT3prt8w0Df9bC9ixZcBZMAOYzuKGtcsd-5HG7TQR_3MZMCZ3FlV-UeNzODBa8lRlGsYCMswTa_j7eWOaLstpEvnx9cGhecRiarg0BztbJQI55RDnMIsAM1JCMjsmNqykWWLL9fqMuzP1QDyi6RTzWmSYcOv4fOTaSz5R4pyKoD1m2QaYZYHd4NfEIgZel61owZVbmLwG4GmttVTXCxYEa1Sn92_ywKU2FtKKMmAxpWfRPFfPw3d2aSoXdrlGZ2ALjFKBmZ64G-Y09S47VqNZzcnAY11XVV26MtZSUehOtbJ)

name: Michelle Steel
subject: Please read this.

body:
We can't give up now.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

We left everything on the table.

We spent every dollar we had keeping our ads on the air and reaching voters in every corner of the district.

We gave it everything we had and now we're running on empty. _**[Can you rush an emergency donation to our Election Fund today to help finish this fight?](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkTGPpiAQhn8NdhgZlA8Ki002dt_lcs2VBGFULoAGwd399xfvstU2O-WbmXmeyfx-6qfxwaf1h4k45qjzqculz4IY6BHQnEgzGqehg54yRhnTvHGjUPCQrMGRPTjjg-Rd12zjMi_WzmLo2SJVP0gBCgflHCojO4uq8eO9h92lmARoGcx2mYceu36ee9eRvst41Dl4a1I0f_bsy0ebsDRh3Eo5TsJfCEwEphNtzdi--ZTRtXaPBKbo7YYhIP3vn9HuNRW61OQITMte163Qsu90M_lOCJ_invBDHwHdioS_llyRgKglamviYfyaCH_9lNY_X-ivJ7SMcaGELmx4KKmAMiYlAYHvunj3_f5_lD0VTOVGXzRH-jlKQLzXdH3Jmzy6482H4E_xIH23RuPDfX5Tvv2-a4S_AQAA__-snJtK "Can you rush an emergency donation to our Election Fund today to help finish this fight?")**_ We've fought too hard to give up now just inches away from the finish line.

The excitement for President Donald Trump’s return to the White House on January 20, 2025, is already building, and many Americans are looking for ways to witness this historic day up close. name: Gwen Moore
subject: Honoring our veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
To all the brave men and women...| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96940647/511714948/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGNmYTI1ZS02NWEwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8euDfmmnDbEy-X2fvXomlOWjV8rYXf3MOg3eZaziXp8=&emci=0c5c4ddb-64a0-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=7dcfa25e-65a0-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=1486204)
---
| | To all the brave men and women who risk their lives to protect our nation, we thank you. Thank you for defending our freedoms and our way of life. And thank you to their loved ones for their sacrifices. Today offers us an opportunity to reflect on their service to our nation, as well as what more we need to do to improve how we care for our veterans. Veterans Day is a day where we honor the men and women who put country above all else. I am honored by the service of every veteran. We, as a nation, are eternally grateful. Together, #WeRepresent and #WeHonor.
---
| |
---
Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender
---
|
---
The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

clean_body: To all the brave men and women...| | | | | To all the brave men and women who risk their lives to protect our nation, we thank you. Thank you for defending our freedoms and our way of life. And thank you to their loved ones for their sacrifices. Today offers us an opportunity to reflect on their service to our nation, as well as what more we need to do to improve how we care for our veterans. Veterans Day is a day where we honor the men and women who put country above all else. I am honored by the service of every veteran. We, as a nation, are eternally grateful. Together, #WeRepresent and #WeHonor. | | Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. = | | | = | =| = ---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress P.O. subject: We're launching a nationwide search for the fiercest TRUMP DEFENDERS
body:
It's about time someone said this...

| |
---
| | | It's about time someone said this...

**The real jury - _the American People_ - has spoken. Now that President Trump has WON the 2024 General Election, the corrupt lawfare waged against him must end. And not just that:**

- His conviction must be WIPED from the record
- The insurmountable fine must be REVERSED
- Jack Smith's baseless case must be entirely THROWN OUT

Donald Trump and his legal team have spent countless hours, days, weeks, AND MONTHS fighting in courtrooms to clear his name and demand his freedom. And the American People saw through the election-rigging scheme.

_According to recent reports, a decision will be made as soon as THIS TUESDAY on whether or not to throw out his sham conviction._

_**[So before then we are launching a nationwide search for the most dedicated Trump Defenders in America. You've stepped up before, so now we're calling on YOU to do it again now that the stakes are higher than ever.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=d2a707ad11fb444aa02e71b053fe9506&_e=eoUWcXUe6CiGyzCdyokRFhfGDRq6K7yFAbmlodaU7X44aJKZicA22KIeF9VNsi_giNCnun5h7FSChdZArUxbRyB0tS80BsrNi9NammtaG-Yk3RqL-gF2hIvt-VXHcnFpn9Bc_KQTpj4X5GwxA2IyIjCuL5zf9U037tRRPtD5K4xyF-yWRJw6OfjUdvaBZ7aJPvm3NdnzxgEgYj2abLLyqWSKamjvEkNOiE8Dxj5LMpS7YEIToAnM5Uwr-qK8yhLRESFFycuf22kigbrNyvqA_qdpRqFeKTcYIH_cxLGIXVlH8nkI5eMKGRSYOaKC4Dzw0Pa5WlEasHWSgTC0GI_D-ByTI0gycFR4lKBXxEf_77ON2jb06Cb6mdqSUAB63ljsMr6AI_bZSgI2Q24V7yIdV--qyLTWn45CPF11UF75ALcPOct6AKJf_LABWdI7TkuV "So before then we are launching a nationwide search for the most dedicated Trump Defenders in America. body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241110_sare_vega&n=1)
---
Friend - On Veterans Day, we must build the movement for peace, and end the reign of the rogue elements within our so-called intelligence agencies who have lied us into war after war, at the cost of horrible human suffering and economic devastation. Tonight we will be joined by former CIA analyst Larry Johnson to plan the next phase of the campaign to bring the USA into the New Paradigm and out of the British Colonial "Deep State" muck. | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/sare_vega_and_friends_20241111?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241110_sare_vega&n=2 "RSVP for Sare-Vega Zoom Link Monday 8:30 pm") [RSVP for Sare-Vega Zoom Link Monday 8:30 pm](https://www.sareforsenate.com/sare_vega_and_friends_20241111?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241110_sare_vega&n=2)
---
**Please read the rest of this email!**
If you voted for me, and/or know of others who did, please go to your County Board of Elections website to see how many votes for Diane Sare were recorded in your election district. If you're not sure how to do this, and want to join the follow-up election monitoring activity, please **_join the GUARD THE VOTE call tomorrow (Tuesday) at 7:30 pm._**
[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/tues_11_12_guard_the_vote_post_election_action?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241110_sare_vega&n=3 "RSVP for Tues. Post-Election Guard the Vote") [RSVP for Tues. Post-Election Guard the Vote](https://www.sareforsenate.com/tues_11_12_guard_the_vote_post_election_action?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241110_sare_vega&n=3)
---
Finally, if you have placed lawn signs on public easement, please remove them, and if you see any of my signs by the roadside anywhere, kindly remove them and put them in the trash or whatever recycling available in your area for such things.
Thank you for your efforts. We ran a fantastic campaign and are having a major impact which will continue.
\--Diane Sare

name: Melton for Iowa
subject: Melton for Iowa 2024 Weekly Update: November 11, 2024: Progress, and a Thank You
body:
| | |

# Melton for Iowa 2024
---
---
| Hello Peter,
Hello all,
After taking some time to decompress and rest, I wanted to reach out to you one last time (at least for now) with gratitude. I want to thank all of you for your help, whether it be via donations, volunteering, spreading the word, voting, or however else you helped boost this campaign. I will be forever grateful for all the care and support from countless folks I encountered on the campaign trail. As I've always said, this is going to be a long term build in the 4th, a district where a Democrat hasn't won a U.S. House seat in 40 years, and one the national party has abandoned. However, the progress from my '22 campaign to my '24 campaign is undeniable. We improved our percentage of votes earned overall by 3 percent, jumping from 30% to 33%. We improved our performance in 31 of the 36 counties in the district. Considering I've had so many '22 supporters move out of the district and state and therefore couldn't vote for me in '24, the 3 percent jump felt higher than that. We won Story County again. We had 17 state house candidates running in the 4th in '24 compared to only 10 in '22, and we have held some of the wealthiest in the world accountable and have delayed their progress on the eminent domain abuse-driven CO2 pipelines that threaten our public health and water. When I was arguably the first candidate to run against those pipelines back in early '22, I was told it was a fool's errand, that they were all but guaranteed to be constructed. We've also forced conversations that weren't happening before at the candidate level here regarding water pollution, the cancer crisis, the damaging influence of excessive corporate power on our politics and our governance, and the hollowing out of rural Iowa. We also got a lot more folks engaged and out to campaign events, and I'm so excited about the growth of our county parties over the last two years. We also started to build a cross-partisan populist movement, earning an unprecedented crossover endorsement from my general election opponent's Republican primary challenger, Kevin Virgil, an endorsement that forced the Iowa GOP leadership into a week of a very public panic attack (in which they didn't address a single concern of Virgil's). We also engaged a lot of young folks, and have been answering emails from high schoolers since the election thanking the campaign for what we represented and urging me to run again for the 4th in '26. I don't know what capacity I'll do this in at this point, but I'll continue to help the building of our 4th District Democratic Party, and will continue to hold Feenstra accountable for his lack of representation. We aren't quitting. There are too many voices that would go unheard otherwise, and too many painful problems our district is suffering from that would become much worse if we quit. I've had people post-election ask me to run for governor in '26, to run against Ernst for Senate, to run in the 4th again, to run for state-level office, and to run for IDP Leadership. I'm not sure what my next steps will be in that context, but the focus will always be on doing what I think would be most helpful to the cause of the people. In '22 and '24, since I was the only person on the primary ballot in the 4th race, that role was clearly running for the 4th. We'll see what the future holds. Thank you to all the candidates, volunteers, county party folks, and others that helped move the needle forward in the 4th. Let's keep building together. Let's remained plugged in and engaged. I know the battle will be tough and long, but as MLK said, "The Arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends toward justice." It is us that need to work to bend that arc. I'm going to rest and have a normal life again for a little while. I'm tired, but grateful for all the love and well wishes I've received from folks of all political affiliations over the past week in the 4th. I ask you to remain subscribed to this newsletter if possible, so we can stay connected and build the momentum we've started here together.

Let's keep fighting the good fight together! Ryan Melton

There is also a built in blinding 120 lumen flashlight recessed under the contact points, to disorient an attacker or light your way.

| | Check this out,

We've been grinding away to develop this powerful new optic and it's finally ready.

It's a new monocular that combines the tactical superpower of**[night vision with HD video quality and crystal clear 10X ZOOM...](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19076/6374453/526558325a9659695eb411bdfec93a4529a836de/b0c8b4320d846c95458b9e1774ffffa913311b82)**
In a package the size of a burrito.

Discreet and pocket-sized, the Raven IR Monoscope is perfect for hunters, tactical operators, and wildlife management professionals. [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19076/6374453/526558325a9659695eb411bdfec93a4529a836de/b0c8b4320d846c95458b9e1774ffffa913311b82)

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat To Our Power Grid

# **FOX & Friends Features
Breakthrough Solar
Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans
Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c3e35bc559c462b9f8ef4f4af6a0ac7&_e=YDNwruFfGDCI9pdZJ3FZM4UyjF45w-q7nLl2PYrOKQnGqSGufif4OvOt2-oMf8k8FF52t8-7e0igkE131qzUN8VbZx5wfUT0EQ2zIcUEA3AuQ3neYMk4X8rx1PnEUK-CBk1h6qGtB450Ll-UiJtx6RDePmVYhSnA0slMdMmYSYbwUfAHhgbCARGoJReE_x-BkCxBl9BgpBZD0PJfLAgymJH-JsuKpqSyWVMOw90SR42xR5Luva1QYdCosgeCRPMnk889qazBvaqJI3KwJCsX5Sp3dzeT_E0DbLZXQjhgo97iieWm-R11F_akgFRhtaOFO86pKohh4pjLJCiAPwUXC0Rh_zCq7vTzDzqRI-HR86_P33SDmqL4IAO3Q69WZnMR) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c3e35bc559c462b9f8ef4f4af6a0ac7&_e=YDNwruFfGDCI9pdZJ3FZM4UyjF45w-q7nLl2PYrOKQnGqSGufif4OvOt2-oMf8k8FF52t8-7e0igkE131qzUN8VbZx5wfUT0EQ2zIcUEA3AuQ3neYMk4X8rx1PnEUK-CBk1h6qGtB450Ll-UiJtx6RDePmVYhSnA0slMdMmYSYbwUfAHhgbCARGoJReE_x-BkCxBl9BgpBZD0PJfLAgymJH-JsuKpqSyWVMOw90SR41T6Rn3kCJeTQmbfM2PacOLoK53jAmPV9KLOpyvroCIAkB0Uwpnq1ikrHTcYSFYrgaUsl_pklRswfQro7FackTQE8EJMp7nbCYFzzMYHN6NiBj0p3CJyfaQKRWcWH7t1XDCLdhyvVt01m5LDUnrIVYZ) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts
Fear Imminent Threat To
Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** A former CIA Director warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government Is
Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c3e35bc559c462b9f8ef4f4af6a0ac7&_e=YDNwruFfGDCI9pdZJ3FZM4UyjF45w-q7nLl2PYrOKQnGqSGufif4OvOt2-oMf8k8FF52t8-7e0igkE131qzUN8VbZx5wfUT0EQ2zIcUEA3AuQ3neYMk4X8rx1PnEUK-CBk1h6qGtB450Ll-UiJtx6RDePmVYhSnA0slMdMmYSYbwUfAHhgbCARGoJReE_x-BkCxBl9BgpBZD0PJfLAgymJH-JsuKpqSyWVMOw90SR40wLy_VWqZ0anwL29Pd-GseItZ9AQ-JDR_Z9wrOh_YGCo7XHBQM9jUr1ETIfT-2xRXScbDf5LBOvmI0ci237tjwYyiMVCU16I7dRP5SpSqHTtwcZS4qYD6WRDxUk9ZQLBEp68JPmNCM1LEiqgischYg). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000
Americans already have it
in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generator In Action!**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c3e35bc559c462b9f8ef4f4af6a0ac7&_e=YDNwruFfGDCI9pdZJ3FZM4UyjF45w-q7nLl2PYrOKQnGqSGufif4OvOt2-oMf8k8FF52t8-7e0igkE131qzUN8VbZx5wfUT0EQ2zIcUEA3AuQ3neYMk4X8rx1PnEUK-CBk1h6qGtB450Ll-UiJtx6RDePmVYhSnA0slMdMmYSYbwUfAHhgbCARGoJReE_x-BkCxBl9BgpBZD0PJfLAgymJH-JsuKpqSyWVMOw90SR4318ZGrqaQh3YSZrl0ICeyNijD-nmLS-7ElTeCxUQVfSgpeZzYDXcjIofmiZ7dyE8G5yYValgkDVu0koFXN4iNwTXUbBKZyI8OVg6NkqXcu8VZNZLYlYnirlDxOgXK9Sr9aj0Tt2426bDO5xDQL9TQy) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Are
Raving About Their
Solar Generator** **Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" **Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" **Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" **Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" **Angel H.**
"Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." **Sharon P.**
"Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic." [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generator In Action!**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3c3e35bc559c462b9f8ef4f4af6a0ac7&_e=YDNwruFfGDCI9pdZJ3FZM4UyjF45w-q7nLl2PYrOKQnGqSGufif4OvOt2-oMf8k8FF52t8-7e0igkE131qzUN8VbZx5wfUT0EQ2zIcUEA3AuQ3neYMk4X8rx1PnEUK-CBk1h6qGtB450Ll-UiJtx6RDePmVYhSnA0slMdMmYSYbwUfAHhgbCARGoJReE_x-BkCxBl9BgpBZD0PJfLAgymJH-JsuKpqSyWVMOw90SR42V0zHXooK8Bk9nR9swlAMgkgYwHBfmU29Ak7hS4SBMQ9CSHrtI1k_-f29FqNAQu9ANe-8luZC4zWjemvUry_XyQxDstV-uY3nL7fi346rJS6RpUJW814mvgiakNJJDEaf-HDZRa5RC7pqLTsv8vg-6)

clean_body: National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat To Our Power Grid FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs... FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out. Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat To Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! A former CIA Director warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government Is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. Customers Are Raving About Their Solar Generator Joe B. "My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" Bob A. "Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" Carla U. "The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" Bernice L. "Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" Patricia T. "This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" Angel H. "Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." Sharon P. "Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic." Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits...

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=57f007e3c8864258a29fe25c4389d4c7&_e=grC7TWOs5BaaBpP0kTHukrIa3sNABrZQNqWF4MDzPeRst2XhgTodOY8V17C1iWJu2EemyrZs7GTxmM-YjX6F3xz_nzFDCnLWA2fT8Gsq9MHOaOS6mWUdA-Skvva-stgcUo7TPNqn9rjm1SKFM0eunDU5OC14bhRbAHZrzJJtWZ803bz_FKSEi2HYVHvRP61HMSys-t_CXJYKs3Jwq6gbXRatHvpDZLFz-PnRCJ2rI31RdKJCR35NM4552cbBjiNymM4K49CB_u6fbKyhtDcPwl8tqJ3FXG5wc_dp0M6h7tNQ2xJg-XEa0TVlvhslmYMhAF5VUGUyIUwxUbuou1Pu89xrRaELYsxQAEFdA-OKfPSk76QRJvCd-QNhEdG1l0v8), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=57f007e3c8864258a29fe25c4389d4c7&_e=grC7TWOs5BaaBpP0kTHukrIa3sNABrZQNqWF4MDzPeRst2XhgTodOY8V17C1iWJu2EemyrZs7GTxmM-YjX6F3xz_nzFDCnLWA2fT8Gsq9MHOaOS6mWUdA-Skvva-stgcUo7TPNqn9rjm1SKFM0eunDU5OC14bhRbAHZrzJJtWZ803bz_FKSEi2HYVHvRP61HMSys-t_CXJYKs3Jwq6gbXRatHvpDZLFz-PnRCJ2rI318uaBtp21HUfHug3wVQfo5dKW9nXEqFtCOJBLOa8pMMVScwDbyaeQtDbOaX3gJKfKMA12mv5LWuAgOLF1eTg5K_cSESHovzOLNtrufFdLCpq_Nsyx4lUMPHyl3-ssCqrGhw2oEGf8wBIghIwAgNVU0) [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=57f007e3c8864258a29fe25c4389d4c7&_e=grC7TWOs5BaaBpP0kTHukrIa3sNABrZQNqWF4MDzPeRst2XhgTodOY8V17C1iWJu2EemyrZs7GTxmM-YjX6F3xz_nzFDCnLWA2fT8Gsq9MHOaOS6mWUdA-Skvva-stgcUo7TPNqn9rjm1SKFM0eunDU5OC14bhRbAHZrzJJtWZ803bz_FKSEi2HYVHvRP61HMSys-t_CXJYKs3Jwq6gbXRatHvpDZLFz-PnRCJ2rI32JNATQNzIdHGF0B-KQcvYH3XDnsGplQe-vjt5YivmDOGqYCZlHgd-UOvTRoc7XSs2Zhv6aurpUjMY7dfthx-5UmkhxtVx--7oMTeSlYH_YgUlixwmM-JG4IJowcjLqEWVI9lpaY3dymlN0eM2jEMIH) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=57f007e3c8864258a29fe25c4389d4c7&_e=grC7TWOs5BaaBpP0kTHukrIa3sNABrZQNqWF4MDzPeRst2XhgTodOY8V17C1iWJu2EemyrZs7GTxmM-YjX6F3xz_nzFDCnLWA2fT8Gsq9MHOaOS6mWUdA-Skvva-stgcUo7TPNqn9rjm1SKFM0eunDU5OC14bhRbAHZrzJJtWZ803bz_FKSEi2HYVHvRP61HMSys-t_CXJYKs3Jwq6gbXRatHvpDZLFz-PnRCJ2rI33cJKbn5C74B73qSDHpg0iJaRB0z7SXXx6e2akN3RxRIbCPM7k6CDUWCSKbdTYmYWGRWaWp4xDKjAAM4nUnHs61nEdJMV7hU8gMBgssLieVDlpM-pm3kAc-LSWAr5lDLnjuL3NMfu26RjhiVXCvAvNo) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=57f007e3c8864258a29fe25c4389d4c7&_e=grC7TWOs5BaaBpP0kTHukrIa3sNABrZQNqWF4MDzPeRst2XhgTodOY8V17C1iWJu2EemyrZs7GTxmM-YjX6F3xz_nzFDCnLWA2fT8Gsq9MHOaOS6mWUdA-Skvva-stgcUo7TPNqn9rjm1SKFM0eunDU5OC14bhRbAHZrzJJtWZ803bz_FKSEi2HYVHvRP61HMSys-t_CXJYKs3Jwq6gbXRatHvpDZLFz-PnRCJ2rI31Z4dAt_sOTPFCZrxVdi6AJbgC16A3Ies3UqQ9sC3S_TMwkCf-wDmIcljW0EykFVZVNZap_Xz8an2vhxzK57xVsA8esJz0ki8124pQ87SlmwDoxlwUBqtly0gvAchdhaeNX-16SfBfvH02zbshUGI_5)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5db554534a01499783e200a64ee1183f&_e=x7RPP-6H83XmIH1b3V9XTiEUTCn4j_evUgo-OqQiR6v1CxET9voKcdApVAnlKKhOBeYXjHRkUpPzpzaYaQOrno2Gad_4adLFYYj1TPRfvKfeQFtxUhl9Tktvzea_qD6JaoojveutvIGUQxzTUC1my-t21dEpy3F65Q5MeEcdI7PphuJiZC-ppgPS1Ij1h1hVtBSuUKWGuykkG6UinbSlENgkNBRq3PhPd8XokbbRDF4Lp-oyUS2Wt7I0iObr9CVuT1ssnPm8XBkUmBnNZdgxK06FoUbW37gafDtWGwj9sH6cnW5C1AMXJmNUg9ggQMcg1ymAXeZP52dgB5CHbYig3e3G6mOqbfcv2V-_pg_ELoiHJ1xpZ_qLfFz-u56OdQoqpzcp4aw6zCjcdGOGT5CM3w%3D%3D)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5db554534a01499783e200a64ee1183f&_e=x7RPP-6H83XmIH1b3V9XTiEUTCn4j_evUgo-OqQiR6v1CxET9voKcdApVAnlKKhOBeYXjHRkUpPzpzaYaQOrno2Gad_4adLFYYj1TPRfvKfeQFtxUhl9Tktvzea_qD6JaoojveutvIGUQxzTUC1my-t21dEpy3F65Q5MeEcdI7PphuJiZC-ppgPS1Ij1h1hVtBSuUKWGuykkG6UinbSlENgkNBRq3PhPd8XokbbRDF4Lp-oyUS2Wt7I0iObr9CVutK02UWQyKhuIyDRQiDfcX9YguG10FoWehHUaD9NsSlSvhqIq0kjqGieo6FVnUnBCZevq0DLVBZS4cE2nkt_UZ3IRFmpd_Nard2_7lXbsYC5YMLeg1LsI5G2Nl2jR26Kx35TOYSORklVDtAB17BT11w%3D%3D)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5db554534a01499783e200a64ee1183f&_e=x7RPP-6H83XmIH1b3V9XTiEUTCn4j_evUgo-OqQiR6v1CxET9voKcdApVAnlKKhOBeYXjHRkUpPzpzaYaQOrno2Gad_4adLFYYj1TPRfvKfeQFtxUhl9Tktvzea_qD6JaoojveutvIGUQxzTUC1my-t21dEpy3F65Q5MeEcdI7PphuJiZC-ppgPS1Ij1h1hVtBSuUKWGuykkG6UinbSlENgkNBRq3PhPd8XokbbRDF4Lp-oyUS2Wt7I0iObr9CVuicuafi5BxhzsqEmbraKGlMczPIyO1XLUOgnZCruAkRO82HSaAg6H3v1zOLZe7kaBArT7lQz0eSM_oUi3e5usK4Mq-qKxTZD0lxxxz-iM76UyMIBFVTGZREnNwYiZdVXKQTKLnM2SB3OZRK4BeBrw4A%3D%3D). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5db554534a01499783e200a64ee1183f&_e=x7RPP-6H83XmIH1b3V9XTiEUTCn4j_evUgo-OqQiR6v1CxET9voKcdApVAnlKKhOBeYXjHRkUpPzpzaYaQOrno2Gad_4adLFYYj1TPRfvKfeQFtxUhl9Tktvzea_qD6JaoojveutvIGUQxzTUC1my-t21dEpy3F65Q5MeEcdI7PphuJiZC-ppgPS1Ij1h1hVtBSuUKWGuykkG6UinbSlENgkNBRq3PhPd8XokbbRDF4Lp-oyUS2Wt7I0iObr9CVuHHQZtjzAs6VEXAK4qajQ9RUcfQyTAtjdcc3ixYlcN5gC_Xp0cQhdWqJI4yM6_sjA_c4WgDgVyJhIvDy6QZ3ylRCR8xg9tN1MiUoz3BIR5S0zAYDiaLEqQoZVEMy6skAMarGemiu6nLdzLD8wMDptoA%3D%3D)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

To give a gift use this secure link: All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America. You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources. Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, Why America Matters , and help us reach more children with the truth. Sincerely, Dr. Ben Carson Founder and Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96941593/511718667/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2ZjM2FiOS02YmEwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efwCx6_5G-0BMoHl-Wt_WdhPuUiazDnzygX5pjFCVX0=&emci=55457eba-62a0-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&emdi=13fc3ab9-6ba0-ef11-88ce-000d3a98fa6b&ceid=24635485)
Friend, Happy Veterans Day to all the veterans who have served in Maryland and across the country. **As a former service member, I am proud to support our veterans.** So far, we’ve worked to pass over $200 million worth of tax relief for veterans. I am working to pass free health care and dental care to our members of the Maryland National Guard. Maryland has a long and proud military tradition, unmatched by any other state. Today, more than 375,000 Veterans call Maryland home, and they play a critical role in our state and economy. But there is so much more we need to do to support our military community. We need to make sure that 'thank you for your service' is more than just a quote, or something that we always put at the end of a sentence. We can and must do more as a state for the men and women who have worn the cloth of our country and sacrificed so much to keep us safe and protect our freedoms. Just like they have fought for us on the frontlines, I will continue to fight for them. Elevate, Wes | **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96941594/511718668/-1222941315?refcode=em20241111-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2ZjM2FiOS02YmEwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efwCx6_5G-0BMoHl-Wt_WdhPuUiazDnzygX5pjFCVX0=)**

$11.

I know it doesn't sound like much, Peter, but my _entire_ fight for progress is fueled by grassroots gifts just like that. **[That's why I'm going to ask you to donate $11 to my campaign today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96941624/511718841/-2022193277?amounts=15,25,50,100,500&amount=11&refcode=jtk1696-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzliNDg2Ny02Y2EwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mkz3GfiXAydTiPLw8y_XaTIDqSa0rIb4Gvq-Y5Wz9xQ=)** – but first I wanted to explain why your investment in my work is so important.
Growing up in Brooklyn meant that I didn't have any real power or privilege. I could do nothing as I watched corrupt government officials favor the powerful and wealthy over families like my own time and time again. I really, truly, felt voiceless.

**But when I made history in 2018 and became New York's first Black woman attorney general, I swore to never let another New Yorker feel the same way. So I rolled up my sleeves and got to work.**
And throughout my time in office, I have been able to secure _real_ wins for everyday, working families. From holding Big Pharma accountable for their role in the opioid epidemic to going toe to toe with far-right attorneys general around the nation, I have made it clear that New York is _not_ up for sale.
As you can imagine, my work has made me enemies. Thanks to supporters like you, I've been able to withstand their attacks so far – _But as we close out 2024_ , I must keep that momentum going.
**[That's why I'm asking you to invest just $11 for the eleventh month of the year to help me continue my fight for progress. Can I count on you to chip in now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96941625/511718842/-2022193277?amounts=15,25,50,100,500&amount=11&refcode=jtk1696-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzliNDg2Ny02Y2EwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mkz3GfiXAydTiPLw8y_XaTIDqSa0rIb4Gvq-Y5Wz9xQ=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/96941626/511718843/-2022193277?amounts=15,25,50,100,500&amount=11&refcode=jtk1696-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzliNDg2Ny02Y2EwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDBkM2E5OGZhNmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mkz3GfiXAydTiPLw8y_XaTIDqSa0rIb4Gvq-Y5Wz9xQ=)

Letitia
With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Can you think of a $44 billion joke?
body:
not only did Twitter deplatform us, but other woke Big Tech firms have tried to silence our voice as well.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cff2884b1a264b0394ed799f8556ab3c&_e=Hj2AjQL0tI2o8uum75fDU68vRtrg9vDjMxWD1WT-pxDqvJ-KiMEbTFI2woWR0VfLPvP5eAlO2flRfFx5NIYy97cB5WaiByMtxuxw7CiSeFzb7rIP1ROjeJyWSWwS7-XH1SQN3i3EIVrXqJX-cozhqalbOfJ43zgcnNbaD9wfthx99jEnWOBNW2HAWay5subxotkUElv0yFE8FRUrK-7E8u91rpwoOCaw7MPjCIijR2ZumTnBs8FRkbaWKYkEB9il_4LRxnkQzkdYUba3Dgd8pA%3D%3D)
---
|
---
Friend When Elon Musk bought Twitter, he sent me a DM that said, "Do you want the Babylon Bee restored? There will be no censorship of humor."
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cff2884b1a264b0394ed799f8556ab3c&_e=Hj2AjQL0tI2o8uum75fDU68vRtrg9vDjMxWD1WT-pxDqvJ-KiMEbTFI2woWR0VfLPvP5eAlO2flRfFx5NIYy97cB5WaiByMtxuxw7CiSeFzb7rIP1ROjeJyWSWwS7-XH0LFhwj6Qz5v0wTfwly6BD3hn2KHXM60eGcXjOENg0rkDbfQGKsAA7z9pWzUF8pIgaPQeSTNpXa7Gxf3ZIJc_mmE-uNGzMIcLQILjXD19hXbjLL_Tk_tPAJi1qYjxGTAa49_mcTVRC3NqAu_CGkhKig%3D%3D)
---
We've been trying to write a joke worth $44 billion ever since. But, in all seriousness - free speech is no joke (not even a multibillion dollar one). The Bee would know - not only did Twitter deplatform us, but other woke Big Tech firms have tried to silence our voice as well.
---
* **Facebook** has deleted our posts and deactivated our account on several occasions.
* **Front** , our internal email service at the time, terminated our account and left us unable to communicate with each other and wider world.
* And, in a particularly ironic move, **Vimeo** permanently suspended the David Horowitz Freedom Center's account because they posted a talk **I gave on censorship. **

---
**It 's clear woke, left-wing tech elitists can't abide by satire that dares mock their progressive orthodoxy**. We're not the only attempted victims of their censorship regime, either. They've gone after our First Amendment ally Musk, too - Disney, Apple, IBM, and Sony are just some of the companies who have pulled their advertising from X to protest the fact that it platforms the Bee and others accused of "wrongthink." All this amounts to a sustained, coordinated attack on free thought and expression. These pillars are central to our mission of speaking truth through humor. **No matter how much pressure they exert, the Bee will never back down. Free speech is worth more than whatever they can take from us**. To people with integrity, like Musk, principles are worth more than money. **But we won 't give them what they want. **We won't stop telling jokes. More importantly, we won't stop telling the _truth_.
---
[ Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cff2884b1a264b0394ed799f8556ab3c&_e=Hj2AjQL0tI2o8uum75fDU68vRtrg9vDjMxWD1WT-pxDqvJ-KiMEbTFI2woWR0VfLPvP5eAlO2flRfFx5NIYy97cB5WaiByMtxuxw7CiSeFzb7rIP1ROjeJyWSWwS7-XHAp3PNI_2QAKI2NTrBSNXHsuesTIsfityYfQ7OWv-fZbQ_lVE3yEkyL6w9Z7tzlPP0cno07Ru5HXgz030aQB0JnCHPrpJby2KnSxXVtgHaaM2-OdLk7BdEVPEYUrcQikFRt_yyceOKeHv6xLV_zNiwQ%3D%3D)
---
Sure, you may be thinking, a billionaire like Musk can afford to take the hit when radical Leftists try to force X into conformity and submission. That's what we thought, too, but we noticed something in the midst of the censorship campaigns waged against us - we had a superpower progressives couldn't see. And that's our subscribers. **The Bee could not have taken the stand it did against Twitter if we did not have the support of each and every subscriber**. These are people who appreciate humor, yes, but also believe in free speech. Who appreciate debate, dialogue, and discovering new ideas. **[If that sounds like you, I hope you'll consider subscribing to the Babylon Bee. We'd love to have you in the fight for freedom of expression.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cff2884b1a264b0394ed799f8556ab3c&_e=Hj2AjQL0tI2o8uum75fDU68vRtrg9vDjMxWD1WT-pxDqvJ-KiMEbTFI2woWR0VfLPvP5eAlO2flRfFx5NIYy97cB5WaiByMtxuxw7CiSeFzb7rIP1ROjeJyWSWwS7-XHx1oCLTZtoBo7r-JisIEiKQt4_L6_4_Y03rcmtmzdLyG0jT220eI5MPlq1ufKCnID-dTyl6Lha4UYLcF8VocNnhhOTZebsM8BUnHFRoxw9OcNaHIKossvWV9DNOquf_Q4fTXovelUnl2kib0Bo6yXpg%3D%3D)**
---
[ Yes, I'll Stand With The Babylon Bee](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cff2884b1a264b0394ed799f8556ab3c&_e=Hj2AjQL0tI2o8uum75fDU68vRtrg9vDjMxWD1WT-pxDqvJ-KiMEbTFI2woWR0VfLPvP5eAlO2flRfFx5NIYy97cB5WaiByMtxuxw7CiSeFzb7rIP1ROjeJyWSWwS7-XHbC60Zm3msJBx4LsYrUWAGVWS-EXTVXzRlYRkuGR_rTUq6u5vyMKiD4BMXATVQDzGhh3L-dsv-1_5eAcXlLComTQFlXaaSy3k34WBH8K7dzVqyIZ4DtZeGoCtjIB1lhGpL42wOJiduNm6IVFkFTlgRg%3D%3D)
---
They can hurt us, smear us, reduce our reach; but they can never silence us with free speech supporters like you in our corner. **[Join the fray with us by becoming a Babylon Bee premium subscriber today.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cff2884b1a264b0394ed799f8556ab3c&_e=Hj2AjQL0tI2o8uum75fDU68vRtrg9vDjMxWD1WT-pxDqvJ-KiMEbTFI2woWR0VfLPvP5eAlO2flRfFx5NIYy97cB5WaiByMtxuxw7CiSeFzb7rIP1ROjeJyWSWwS7-XHfpCF40RTsM1VJamn5-xchKpx5sH8oda8okWz6B3wI2RBwvlxTgJgL168OANDpN3fql1LlNRqz0gYrRMgU4MIa9Msq0vwdSjOzSwP4oMSzy6ESVfVjyDTpBEzXLG320Zbr4d9zCYDGHaj2RgtfChAGQ%3D%3D)** Thanks for considering standing with us. We'll stand with you, too.
---
Seth Dillon

clean_body: not only did Twitter deplatform us, but other woke Big Tech firms have tried to silence our voice as well. | | | | Friend When Elon Musk bought Twitter, he sent me a DM that said, "Do you want the Babylon Bee restored? There will be no censorship of humor." We've been trying to write a joke worth $44 billion ever since. But, in all seriousness - free speech is no joke (not even a multibillion dollar one). The Bee would know - not only did Twitter deplatform us, but other woke Big Tech firms have tried to silence our voice as well. Facebook has deleted our posts and deactivated our account on several occasions. Front , our internal email service at the time, terminated our account and left us unable to communicate with each other and wider world. And, in a particularly ironic move, Vimeo permanently suspended the David Horowitz Freedom Center's account because they posted a talk I gave on censorship. It 's clear woke, left-wing tech elitists can't abide by satire that dares mock their progressive orthodoxy. We're not the only attempted victims of their censorship regime, either. They've gone after our First Amendment ally Musk, too - Disney, Apple, IBM, and Sony are just some of the companies who have pulled their advertising from X to protest the fact that it platforms the Bee and others accused of "wrongthink." All this amounts to a sustained, coordinated attack on free thought and expression. These pillars are central to our mission of speaking truth through humor. No matter how much pressure they exert, the Bee will never back down. Free speech is worth more than whatever they can take from us. To people with integrity, like Musk, principles are worth more than money. But we won 't give them what they want. We won't stop telling jokes. More importantly, we won't stop telling the truth. Sure, you may be thinking, a billionaire like Musk can afford to take the hit when radical Leftists try to force X into conformity and submission. That's what we thought, too, but we noticed something in the midst of the censorship campaigns waged against us - we had a superpower progressives couldn't see. And that's our subscribers. The Bee could not have taken the stand it did against Twitter if we did not have the support of each and every subscriber. These are people who appreciate humor, yes, but also believe in free speech. Who appreciate debate, dialogue, and discovering new ideas. They can hurt us, smear us, reduce our reach; but they can never silence us with free speech supporters like you in our corner. Thanks for considering standing with us. We'll stand with you, too. Seth Dillon CEO | The Babylon Bee Pronouns: Bee and Beeself | Copyright(C) 2023 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is:** The Babylon Bee, LLC PO Box 546 Jupiter, FL 33468 Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |
